name: Jason C. Johnson
subject: Petition to President Trump enclosed
body:
That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.

| |
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zb4l1q27tpln309i1id91uqgic32njslfnoheph0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I’m writing to you today to ask for your help to undo a horrible injustice perpetrated on four innocent police officers by President Obama and his administration.Their names are Jason Zullo, John Miller, David Cari, and Dennis Spaulding.They’re known as the “East Haven Four.”As you’ll see in the enclosed report, all four men were highly respected, highly decorated police officers. **[And your petition to President Trump is their only hope of clearing their names and ending the decade-long nightmare they – and their families – have been trapped in.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl64miskove4nhrea9bg32j9bktladejc5qadki0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)** Let me explain. Before they became the target of a political witch hunt, Officers Zullo, Miller, Cari, and Spaulding were police officers in East Haven, Connecticut. For generations, the town had been a small, close-knit community where everyone knows their neighbors – the perfect safe place to raise a family.But after Obama was elected and he threw open our borders, illegal immigrants from Ecuador started flooding into East Haven.And as the town rapidly changed......the four officers discovered something huge: **Thousands of these illegal immigrants were using fraudulent documents to obtain license plates, fake car insurance cards, and even fake driver’s licenses.** The East Haven Four went to work, making hundreds of arrests. Every single person arrested for their involvement in this crime ring was an illegal immigrant – including dozens of suspects with rap sheets a mile long.Then Obama’s Department of Justice showed up.Instead of thanking these four officers for their hard work in breaking up this crime ring and getting dangerous criminals off the streets......the Obama DOJ accused them of racism and launched a politicized witch hunt, charging all four men with federal felonies for doing their jobs. Not only that – they launched a vicious smear campaign in the media, painting the officers as hateful monsters, just for doing their jobs. They even flew deported illegal immigrants back into the country to testify against the officers.My friend, this wasn’t just blatant lawfare...It was a message from Obama and his DOJ cronies to every other police department in the country:**“Give illegal immigrants special treatment, or you’re next.”** Because of Obama’s DOJ, all four officers went to prison. And even though the men are now all free, it’s been nearly impossible for them to rebuild their lives or provide for their families.Dave Cari was homeless for four months after he was released and wound up working at Home Depot for minimum wage. After months of unemployment, Jason Zullo was offered a job working as a janitor. But right before his first day, he got a letter withdrawing the job offer – with a copy of one of the news articles calling him a racist attached.And all these years later, the unjust felony convictions still make life difficult.They can’t coach their kids’ hockey or softball teams because they can’t pass a background check... They can’t travel with their families out of the country...And they’ll live every day knowing they’ll never get the time back they lost with their wives and kids – the missed wedding anniversaries, graduations, t-ball games, and babies’ first steps.My friend, you and I can’t help these four men recover that lost time. ...but we can help them clear their names and get the justice they deserve.That’s why your **Pardon Petition to President Trump** is so important. **[My friend, will you take a minute right now to sign your petition and then rush it back to me?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj2koj9fg4nhnce0lbot6ev7ntv8gh7b8t8ube8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)** I’m hoping to deliver your petition to President Trump as soon as possible. Because as a former Deputy Police Commissioner, it makes my blood boil that four innocent officers with perfect records had their lives destroyed......while illegal immigrants who had the audacity to unlawfully enter our country and then break our laws walk away with zero consequences.But as you know, that’s the upside-down world we live in today. And that’s why the work we do at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF, is so important.My friend, if you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know we help get innocent officers like the East Haven Four get the legal defense they need to fight back against radical, anti-cop prosecutors. With the support of patriots like you, over the past 30 years we’ve helped dozens of officers stay out of prison and clear their names.Now it’s time to clear the East Haven Four’s names too.These men and their families have suffered long enough. And now that there’s a pro-police president in the White House, we finally have the chance to get these men and their families the long-overdue justice they deserve.So please, my friend, don’t let the East Haven Four suffer any longer. **[Sign your Pardon Petition to President Trump right away.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7skm2eebhovtvq1esmbhs771ggqnkqb8vil4gro_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)** And when you send it back to me......would you also give a tax-deductible gift of $35 to LELDF? Your gift of $35 will help send out and collect hundreds of these Pardon Petitions from people like you who still “Back the Blue.”And if you’re able to send a special gift today of $50, $100, $250, $500 – or even $1,000, $2,500, or $5,000 – your gift will go even further in helping fuel this Petition Campaign and all our other efforts to defend innocent police officers from the radical anti-cop Left. But whatever you can afford to give, my friend...**[...please rush back your tax-deductible gift and your signed Pardon Petition to President Trump right away.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs2brehc88a530reg0rurs6jljpc3ddhcvqokug0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)** Thank you for taking the time to read this email today.Thank you for being one of the few Americans left who still supports our law enforcement.And thank you in advance for helping these four men and their families – and helping undo this injustice from the Obama Administration.I’ll be looking for your signed petition soon.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvogqe7kjb871q9ub7hkbi6efehidqi2dd5euj80_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)
---
Jason C. JohnsonPresident, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---
P.S. A decade ago, Obama’s DOJ cronies destroyed the lives – and the reputations – of four decorated officers for doing their jobs. And for more than 10 years now, these officers and their families have been suffering. It’s time to end this injustice and clear these officers’ names once and for all. **[Please sign your Pardon Petition to President Trump and rush it back to me right away.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvs6o735viteaj6dvojaqak7nk9d6vu3ecvldkog_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)** And don’t forget to include your tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to help fuel this pardon petition campaign.
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0p17i7spqashb3972b834idq24un5prdk79cc68_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_ [**Join our sustaining members by making a monthly gift to LELDF today!**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3uet9de41b9ie3mcou3tl42eu5lumg8tm23nd00_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge6oj2clh2bs)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: I'm running to defeat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us
body:
I know the road ahead won’t be easy. Lauren Boebert is bought and paid for by billionaires like Elon Musk, who are willing to do – and spend – whatever it takes to defeat us.

| Peter, my name is Trisha Calvarese (D) - and I'm running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert (R), flip the House blue and stand up for working families in my hometown.
In a second, I want to tell you a little more about myself and why I'm in this race. But first, I need you to know that if we win here, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to take back the House. [So if you're ready to join our movement, please chip in $25 or more now to defeat Boebert and build a better future for Colorado.](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iKerGngnNDY609AV4_Ap-GYzzLediZ6m-QqKb5OCKuWkQxsAYtRy7FU1KDPUe8NBHaO0EDpRp4rx-FibxU5Xgpqi6HScd7y-TNIXoQdQzlFeO1n52tV3pL-6kh_mrXtXFz1v4r1Ia441XRDIhAa0u0VtsQOWMRJbMkzkx1wd6cvPujIdbaRra0PY42UFXFqevJ_2TcWObFd3XXe3bwmzcKq8UbcO0yiNiIC2ZDE-dzI=&c=vDK9I1utfE0eXztXdBKjYbczFj4PXBgRbgruZXPAnZ2u3G1FS6I5eg==&ch=o5jet-i_DW-UXpeRalkrDaWv8iq9t8cJ4rwrikUauxBtq50Hll3fNA==)
My story begins in the rural Eastern Plains. My dad was a dedicated civil servant, and my mom was a child care provider. From the beginning, they've been my models of what servant leadership means.
When they both became terminally ill with cancer less than two years ago, I returned home to provide end-of-life care for them. It was the toughest thing I've ever done.
It opened my eyes to how broken our systems are - and I couldn't believe that our members of Congress weren't doing more to fix them. So that's what I'm doing: I'm running for Congress to stand up for the dignity and care of families in my hometown.
That means protecting Social Security and Medicare. It means working to bring down the cost of everything from prescription drugs to groceries. It means creating good-paying jobs and opportunities right here at home.
I just outraised Boebert 5 to 1 and in 2024 when I went head to head with her we the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district while she underperformed Trump in every county. Now it's time to finish the job.
So, Peter, I'm asking you to join our movement today: [Will you please give $5 now to defeat Lauren Boebert, take back the House for Democrats and give working families the voice they deserve in Congress?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iKerGngnNDY609AV4_Ap-GYzzLediZ6m-QqKb5OCKuWkQxsAYtRy7FU1KDPUe8NBkRPI0xjVaWy8AcefK9ej3zFrMtiSrZZyx1QJW39sfeLVMADCXfpMPl8PzzXCG4mCr2ejnnLpGb18TvwycAjq-XY_vu5W_Kts4UGkIzoJOQIdlE3T-lq5IbV9XmC7h03hEdJpXX-7Xbj8jHlbSLAdqlUobZdAl492jcHPLhF10wg=&c=vDK9I1utfE0eXztXdBKjYbczFj4PXBgRbgruZXPAnZ2u3G1FS6I5eg==&ch=o5jet-i_DW-UXpeRalkrDaWv8iq9t8cJ4rwrikUauxBtq50Hll3fNA==)

**null, RFK Jr. is not just a MAGA conspiracy theorist – he’s now the highest-ranking public health official in the country.** And the chaos he's causing at the Department of Health and Human Services is growing increasingly dangerous. Here's the latest:
👉 He _fired the CDC director_ and replaced key health leaders with anti-vaccine extremists.

💉 He _canceled vaccine campaigns_ and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks as cases surged across the country.
🧬 He _shut down critical mRNA vaccine research_ , halting work on cancer, HIV, and public health innovation.

💊 At a cabinet meeting, _he_ _linked circumcision and autism_ – citing discredited studies and spreading dangerous misinformation.
😷 _He’s blamed childhood vaccines and prenatal Tylenol for autism_ – even as real experts call his claims junk science.

📉 And earlier this month, _his agency laid off hundreds of CDC staffers,_ crippling our response to the respiratory illness season.
It’s no wonder Republicans and Democrats are raising the alarm and calling for accountability.

But we want to know what YOU think, null. **[That’s why we’re asking 150 people from 18326 to weigh in before midnight:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7661?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1188%2E49239%2EYsQ0dE)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I am standing up for our federal workers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The firings at the CDC mean you are not as protected from deadly viruses. The firings at the FDA mean you are not as safe from dangerous products being put on grocery store and drug store shelves.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9107%2E5257348%2Et0pxOO)
Derek,
I want to talk to you about RIFs — also known as a Reduction in Force, a fancy term for the mass firing of federal workers.
Russell Vought, Trump’s Director of the Office of Management and Budget and the key architect behind Project 2025, is bragging about how he plans to lay off thousands more federal employees.
They’re trying to blame Democrats and the government shutdown — even though they control everything — so they can do what they have always dreamed of doing, tearing down and destroying the government. So that their wealthy patrons can control everything. Because the truth is — there is nothing about the shutdown that requires the president to fire people.
Yes, some people are being temporarily furloughed until the shutdown ends.
Yes, Trump is threatening to withhold their back pay.
And yes, the law requires them to be paid once a shutdown ends.
But firing all these federal workers is blatantly illegal. The largest number of firings from this administration took place well before the shutdown even started. They’ve already fired over 50,000 federal workers in the first nine months of this administration, and pushed out over 200,000 federal workers in total.
Now, I take personal interest in this because so many Californians are affected. In fact, we have more federal workers in California than in any other state. But all of us are going to be affected.
The firings at the CDC mean you are not as protected from deadly viruses.
The firings at the Forest Service mean we are more vulnerable to wildfires.
The firings at the FDA mean you are not as safe from dangerous products being put on grocery store and drug store shelves.
The firings at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau mean you are not as protected from being ripped off by large corporations.
These RIFs are going to affect everyone — but Donald Trump couldn’t care less about the harm he is causing. In fact, he’s reveling in it. He just wants to inflict more pain on a group of people who he believes didn’t vote for him in the last election.
**[But Derek, I am standing up for our federal workers from the Senate, and I will continue to fight for them, no matter what. Please chip in to help me keep up this fight.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q42025_abs_em.dd-KUe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20251027_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9107%2E5257348%2Et0pxOO)**

name: John Milligan
subject: Shaunna, Todd, and Rick need OUR HELP ☎️❗VIRTUAL & IN PERSON PHONE BANKING

body:
Winsome’s opponent is doubling her fundraising numbers thanks to wealthy megadonors like George Soros.

**I'm writing to you today as a big supporter of Winsome Earle-Sears. As the current Lt. Governor of Virginia, Winsome 's story has already inspired kids of all races from all backgrounds. **
**But now, her race for Governor is TIED, and she urgently needs our help to take the lead.**
**As a conservative Christian, I know that Winsome shares our values and will fight tirelessly to protect our families and our freedoms. But despite her impressive record, she's getting outraised MASSIVELY on the fundraising front by her liberal opponent.**
**That's why I'm counting on you to join me in supporting Winsome today. We're not just fighting for bragging rights - we're on a mission to lift families up and create a better future for our kids. But we can't do it without your help.
Winsome is up against a MAJOR deadline, and she needs your urgent support to stay competitive. [I'm asking you to rush a donation of $17, $21, or whatever you can afford to help her cross the finish line.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs5bntgilqqvm84i636uqp9s7735pnb7ak5kgf7g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge1p76cdh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zferom0sgpm82ohrb73hjga8t5gvubk0o6lc4png_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge1p76cdh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqahraqrmo9qglspu7tsrcjbqod5aarhp8emdmgg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge1p76cdh2bs)[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp5hetg0t1k9pqhf5qbq94k3vb8o1ss43luooun8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge1p76cdh2bs)[SUPPORT WINSOME >>

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I'm respectfully asking: Will you contribute $10 to my campaign for Governor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds.
Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I'm respectfully asking: **[Will you split a $10 contribution right now between my campaign and Heartland Patriots, before our next deadline?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96936?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96936?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ)
---
As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 700,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, and Trump himself has started launching attacks, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $10 contribution would help us make sure we can counter all the right-wing disinformation and continue sharing our agenda with voters.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can raise the resources we need this week? Every dollar adds up and allows us to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and other critical investments.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96936?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Abigail Spanberger and Heartland Patriots instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96937?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96936?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ)
---
Thank you so much,
Abigail Spanberger
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96936?refcode=em20251027-9632&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=9632%2E614464%2EbpzXzQ)

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: $430M hit to TN farmers in 2025 — Trump is crushing family farms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Soybean losses alone top $110M. GOP calls it “tough on China.”
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K8K0BS941NFS821T9AMK3ZEK_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K8K0BS941NFS821T9AMK3ZEK_1)
---
| | | | |
---
| Hi Peter, “I want trade, not aid,” said one Tennessee soybean farmer. “I’m paying the tariffs like everybody else. Sending me that money doesn’t fix my problem.”
Tennessee’s family farmers are getting hammered on every front. Republican-backed tariffs, inflation, droughts, and retaliatory trade policies have created what another farmer called “death by a thousand cuts.”
The hard truth:

* $360M in total row crop losses are projected this year (_UT Institute of Agriculture_);
* $110M in soybean losses;
* Tennessee’s agriculture industry has collectively lost an estimated $430 million in 2025 alone, and almost $730 million over the past two years (TN Farm Bureau);
* 40% of 75,000 farms are now at high risk of bankruptcy (USDA).

Republicans call this “tough on China,” but Beijing isn’t paying the price—Tennessee’s families are. At a time when Tennessee is losing 200 acres of farmable land per day (or about 10 acres per hour), Trump and Tennessee Republicans are putting more land and family farms at risk.
**Our Caucus is fighting to deliver real relief for working families—not bailouts. **
**👉 Chip in today to help hold GOP extremists accountable for their failed, harmful policies.**

---
| | [ Donate $36 ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K8K0BS941NFS821T9AMK3ZEK_2)
---
| _* Please check in and support your farming neighbors and loved ones. Farmers have a suicide rate much higher than the general population, with some estimates in the U.S. as high as three times the national average. (NIH) If you or someone you know is thinking about suicide, please call 1-800-273-8255. For more information about services for farmers in Tennessee, please check out this [TSPN brochure](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01K8K0BS941NFS821T9AMK3ZEK_3)._
---
| | | |
---

name: Byron Donalds
subject: We’re Making America Safe Again. We can’t let up now.
body:
I know you’ve been busy, but this can’t wait any longer.
---
| | | | | | | [ ](http://click.info.byron-donalds.com/?qs=75ef02cfd008b37995d046867ce61218fdba5ad441282c3e7f69547da60a648ba880ce43a375cd9145d37688a2268152eb4883e419fd0cb96531126d76a4871a)
---
| | | | | _**THIS IS THE UNITED STATES**_ & if you unlawfully enter our country: 1-You're by definition an illegal alien; 2-You're subject to deportation.

It's Byron Donalds, that seems simple but thanks to Radical Left Democrat policies, laws are being **IGNORED** and innocent lives are being lost in tragedies that never should have happened.

I've seen enough, I'm leading the charge to make our country safe again.

**If you can't speak English ...
If you can't read a road sign...
If your CDL has irregularities...**

...You have _**[NO BUSINESS](http://click.info.byron-donalds.com/?qs=2ae6698e42a8db0a0d431804e81360717b18cef43bdd6a83b1275472d33e25436791245a4325f633e10efe61e32ad0fabf29c8c713f941f6a4e79f56cd9763d9 "NO BUSINESS")**_ driving a truck in this country.

That's why I'm leading the charge on the federal crackdown on illegal alien truckers.

_**[I WILL NOT](http://click.info.byron-donalds.com/?qs=2ae6698e42a8db0a08108b836eecdc9c4ca14348f15588f971492bc0b44057bd5343d5a3d5ec23de8a0044ab2ba026fd43daf9ed34af2475a740b2699a3b69a5 "I WILL NOT")**_ let another life be taken by the hands of an illegal alien trucker.

For some reason, Democrats refuse to abandon their dangerous radical open border policies. They're fundraising millions of dollars from the Radical Left mob, promising to HALT all of the work I'm doing for our country and the MAGA Movement.

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7t2dvqigigujq4e0pa9acljusc0jbc30f39v7vo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zc35ikv5finks1sa8pptfa8q1hr31p6m0d3spe3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcoo0fupjv37ovl9h1la7cpdkd6vf8o4h82sbk40_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fl21g7rslqd5ja5icnp9i9771k50p1dsf55d3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztrcl4eremi7u1apa8rp91ip34f6i6g2nnh5cfn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgcucss5tedoscfhkp15u16h4djofrm7vuv2gpc8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zprrfrv41loas9q7a5bljd2oo1p599cot5mugtcg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znn43530mdgo6e9tg413ao6lg3k4e5e13fs6f6e0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9btjvslvbhe2amvhvl2ng937rcjmrg22pl0r7uo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clge9o74clh2bs)

name: Team Goldman
subject: Stonewall’s legacy is under attack. Dan is fighting back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, New York’s 10th Congressional District is home to the Stonewall Inn, where the Stonewall Uprising took place 55 years ago. A police raid at the Stonewall Inn sparked riots that would become an inflection point in the LGBTQ+ equality movement. Diverse leaders, especially transgender women of color, pioneered this movement to demand civil rights for their community. **That legacy is under attack.** Consistent with the Trump administration’s shameful attacks on the LGBTQ+ community — and especially the trans community — the National Park Service is simply erasing transgender and queer Americans from the Stonewall National Monument. The undeniable history of Stonewall and courageous figures such as Marsha P. Johnson, Sylvia Rivera, and Miss Major Griffin-Gracy are being written out. Donald Trump’s administration is attempting to rewrite the truth. _We will not allow them to succeed._ **Rep. Dan Goldman is demanding the immediate restoration of the full, undeniable history of Stonewall.** **[Dan won’t shy away from standing up for what’s right. Please make a donation to stand with him in the fight against this hateful erasure of history.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118084596/578605439/-2144685249?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2MxNTVkMS00MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sI5LlT32pZz0GHjIjCfnFpRjA1COIJnOqgtTa3hx0P0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118084598/578605442/-2144685249?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2MxNTVkMS00MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sI5LlT32pZz0GHjIjCfnFpRjA1COIJnOqgtTa3hx0P0=)

Donald Trump’s administration is attempting to rewrite the truth. We will not allow them to succeed. Rep. Dan Goldman is demanding the immediate restoration of the full, undeniable history of Stonewall. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Goldman Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: The Democrats
subject: Your donation has a multiplier effect
body:
Here’s how:
---
Derek, We know you’re probably on the receiving end of _loads_ of donation requests from organizations like ours or candidates running for office. If you’ve found yourself wondering how your contribution makes an impact, we’re here to explain. Here’s the situation: **We’re just _eight days away_ from Election Day,** and we’re all in on reaching as many voters as possible before then to make sure they have a plan to vote for Democrats up and down the ballot. If you’ve been on our email list for a while, you probably know **the DNC is investing heavily in key states like Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania** to ensure that Democrats have the resources to protect ballot access in their states and reach undecided voters before they head to the polls. This work is only possible with the support of our grassroots donors. If you’ve been looking for the right time to make your first donation of 2025 to the DNC, it’s now. But here’s the truth: The work we do now doesn’t just impact these states. Right now, on top of the work we’re doing in states like Virginia and New Jersey, we’re investing in every single Democratic state party. We’re laying the groundwork to impact congressional races in 2026 and beyond. **When you donate to the DNC, we are able to invest your contribution strategically, exactly where it’s needed most. We call this the _multiplier effect_.** By donating now, you’re not only helping us expand our organizing program to reach every voter we can before Election Day this year, but you’re helping us build the resources we’ll need to flip the House and the Senate in 2026 and to eventually win back the White House in 2028. [**When you pitch in $7 to the DNC, you’re directly helping power Democrats’ work in states like Virginia and New Jersey this year, as well as across the country in the months and years to come. Can we count on you to make a $7 donation today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251027_5023_fr&refcode2=5023_22930333_WzzFyr&akid=5023%2E22930333%2EWzzFyr) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251027_5023_fr&refcode2=5023_22930333_WzzFyr&akid=5023%2E22930333%2EWzzFyr)**

body:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Berrett Gall from Team Walz.
Governor Walz is standing up for security, opportunity, and freedom for every Minnesotan — and your support makes that possible.
But here’s the truth: we can’t afford to lose momentum now.
That’s why we’ve set an ambitious goal to raise **$50,000 before the end of the month.** Every dollar you give before midnight on Friday will power the organizing, outreach, and digital efforts that keep Tim’s campaign strong and ready to take on MAGA extremism in Minnesota.
**[Will you give $5 to help us close the gap and hit our end-of-month goal?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251027.9MilkX&amount=5&refcode=em20251027-30&t=1&akid=30%2E34582%2EY94DtJ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251027.9MilkX&amount=5&refcode=20251027-30&t=20&akid=30%2E34582%2EY94DtJ)**
Thank you for being part of this team. Let’s finish this month strong.
Berrett Gall
Senior Advisor
Tim Walz for Governor

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251027-30&t=21&refcode2=30_34582_Y94DtJ&akid=30%2E34582%2EY94DtJ)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251027-30&t=22&refcode2=30_34582_Y94DtJ&akid=30%2E34582%2EY94DtJ)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

St. Paul MN 55104

We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more. Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: What I’m seeing breaks my heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=95e4331f96564600a809aaa5e64f7e6c&_e=WqSEIOoYEP1hu0cvcjTcCeSu7D3EjyYNayRadoVYjyaf8jMx9Sd-XBGY2FuTZprNNxKbuHLpll6as_WMvshyczWLClOOnPkNKh3xfcuP3sLlJMZgu-pzueDaWUqlVWd2kQ3cUlgxvwNEdsw7dmem7x2NfqlzIRZLTxjHSBGQo8uuciQfFUtsao9QcKW7wg6VeRhk9AGLsnR6zWaWcWw41zHSR2Z5HLkjDRq0QOkKh4Pq2ohsaKP_oSntE4Vf2KRy154PtMHgTURdfbOP-ExGj_An5LaLJ6KAQIuS3BPHZYAz7zCn2bSus1RKPOWWcViCzfQraYwBS8YSlH8dBR75ablTu-Y8XyYfbRiMM2RLmYf6nTOdlEHvN5qqqL3FNX17dDL8OTgKgeffPRWP3UgQFATR0L6rDVOn8WYxzh6lcxYnFUzt3dPbZJzRFhttuJbioKC2iUV_rLeif1Fy3ooZm_f8xpI6CKTeZqOkZUCnzdFdOyXDUORuBNkNtKi2eZE-RKWuOWOKz1vXjWlErSxn2n4xyeWGfuM8y77GmnsbdFaonWbjw7fLOw-xB3rWDlS7j_kJDOGhoKZJsANmCndxHMUVJUSZufMzs6bfFAbGORIhf0UbPcy0fgcNDns-AN26JVILb68l0cBO5gJzrR_qFwJAo_RJJuCJ5LmgOUfixGPcKKOGoENmzNJBYH9QwTJ7WdJrv9YsszvIHknVJVx9Uohdfma3jV2sbQLe4OsPkAQNPqofv8J4HoPzXC2TdF5DHKqwzO2SucBdPu8Mc7CKNo0Ks4wyiYB9fXQiXX26_6s%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=95e4331f96564600a809aaa5e64f7e6c&_e=WqSEIOoYEP1hu0cvcjTcCeSu7D3EjyYNayRadoVYjyaf8jMx9Sd-XBGY2FuTZprNNxKbuHLpll6as_WMvshyczWLClOOnPkNKh3xfcuP3sLlJMZgu-pzueDaWUqlVWd2kQ3cUlgxvwNEdsw7dmem7x2NfqlzIRZLTxjHSBGQo8uuciQfFUtsao9QcKW7wg6VeRhk9AGLsnR6zWaWcWw41zHSR2Z5HLkjDRq0QOkKh4Pq2ohsaKP_oSntE4Vf2KRy154PtMHgTURdfbOP-ExGj_An5LaLJ6KAQIuS3BPHZYDt7QV-9FElOd78nQCbtE53daMERoT_y_XuguEkGqC-43TGD0UCkuztvdeew3mn20cb1LBqcCm9RSk-vmsKVm9fm7eP99rWYOnagCav3RbjjPRyIjtQwzWwADgbPnRt4K4ceGr7pFOZB8GFCsNQBem1XOBqAh3mSutNhpRhNXr0CFlVYbtmxhTK-A2-HVpKUbH2slv1GOrsWLI3WXwJlG0Ewp-d5PYrdZF1nEu_yIev6vIoGIDRNJY6r0_yBV3TzJorC0TAnoXyrum2Z9t-ynuuH3rAok8tIay4_qPV9QFTxQoxdQzkPdCptzTjj78PrQ8r4NneK5VyPVlrAKliK8xLUNUuuuBTHkcSzosJK3hrnZhzAYiRr7-YlrFPt1XOhEHX9g5T2-HxfNgRlDlYPYGxsSexcdc0yMIdM52tQrSS6aqSPOtkwVwduV3bDramBsixs6U5qW9TBYHTPuiS-3LIUjTxUkP7UlcyAmi-0RF3HU-GhsGddiBoRSnN3iyWcvk%3D)

**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.

_**[Now, I need you to join me.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=95e4331f96564600a809aaa5e64f7e6c&_e=WqSEIOoYEP1hu0cvcjTcCeSu7D3EjyYNayRadoVYjyaf8jMx9Sd-XBGY2FuTZprNNxKbuHLpll6as_WMvshyczWLClOOnPkNKh3xfcuP3sLlJMZgu-pzueDaWUqlVWd2kQ3cUlgxvwNEdsw7dmem7x2NfqlzIRZLTxjHSBGQo8uuciQfFUtsao9QcKW7wg6VeRhk9AGLsnR6zWaWcWw41zHSR2Z5HLkjDRq0QOkKh4Pq2ohsaKP_oSntE4Vf2KRy154PtMHgTURdfbOP-ExGj_An5LaLJ6KAQIuS3BPHZYACq53yNFUrCwF4LyVCP8agZXnWhVF_39idm-hi_RMRYtUPCgOpxsSH5RW7bE17Muwz73nCS_slVY4QHXjJHnSG6Th1GkI1-bV9mEPfcyvXSWAb0Xf2jhSfi_5c4bJ-4p2RBr5ZKGDfMpAONtqhk0C-6LGsx8C68SZ1a3mP1wp5y7NhiHPi_VH1WPt25XSskxtd9AVID8zSOHHCSJL9jeA8sLf2FOWp1f2pQ79ZEomu1sOOMu71U550DwA_HlNa7tPS8t7guYqRamxnGhbQfDrfyMcCQPqAl6bzESpMZm2N23BnWFkP3fUpkH2LJuP3STGxOi1kzhIfZB0-fJ1EzTYhMUzyMZzO61gMSP0XG_2Re30oVx8orwEEYj0wXEwWzz_ZJm1pBm1PvWnR5IqkV3KARm1d-h7tfU9ZQWrYtd0nor-zrXMxbl3c6BrTLCJMW_pQAs9dMYuCTZ4SMPf0GJCyHlMrja68nFHAhzf4bqwVBufWa6w0Q_XPT3lzigB6tq0%3D)**_

clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Fellow Conservative, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: GIFFORDS
subject: NEW STICKER: Gun laws save lives
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
As a victim of political violence, Gabby Giffords knows what can happen if guns fall into the wrong hands. That’s why she has led the fight to pass stronger gun safety laws for the past decade.
But she hasn’t done it alone. Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve rallied lawmakers to act and passed more than 700 commonsense gun safety laws across the country.
But there’s still more to do. From passing universal background checks to closing dangerous loopholes, Gabby won’t stop fighting to hold the gun lobby accountable and build a safer America.
**We’re asking you to join us today:**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q32025-sticker-onetime.eSob1L&refcode=em251027-1-b&t=1&akid=10996%2E3935704%2Ew85uPg)
**[Chip in anything at all — even $1 — and we’ll ship you this “Gun Laws Save Lives” sticker for free. All the proceeds will go towards our work to stop gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q32025-sticker-onetime.eSob1L&refcode=em251027-1-b&t=2&akid=10996%2E3935704%2Ew85uPg)
**[GET YOUR STICKER](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q32025-sticker-onetime.eSob1L&refcode=em251027-1-b&t=3&akid=10996%2E3935704%2Ew85uPg)**
Thank you,
GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=10996%2E3935704%2Ew85uPg) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Send a letter asking Congress to protect federal workers today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Let's be clear, Team: Federal workers didn't cause this shutdown. Federal workers are at their desks, right now, working without pay. Federal workers chose jobs that serve our country. At bare minimum, they deserve to be paid for their time, their commitment, and their role making our democracy work. Their paychecks should never be a political football, all while Congress and the president get paid.
Send your letter right now so that Congress knows the American people support our brave federal workers and demand they all get paid as they deserve when this shutdown is over >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
We can't believe it either, but President Trump announced furloughed federal workers may never get the paychecks they lost during his shutdown. He thinks some “don’t deserve” it. That’s right — the people who inspect our food, care for veterans, and protect our national parks are being told they might never be paid for weeks of missed work. It’s cruel, it’s unprecedented, and it’s wrong.
Congress has the power to fix this right now by passing emergency legislation guaranteeing every furloughed worker full back pay — no exceptions, no excuses. Every previous Congress has made workers whole once the government reopened. But now Trump is breaking that promise — using everyday workers as political pawns.
Experts told ABC News this move is “ punitive and unprecedented .” And they’re right. Families have missed rent, drained savings, and lined up at food banks — all because of political games from a billionaire president who’s never had to worry about a paycheck. We can’t let Trump get away with this attack on working people.
Send a letter today and demand Congress act immediately to pay furloughed workers the paychecks they’ve earned and deserve >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=102725_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Let's be clear, Team: Federal workers didn't cause this shutdown. Federal workers are at their desks, right now, working without pay. Federal workers chose jobs that serve our country. At bare minimum, they deserve to be paid for their time, their commitment, and their role making our democracy work. Their paychecks should never be a political football, all while Congress and the president get paid. Send your letter right now so that Congress knows the American people support our brave federal workers and demand they all get paid as they deserve when this shutdown is over >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [] Folks, We can't believe it either, but President Trump announced furloughed federal workers may never get the paychecks they lost during his shutdown. He thinks some “don’t deserve” it. That’s right — the people who inspect our food, care for veterans, and protect our national parks are being told they might never be paid for weeks of missed work. It’s cruel, it’s unprecedented, and it’s wrong. Congress has the power to fix this right now by passing emergency legislation guaranteeing every furloughed worker full back pay — no exceptions, no excuses. Every previous Congress has made workers whole once the government reopened. But now Trump is breaking that promise — using everyday workers as political pawns. Experts told ABC News this move is “ punitive and unprecedented .” And they’re right. Families have missed rent, drained savings, and lined up at food banks — all because of political games from a billionaire president who’s never had to worry about a paycheck. We can’t let Trump get away with this attack on working people. Send a letter today and demand Congress act immediately to pay furloughed workers the paychecks they’ve earned and deserve >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Voter Action Project [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? name: Nancy Northup
subject: Major wins
body:
Your support is helping protect access to care and advance reproductive freedom nationwide | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118087995/578615883/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088001/578615892/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)
---|---
Peter,

[**We're celebrating two major wins for reproductive freedom—and they wouldn't have been possible without your support.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088005/578615897/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

In **Hawai'i** , Native Hawaiian midwives can once again train and practice without fear of criminal penalties. Thanks to our litigation and tireless advocacy from local leaders, the state repealed harmful restrictions that had threatened traditional birthing practices. [**This victory ensures that pregnant people can choose the skilled, culturally informed care they deserve.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088007/578615898/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) | [**HELP US CELEBRATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088011/578615903/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "HELP US CELEBRATE")
---
And in **Tennessee** , a three-judge panel rejected the state's second attempt to dismiss our challenge to its extreme abortion bans. The court agreed that the state's so-called "fix" to the law still leaves pregnant patients' lives and health at risk—calling it a "circular definition that explains nothing." [**This ruling moves our case forward, reaffirming that these cruel bans violate patients' rights to life and equal treatment under the law.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088014/578615906/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237)

These wins are possible because people like you fight with us. [**Both of these victories—one expanding access to care, the other holding states accountable for endangering it—represents real progress in the fight for reproductive freedom.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088017/578615909/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237) But the work isn’t over. Please, make a gift today to power the next legal battles ahead.
[**SUPPORT THE FIGHT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088018/578615911/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "SUPPORT THE FIGHT")
---
Together, we're building a future where _everyone, everywhere_ can make their own decisions about pregnancy and birth with dignity and care.

Onward,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/118088019/578615912/2141984067?sourceid=1150926&utm_campaign=26emaus-1002aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=wins&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMDM0YWZjMi00NWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fk_oh1NN5h8T2_qcEQ-LMm8_jmQkwSVGW3G6_wGsLvY=&emci=8c472305-0db1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2034afc2-45b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=954237 "DONATE NOW")

name: Defeat MAGA extremism
subject: the sound of silence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
That’s their strategy. A silent coup.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a9sQNl5ijXegOZlkK63dkoJi7Am0UuMsT0A12STXKRBvOiQsE4llwiJSkXOACmqC4lkVRyFrtLPxTQ4UyFaBpB4xZCryb0tvZAZ9ExcA9H7SV0HgdR4CP6ouWutLnLAXnQ3fSz6S2cE_9WM37lgvk5_TAUg-kryDzA_SfZtwrGFNI_FQIb4YyJWjIDfy-PWaG_xwkjUpfx7EWfUDe7YZpTmdrQblUoeMPtR-byljqeI=&c=192Up6x6RwPAj9ZtECzU13ND30RkisBxoNAFH3BQDyRiuy-Ykdf8gw==&ch=v_J-DzB7Ma5eaD3G7CWaD9_Kyu0Wn4QvsvcEHOY2HKQXTbNtBIUpBQ==)
---
| Peter,
MAGA has learned something dangerous: they don't need chaos to take over. They don't need riots, or rallies, or Musk tweeting every five minutes.
This time, they're trying silence.
Here's the plan: pour tens of millions in dark money into Pennsylvania's Supreme Court race, quietly buy three judicial seats, and flip the most important swing state in America without Democrats even noticing.
If they succeed, they'll gerrymander Pennsylvania beyond recognition, impose an extreme abortion ban, and hand Trump the 19 electoral votes he needs for 2028. All without a headline. All without a fight.
That's their strategy. A silent coup.
But here's the truth: silence is only fatal if we let it be. Every dollar you give is a megaphone breaking their silence. Every ad we run, every canvasser we send to a doorstep, every piece of truth we deliver to a voter makes it harder for MAGA to steal this race in the dark.

* $25 = thousands of ad impressions to shatter their disinformation.

* $50 = households reached in battleground counties.

* $100 = canvassers knocking doors where MAGA thinks no one is watching.

This is how we make noise. This is how we fight back. [MAGA is counting on Democrats to stay silent. Can you prove them wrong right now by rushing $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us turn up the volume?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001a9sQNl5ijXegOZlkK63dkoJi7Am0UuMsT0A12STXKRBvOiQsE4llwiJSkXOACmqC4lkVRyFrtLPxTQ4UyFaBpB4xZCryb0tvZAZ9ExcA9H7SV0HgdR4CP6ouWutLnLAXnQ3fSz6S2cE_9WM37lgvk5_TAUg-kryDzA_SfZtwrGFNI_FQIb4YyJWjIDfy-PWaG_xwkjUpfx7EWfUDe7YZpffqAcC4Mza0hdTm9w6hZHQ=&c=192Up6x6RwPAj9ZtECzU13ND30RkisBxoNAFH3BQDyRiuy-Ykdf8gw==&ch=v_J-DzB7Ma5eaD3G7CWaD9_Kyu0Wn4QvsvcEHOY2HKQXTbNtBIUpBQ==)

name: Travis Grantham
subject: I Have Stood With President Trump Since Day 1!

body:
Other candidates say they support President Trump. I have the record!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e5ef1e0791fe/welcome-to-team-grantham-10141283?e=0b767f7f9d)
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=a53a05679c&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | | | | | Friend,Our entire world is going through a constant cycle of crises and resolution, where war can rage in hotspots around the globe while President Trump helps achieve peace agreements in other spots. Our stock market hits record highs while interest rates remain too high, trade wars rage, and our national debt threatens our economic future.In short, these are perilous times and times of great opportunity, provided we have the right leadership. **That is why I am running for Congress.** I'm not looking for a job, I don't need to be adored on social media, and this isn't about satisfying ego or ambition. I'm a combat veteran, successful business owner, and **former state lawmaker with a conservative voting record on key issues that matter, including border security, election integrity, job creation, school choice, protecting life and family, our constitutional rights, and much more.** In a field of candidates who seemed to trip over each other in a race to prove who loves President Trump more, I am still the **only** candidate running who actually **voted for AND endorsed President Trump in his 2016 and 2024 primaries.**
---
| [STAND WITH THE ONLY CANDIDATE WHO STOOD WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=79bbb3cd84&e=0b767f7f9d)
---
| | While other candidates were actively supporting candidates running against Trump, campaigning against Trump, or sitting at home doing nothing at all, my brother and I were hosting the first big Trump airplane hangar rally at our company's hangar!
---
[|
---](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=a6eb490334&e=0b767f7f9d)
| | By the time this election is over, President Trump will have two more years to get as much of his agenda passed as possible. We will need a serious, proven, patriotic, “America First” Congressman who can do the right thing and get started on day one!That's my record, and I invite you to become a bigger part of this campaign by:
* Signing my Ballot Signature Petition
* Donating to our campaign
* Allowing me to use your name as an endorsement
* Displaying our yard sign on your property
* Hosting a meet-and-greet and introducing me to your friends and neighbors.

---
| [VOLUNTEER WITH THE CAMPAIGN](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=9cc2c34170&e=0b767f7f9d)

The primary is rapidly approaching, and I would appreciate your support! We would love to have you on our team as we continue our mission to fight for our country and Arizona!
---
| [DONATE](https://mcshanellc.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a964730c3815d48603a3e5f85&id=b53b472cf4&e=0b767f7f9d)
