# [A new Cold War? - Trump warns Putin about nuclear submarine just off shore after Russia brags about "flying Chernobyl" missile](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177263512&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3MjYzNTEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjE1Nzg1NjIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDE3MDU2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vFs0Z1CzGWOR7QUnAvz-t6EObiNlU2Dmov3OirsD5Eo)
### "I don't think it's an appropriate thing for Putin to be saying..."
| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Oct 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177263512&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3MjYzNTEyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MTU3ODU2MiwiZXhwIjoxNzY0MTcwNTYyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.XspY_aOqkGyeHLD-6oNr4b2aNxKOHmPvGFwTd_IJcCI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177263512&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3MjYzNTEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjE1Nzg1NjIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDE3MDU2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vFs0Z1CzGWOR7QUnAvz-t6EObiNlU2Dmov3OirsD5Eo&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=177263512&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3MjYzNTEyLCJpYXQiOjE3NjE1Nzg1NjIsImV4cCI6MTc2NDE3MDU2MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vFs0Z1CzGWOR7QUnAvz-t6EObiNlU2Dmov3OirsD5Eo)
---
| | [](https://substack..KaWH52RLaq5eUGuDLHM7xjLlY_JcVwBUgxvdV5L-1LQ?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/a-new-cold-war-trump-warns-putin?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Trump **[issued a warning to Vladimir Putin on Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/cf323f83-e880-45d8-a6a4-b48ab30d3571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** aboard Air Force One, stating "They know we have a nuclear submarine, the greatest in the world, right off their shore" after the Russian leader boasted about testing a new "invincible" nuclear-powered missile dubbed a "flying Chernobyl."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cf323f83-e880-45d8-a6a4-b48ab30d3571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Russia tests long-range nuclear missile:** Putin on Sunday hailed an 8,700-mile, 15-hour test flight of Russia's "unique" nuclear-powered Burevestnik cruise missile, which the country claims could strike targets in the United States, prompting Trump's sharp response.
* **Trump demands end to Ukraine war:** The president criticized Putin's missile testing, saying "I don't think it's an appropriate thing for Putin to be saying" and demanded he end the Ukraine war, stating "A war that should have taken one week is now in its, soon, fourth year. That's what he ought to do instead of testing missiles."
* **Zelensky calls for long-range missiles:** Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky praised Trump's latest sanctions on Russia but told Axios that more pressure is needed, warning "if Putin doesn't stop, we need something to stop him" and calling for the U.S. to supply Ukraine with long-range missiles to force Putin to make peace.

* * *
**[Together with DM Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/3c245bda-e19f-4f88-a793-3c03aa3b32bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's crypto czar leaked THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/3c245bda-e19f-4f88-a793-3c03aa3b32bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3c245bda-e19f-4f88-a793-3c03aa3b32bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As you might have seen, Trump appointed the first-ever "Crypto Czar" to his cabinet. And his first move?
Creating a strategic Bitcoin reserve for America.
But here's what the media missed: The executive order specifically mentions "native digital asset markets" as critical infrastructure.
**Translation: The government knows about the hidden market where crypto trades 80% cheaper.**
And they're positioning NOW.
Three things are happening behind closed doors:
1. The treasury is exploring Native Market access for the strategic reserve
2. Wall Street was given "unofficial approval" to access these markets
3. Regulatory framework is coming that could lock out retail forever

The window for regular investors? Maybe 60 days. Maybe less.
Once the government and institutions control native market access, the 100x opportunities disappear. Forever.
**[Watch this video to see how to access the Native Markets (before the door closes)->](https://substack.com/redirect/3c245bda-e19f-4f88-a793-3c03aa3b32bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Tan Gera, CFA
**P.S.** When JD Vance said "crypto will make America rich again"... He wasn't talking about buying Bitcoin on Coinbase. He was talking about THIS.**[Get instant access to the Native Markets training.](https://substack.com/redirect/3c245bda-e19f-4f88-a793-3c03aa3b32bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
# **Fired up Joe Kernen CONFRONTS smug liberal during off-the-rails live interview**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b06a3238-c742-4963-b714-9334c41c9237?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b06a3238-c742-4963-b714-9334c41c9237?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump dismisses 2028 VP run, but keeps door open for other possibilities
President Donald Trump dismissed speculation that he would run bypass the two-term presidential limit by running as Vice President JD Vance's VP in 2028, but kept alive the possibility of another White House bid during remarks to reporters aboard Air Force One Monday.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/84b86eed-828d-46a6-9cd5-01f9d05277d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Trump, 79, rejected the rumored plan to become Vance's running mate in 2028, with Vance and him trading places. Trump called the scheme "too cute," saying voters would dislike such a maneuver despite former adviser **[Steve Bannon](https://substack.com/redirect/25c2972e-0f4a-464c-974c-11ec7a909d1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** previously stating to The Economist that **[Trump will"get a third term."](https://substack.com/redirect/abca0743-8bd7-4149-92ad-c53922bf5b88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* The president floated multiple 2028 scenarios while traveling to Tokyo for diplomatic meetings, suggesting Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio could form a formidable Republican ticket against Democrat leaders like New York Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Texas Rep. Jasmine Crockett. Trump dubbed each woman "a low IQ person."
* Trump, whose **[approval rating stands at 45.1%](https://substack.com/redirect/b076781d-1450-4fac-8d2c-05fe254e98f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** according to polling averages, has repeatedly hinted at running again, claiming **["A lot of people want me to do it"](https://substack.com/redirect/03a0f320-5ca6-437a-a910-d97fd8a1b3ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and distributed **["Trump 2028" campaign hats](https://substack.com/redirect/4275a98c-cb7b-4030-8cb2-b9021c2c880f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at White House events. It still remains unclear what President Trump will attempt when Trump's term ends in 2029, and he will be 82 years old.

* * *
# Trump's week-long Asia tour oversees key peace treaties and tariff negotiations
President Donald Trump's**[five-day Asia tour](https://substack.com/redirect/14355705-db6b-43f9-b1be-c10e10813bc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** moves to key regional allies Japan and South Korea this week, where discussions will center on trade agreements, military cooperation and countering China's regional influence.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14355705-db6b-43f9-b1be-c10e10813bc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* Trump will hold talks with Japan's newly elected Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi in Tokyo before traveling to South Korea for a planned meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping, as the administration seeks to expand semiconductor and critical minerals partnerships with both allies to challenge China's control over global supply chains.
* Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced Sunday that the U.S. and China are nearing an agreement to prevent new 100% tariffs on Chinese goods, crediting Trump's negotiating pressure for creating a framework that could resolve trade tensions between the world's two largest economies while addressing concerns over Beijing's reliance on Iranian and Russian oil.
* The president began his tour in Malaysia with traditional celebrations before facilitating a Cambodia-Thailand ceasefire agreement Sunday that includes the **[release of 18 Cambodian prisoners](https://substack.com/redirect/14355705-db6b-43f9-b1be-c10e10813bc5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and removal of heavy weapons from their shared border, marking another diplomatic achievement as the White House frames the trip as demonstrating Trump's ability to end conflicts and reassert American leadership in the region.
* Trump also told reporters he would be willing to extend his trip for a meeting with North Korea's Kim Jong Un: **["I'd love to meet with him if he'd like to meet."](https://substack.com/redirect/ad5ee4f7-e349-4b0c-8dcc-eaa2d890874b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# **FBI Arrests Man for Alleged $45K Hit on Attorney General Pam Bondi**
Tyler Maxon Avalos, 29, **[was arrested Oct. 16](https://substack.com/redirect/fea2e0b7-c973-46df-a240-b2a44afe3b57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after allegedly posting a $45,000 murder-for-hire bounty on Attorney General Pam Bondi via TikTok, featuring a photo of Bondi with a sniper scope crosshair on her forehead and the caption "WANTED: DEAD OR ALIVE (PREFERABLY DEAD)."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0583bbb6-21ef-412f-8dfb-c36efc8b7d32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* Federal authorities identified Avalos as having anarchist ties after a tipster alerted the FBI to the social media post, which allegedly included the message "When they don't serve us, then what?" His TikTok username "Wacko" contained an apparent anarchy symbol and linked to an anarchist guide.
* Avalos has a lengthy criminal record including convictions for stalking in Minnesota in July 2022 and domestic battery in Florida in 2016, and now faces federal charges for interstate transmission of a threat to injure another person.

body:
That’s their strategy. A silent coup.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019H9Q6Azcz3MSK_UOZu6RK_10Y9MqaVA1UXbIwj0xWZLwB0U3LhpopqIEEQbJmWNuzWFR2sf2SdFwwBUvyq42to_C9NVe4ix5bITquhzih4ijeaYhjeDpcapHJko_FbP799VlKKTmL6mytaXHVC9rCxOU-KBh9oEBfGe60b5DtMbCRsJvIlyX3NrqKyETmirqfGAil8xx_sxAgQ-1Ixn6nmTOA3OrLi_JzR7fuq6DL3o=&c=Slep5v5xbYHYCleWQcljkb1Zz21-5Gtn-tix6WmMe47lnb2FyyWMqw==&ch=R3iYv52Q1aL3PzMu7A_71inE55MORovxDDSRrTQTtG4ocgWmU1_O3Q==)

| Peter,
MAGA has learned something dangerous: they don't need chaos to take over. They don't need riots, or rallies, or Musk tweeting every five minutes.
This time, they're trying silence.
Here's the plan: pour tens of millions in dark money into Pennsylvania's Supreme Court race, quietly buy three judicial seats, and flip the most important swing state in America without Democrats even noticing.
If they succeed, they'll gerrymander Pennsylvania beyond recognition, impose an extreme abortion ban, and hand Trump the 19 electoral votes he needs for 2028. All without a headline. All without a fight.
That's their strategy. A silent coup.
But here's the truth: silence is only fatal if we let it be. Every dollar you give is a megaphone breaking their silence. Every ad we run, every canvasser we send to a doorstep, every piece of truth we deliver to a voter makes it harder for MAGA to steal this race in the dark.

* $25 = thousands of ad impressions to shatter their disinformation.

* $50 = households reached in battleground counties.

* $100 = canvassers knocking doors where MAGA thinks no one is watching.

This is how we make noise. This is how we fight back. [MAGA is counting on Democrats to stay silent. Can you prove them wrong right now by rushing $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us turn up the volume?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019H9Q6Azcz3MSK_UOZu6RK_10Y9MqaVA1UXbIwj0xWZLwB0U3LhpopqIEEQbJmWNuTc1ONWBDA_BOnSe9xVTmoUYN5gh-qMFXgpIE8lDK1tnWscYg6VImbBNWz5KkNJSULruF7PX-UyVXqrwpWL4dNNR6KrNoouXlufsfengkjkqItsx1MHySuygh5JW6RTrR-1SBFRtW9aX9XWzxFL_7U8c9mF_-v9HrqF3ha9Np0GduwoAP-HIrvA==&c=Slep5v5xbYHYCleWQcljkb1Zz21-5Gtn-tix6WmMe47lnb2FyyWMqw==&ch=R3iYv52Q1aL3PzMu7A_71inE55MORovxDDSRrTQTtG4ocgWmU1_O3Q==)

They don't need riots, or rallies, or Musk tweeting every five minutes. This time, they're trying silence. Here's the plan: pour tens of millions in dark money into Pennsylvania's Supreme Court race, quietly buy three judicial seats, and flip the most important swing state in America without Democrats even noticing. If they succeed, they'll gerrymander Pennsylvania beyond recognition, impose an extreme abortion ban, and hand Trump the 19 electoral votes he needs for 2028. All without a headline. All without a fight. That's their strategy. A silent coup. But here's the truth: silence is only fatal if we let it be. Every dollar you give is a megaphone breaking their silence. Every ad we run, every canvasser we send to a doorstep, every piece of truth we deliver to a voter makes it harder for MAGA to steal this race in the dark. $25 = thousands of ad impressions to shatter their disinformation. $50 = households reached in battleground counties. * $100 = canvassers knocking doors where MAGA thinks no one is watching. name: Charlotte Bergmann
subject: Upcoming Republican News and Meeting Invitations
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e3fe7fd37d89/republicanmeetingsmarch-5857798?e=9dd54a4530)
SAVE THE DATE
Veterans Day Gathering
Tuesday, November 11, 2025, 3:00 PM
Perkins Restaurant, 1340 Germantown Parkway

------------------------------------------------------------

** Join us
------------------------------------------------------------
Join fellow Memphians exploring new options for congressional representation in Tennessee’s 9th District. This Veterans Day we’ll gather to celebrate service, share community priorities, and discuss a path forward that puts families and neighborhood progress first.
------------------------------------------------------------

** What to expect
------------------------------------------------------------

* A presentation from Candidate Charlotte Bergmann on her vision for the 9th District, why she aligned with Republican principles long before MAGA, and how those principles can be used to lift ambassadors and their communities.
* A conversation about sustaining the momentum created by the Memphis Safe Task Force work and translating those wins into lasting investments for Memphis.
* Time for questions, community priorities, and discussion of concrete changes Memphians want and deserve.

------------------------------------------------------------

** Become an Ambassador
------------------------------------------------------------
Sign up at the event to become an ambassador — a committed local leader who will help organize neighbors, spread information, and turn community priorities into action. Ambassadors will receive training, materials, and direct support to make measurable improvements for their families and neighborhoods.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Why come
------------------------------------------------------------
A safe Memphis is a successful Memphis. When neighborhoods feel secure, businesses invest, visitors return, and families can envision raising their children here with confidence. Come help shape policies and local action that build public safety, attract jobs and investment, and protect the progress already made by community task forces.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Event details
------------------------------------------------------------

Date: Veterans Day, November 11, 2025
Time: 3:00 PM start
Location: Perkins Restaurant, 1340 Germantown Parkway
------------------------------------------------------------

** RSVP and contact
------------------------------------------------------------
RSVP to cdoty707choose@gmail.com (mailto:cdoty707choose@gmail.com) . Bring friends, neighbors, and anyone invested in building a stronger future for Memphis.

We hate to sound like your elementary school math teacher, but we could clear our $10,000 goal if just 400 supporters chipped in $25 donations before midnight on the 31st.
Or if 1,000 people stepped up and rushed $10!
Or even 2,000 $5 donations...
**[And get this.... of the THOUSANDS of Democrats reading this email right now (including you!), if just a fraction donated $1 to defend OR-06, we wouldn’t just meet our grassroots fundraising goal — we’d blow it completely out of the park. So can we count on you to chip in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118089222/578619785/1477919608?amount=1&refcode=email_102725_breakdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQ1MGMwNS00N2IzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BA4vwpY490f8m86iQQDGz7NjEd2Ap2S3B3J89T9-aNE=)**
In 2022, this was one of the closest congressional races in the country. Andrea won by only _7,210 votes. _
Republicans know how important this seat is, and are continuing to spend MILLIONS to kick Democrats like Andrea out of office.
Next year, we have the power to not only DEFEND Andrea’s seat, but DISMANTLE Republicans' far-right House majority too.
**[But, in order to do so it’s critical we crush every fundraising goal, and compete with Republicans' deep pockets. So what do you say? Please, if you’re with us, pitch in $5 today to help us reach our fundraising goal for the month of October and raise the funds we’ll need to keep OR-06 BLUE, and reclaim Democrat’s House majority 2026 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118089223/578619786/1477919608?amount=5&refcode=email_102725_breakdown&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWQ1MGMwNS00N2IzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BA4vwpY490f8m86iQQDGz7NjEd2Ap2S3B3J89T9-aNE=)**

Friend,
The screams from Democrat headquarters are so loud that we can almost hear them here at House GOP HQ.

[AOC is having a full-blown meltdown. Because House Republicans just unleashed our 13X IMPACT BATTLEPLAN, and it's already DECIMATING them.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zg2f0k6cfqrefd363eji2sevpdtdgo27l2ufdnmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clie8or1c1h2bs)

We've identified the 13 most vulnerable Red-District Democrats -- Democrats who won in districts that voted RED for President last November.
These races are the Left's weakest links, their Achilles heel. And we're not targeting them one by one. [We are hitting them ALL AT ONCE.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdmmbt2vn5jqo00uett5nk337os7fmivugkjc5n0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clie8or1c1h2bs)

This means every single dollar you donate today is not just a donation. It's a political bunker buster. If we succeed, we don't just win a few seats. We OBLITERATE their power base.

[We secure the GOP Trifecta and finally push through the America First agenda without their obstruction. 🇺🇸](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0clt7hkba31blo0rd3uvs6j1o26vl1as5fvh3jo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clie8or1c1h2bs)

If we fail? They will unleash:

❌ OPEN BORDERS & millions of illegal Democrat voters!❌ DESTROY the DOGE reforms!❌ The DEEP STATE rebuilt stronger than EVER before!Friend, their only hope is that you do nothing. They are praying for your silence.

Do not give them that victory.

[Prove them wrong. Deliver the 13X IMPACT that has AOC and Hakeem Jeffries seeing nightmares. >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3g333ndelssf7c0sqrmie9vu8h6ttae1dtt2e00_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clie8or1c1h2bs)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118093378/578632565/800828804?amount=&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251027_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWUzNWIyNi00ZWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RkuktyEVpyK8xkRK8NPjXTKsqjR8b0Pp8N3u0wUfzCI=) Hi there, I've dedicated my service in Congress to ensuring working people in Colorado — and all across the country — are supported by their elected leaders in Washington. Friend, I will always go where the fight is. Because that’s what servant leadership is: to put service and respect above politics and to fight like hell for what’s right. name: Haley Stevens
subject: Workers first, always
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan
body:
Sobering stories from the picket line

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ik8j64rYyG7LRKlANlmG8AtSf7MsEuHOgjn0i1KIlpw?) for more
---
# [Workers first, always](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=177278801&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc3Mjc4ODAxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjE1ODExNzksImV4cCI6MTc2NDE3MzE3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.BLmvv6gqYjf5bUi5aBHcL83bjTPXSS1Ixk4ldpElw8k)
### Sobering stories from the picket line
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Oct 27
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..kRvqq_2yX-28P1D0jgB6vHE4H_RGvYMlQYr-Y6m-ZYo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/workers-first-always?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Just a few days ago, I stood shoulder to shoulder with the Teamsters on the picket line outside Henry Ford Genesys Hospital - standing up for something every worker deserves: fair pay and a safe place to work.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/213ce586-be50-43b4-971c-ed1568691aed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was cold, the wind biting in that Michigan way, but the energy on that line was _electric_. These workers weren't just demanding better conditions for themselves. They were standing up for the dignity of all working people - today, and for generations to come. And I was proud to be with them.
**Because for me, it 's always been workers first. **_**It always will be.**_
That day, I met nurses who've been in the profession for 35 years. I talked to folks just starting out in their careers - young, determined, and passionate about the care they provide. I spoke with retirees who drove up from Warren just to stand in solidarity with their fellow Teamsters.
**Not one person on that picket line was there to get rich. They were out in the cold fighting for something far more basic: the chance to earn a living wage, support themselves, and retire with dignity.**
One conversation has stuck with me in particular. A Teamster retiree told me he gets about $663 a month from his pension, plus some Social Security. His mobile home rent is $700 a month. He picks up work when he can. That conversation hit me hard - because it reminded me of my own dad, who's in his 80s and still works today. He's proud to work. It keeps him young. But the reality is that too many retirees can't afford the basics anymore. Housing costs are through the roof, displacing seniors and stripping lifelong workers of the dignity they've earned.
This is not acceptable.
I was born and raised in Michigan. Our state doesn't just have a strong union tradition - we helped build the American labor movement. From the sit-down strike in Flint to the Battle of the Overpass in Dearborn, Michigan workers have led literal fights for workers' rights in this country.
The 40-hour workweek. Workplace safety protections. Weekends. Overtime pay. The right to organize. None of it was handed to us - workers fought for it, together.
And this is critical: Those wins didn't just help union members - they raised the floor for every worker in America. That's why what happens here in Michigan matters so much to the entire country.
But right now, those rights are under attack.
Donald Trump and his allies want to weaken unions, strip away protections, and divide working people. They want a Senate where billionaires and lobbyists call the shots - not nurses, electricians, auto workers, or teachers.
That's why I'm running for Senate.
Because I know what's at stake.
Because I personally know the folks who will be affected if we let Trump and his pals bust our unions.
Because I've spent my career fighting for Michigan workers. And I'll never stop.
I helped lead President Obama's auto rescue and helped save over 200,000 Michigan jobs. In Congress, I've fought for better wages, safer workplaces, and stronger investments in American manufacturing.
But at the core of it all is this guiding principle: **I am here to help you work.**
To make sure our nurses can do their jobs safely and effectively. To ensure that our retirees don't have to choose between food and rent. To protect the right to organize and build real economic security for every working family.
And let me be clear: There is no strong middle class without strong unions.
Organized labor built this country's middle class. When union power declines, wages stagnate. Inequality rises. Communities get gutted. But it doesn't have to be that way.
We can strengthen the right to organize. We can pass laws that empower workers. We can build a Michigan where every worker - no matter where they live or what they do - has dignity, security, and opportunity.
**That 's the Michigan way. That's our legacy. That's the future I'm fighting for.**
I joined the Teamsters because the right to organize is sacred. Because workers deserve to be heard. Because when labor rights are under attack, we fight back.
_They don 't call me Michigan's pit bull for nothing._
So let's link arms. Let's stand together. Let's fight back, and then - _we 'll win._
If you're with me, chip in to support this campaign for workers and help keep Michigan blue:
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/0c95cbdd-59f3-4c40-906f-c3e3bd1de152?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/006a3aa9-080e-49d7-8706-727772327f6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9b61d398-345f-4a83-b494-58471a8daaeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Michigan.

---

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..-QGrljfqBB19YW0zxXm8yo08st7FVAD1an4fiwW3G74?)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point PAC
subject: Do it for Charlie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Charlie Kirk gave everything for this movement.

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfn23vtpoa2ci8g083afj5vlke64iasiqlrl6kmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clieaoj4c9h2bs)
Friend,

Charlie Kirk gave everything for this movement. He poured his heart, his passion, and his life into the fight for freedom.

Now it’s on us to finish what he started.

It’s on us to build the RED WALL.

If we succeed, we can flip the balance of power in America — not just at the federal level, but at the state and local levels, too.

But if we lose... the Left will lock down these battleground states and tighten its grip on our future.

**That’s why Turning Point PAC is going ALL IN!**

We’re deploying thousands of door knockers, registering new voters, and engaging the grassroots like never before.

But to make that happen, we need to raise $53,000 before the end of this month to keep our door-knocking teams in the field.

[You can help us finish what Charlie Kirk started by donating today! >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9pvb9gedrmt77494h0mh4g3gfralj2nlo2vfo28_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clieaoj4c9h2bs)
[Fight For Charlie](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc9jg34ocasksjn8rbiqcbi4lfq4of8ss5i9665g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clieaoj4c9h2bs)
We’re not fighting just to win in 2026. We’re not even fighting to win in 2028 and beyond.

**Turning Point PAC is fighting to honor Charlie Kirk’s legacy.**

For Charlie — we are going to win his beloved home state of Arizona in 2026.

For Charlie — we are going to save our nation from the radical Left.

For Charlie — we are going to _**build the RED WALL!**_

Winning Arizona is the first step toward building an impenetrable RED WALL that will pave the way to victory for America First candidates across the country in 2026, 2028, and beyond.

Every dollar you give helps a door knocker reach hundreds of voters face-to-face, the way Charlie preferred.

**Friend, help us[ make Charlie Kirk proud](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd2ene7d5bmdicstp3vsnm4rbthfn10q8ddunh3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clieaoj4c9h2bs) by supporting our efforts to Build the RED WALL — first in Arizona, then in Nevada and New Hampshire. Click below to donate today and _join the fight to save America!_**
[Fight for America... Fight for Charlie](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3i4dso339l72l9q2bgdg56l8snc0icogbe6o1l0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clieaoj4c9h2bs)
For Charlie,
**Tyler Bowyer**
Executive Director
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Peter — We're pretty sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and say "Today is the day I am going to split a donation between Jon Ossoff's U.S. Senate campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia!" _(If you did, great! Here’s the link and thank you in advance:_ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd_dpg_em_ossoff_q425](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118094925/578638980/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_102725_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzk5NGQ2NC00ZmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQDToqzrVWda0Wz5J6Dy4WXk0u89VLFKgEWo2N0QAto=)) Otherwise, please give us a second to explain why we’re asking you to chip in and why particularly right now. Jon won his last election by building the largest on-the-ground movement that Georgia had ever seen. Doing it again — and going _even bigger_ — is not going to be easy. It is going to take sustained effort from now through Election Day. And we have to get to work right away. Unfortunately, a lot of people think maybe it's too early to give. Or they'll wait until later. We get that. But the truth is _early money to a campaign is more important than a donation at any other time._ Your donation now will help us build the strong foundation we need to win, and ensure we’re ready for anything that comes our way on this campaign, from Donald Trump, our MAGA opponents, or anyone else. **So what do you say?** [Can Jon count on you to chip in $10, or any amount to his campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today? We’ve got a tough road ahead of us, and every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118094935/578638982/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_102725_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzk5NGQ2NC00ZmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lQDToqzrVWda0Wz5J6Dy4WXk0u89VLFKgEWo2N0QAto=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to Senator Jon Ossoff and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My take on the Senate special elections. -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, DSCC Vice Chair Mark Kelly here. I want to talk to you about a _key_ opportunity in front of us as we fight for the Senate majority: **special elections.**

I know a thing or two about these kinds of races, because I got to the Senate by _winning_ a special election back in 2020 — even as Republicans spent over $70 million to stop me. **And my victory proved mission-critical, because without it, Democrats wouldn't have had a Senate majority.**

[**Now, history could repeat itself. Two special elections coming up in Ohio and Florida are among a small handful of races that could decide the majority — again. So I'm coming to ask you, will you donate $5 to win races like those and take back the Senate? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21582%2E9716520%2Ew8EHih)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21582%2E9716520%2Ew8EHih)
---

I want to be clear, team: **These special elections give us an opportunity we would have waited YEARS for without them, and they make a BIG difference.**

In fact, during Donald Trump's first term, Democrats flipped **_three_** Senate seats in special elections, including mine, my good friend Raphael Warnock's, and even a seat in dark-red Alabama. Each time, we defeated Trump-endorsed candidates who would have been guaranteed votes for his destructive agenda, and instead we elected Democrats who fought for hardworking Americans.

**Now, we're facing the same task again — but it won't be easy.** Trump is reportedly "obsessed" with the midterms, National Republicans will spend big-time to keep their majority, and just like when I first won, Democrats only need to flip a handful of seats to take back the Senate.

**Take it from someone who's been in this position before: We'll need your help to make the most of this opportunity — and that's why I'm reaching out.**

**[As a DSCC Vice Chair, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Democrats win in states like Ohio and Florida and take back the Senate? We have a real opportunity to topple Trump's majority, and we can't let it slip away >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21582%2E9716520%2Ew8EHih)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=10&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21582%2E9716520%2Ew8EHih)

Vice Chair, DSCC

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=15&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21582%2E9716520%2Ew8EHih)

Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is a senator from Arizona and a Vice Chair of the DSCC. He's fighting to lower costs for Arizonans, hold Trump accountable, and create good-paying jobs.

**[Will you answer Mark Kelly's call to fight back against National Republicans by flipping the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251027-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=21582%2E9716520%2Ew8EHih)**

name: Baldwin HQ
subject: The need for real leadership has never been more obvious.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This important work takes long-term, sustained support.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5072%2E35263%2EbCl7S9)
Peter, The government shutdown drags on, and Republicans are still refusing to come to the table to negotiate a way to defend Americans’ healthcare. Meanwhile, Trump is pushing for drastic cuts to education, social security and more. **The need for real leadership has never been more obvious.** That's why Tammy is fighting to help flip the Senate blue and support her Democratic colleagues across the Senate map. But that important work takes long-term, sustained support — so we have a big ask for you: **[Will you make a monthly recurring donation to help Tammy Baldwin and Democrats flip the Senate? Knowing we can count on a certain level of support each month is hugely helpful.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-oct25.B7SrAH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5072%2E35263%2EbCl7S9)** | | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-oct25.B7SrAH&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=5072%2E35263%2EbCl7S9)
---
We know the majority of Americans support extending the ACA tax credits, and oppose cuts to education and the social safety programs so many families depend on.
Trump and Republicans in Congress simply do not represent what most Americans want. The only way forward is to invest in electing leaders who actually represent us — and that means flipping the Senate blue.
Thank you,
Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=5072%2E35263%2EbCl7S9) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=5072%2E35263%2EbCl7S9)**

subject: My decision

body:
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96940?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU)
Peter —
I know you get a lot of emails from me. But I want to take a few minutes to tell you about my decision to run for governor, and why your support is so critical to our success.
**I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.** This country gave my family so much, and it’s always been obvious to me that I wanted to dedicate my life to public service.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an Outreach and Reentry Coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
**Peter, it’s why I first decided to run for office.**
In 2017, I watched Donald Trump attack every value that I had spent my life fighting for. And as I thought about it, I realized I couldn’t ask someone to do my fighting for me – that if I wanted to defend the country I love then I had to run toward the crisis.
It was a long shot to run as a nobody in a district that had been held by an entrenched Republican for more than two decades.
**But I knew what was at stake and I knew what I had to do.**
I’m proud of the work I’ve done in Congress — work that earned me the distinction of being named the most effective member of the New Jersey House delegation in just my second term.
**But I know I can do more as your governor. And that’s why I decided to run.**
By winning this seat, we reduce mortgage and rental costs, crack down on shady middlemen making prescription medications more expensive, and bring down utility costs by bringing more clean, cheap power like solar onto the grid.
But the truth is that this is already the most expensive New Jersey gubernatorial race on record. And my opponent is benefiting not only from Donald Trump's personal endorsement — but from the support of Trump's entire network of deep-pocketed, right-wing allies. So I am asking:
**[Will you consider splitting $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to help power us to victory?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96940?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96941?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96941?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96941?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96941?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96941?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96941?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96940?refcode=em20251027-9633&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU)
---
Thank you,
Mikie

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=10&akid=9633%2E614464%2ElaxDhU).

name: Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
subject: Petition to President Trump enclosed
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e10918824/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZlBWY3BhS3dENw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEwMjc/LbmNsZXpCU3lhRQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbHJTRzlRQ2xLcGdscw/gaP-cNw/scsc71c11a7)
|
---
| | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-cNw/s9q49b25008)
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m writing to you today to ask for your help to undo a horrible injustice perpetrated on four innocent police officers by President Obama and his administration. Their names are Jason Zullo, John Miller, David Cari, and Dennis Spaulding. They’re known as the “East Haven Four.” As you’ll see in the enclosed report, all four men were highly respected, highly decorated police officers. **[And your petition to President Trump is their only hope of clearing their names and ending the decade-long nightmare they – and their families – have been trapped in.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-cNw/s9q49b25008)** Let me explain. Before they became the target of a political witch hunt, Officers Zullo, Miller, Cari, and Spaulding were police officers in East Haven, Connecticut. For generations, the town had been a small, close-knit community where everyone knows their neighbors – the perfect safe place to raise a family. But after Obama was elected and he threw open our borders, illegal immigrants from Ecuador started flooding into East Haven. And as the town rapidly changed... ...the four officers discovered something huge: **Thousands of these illegal immigrants were using fraudulent documents to obtain license plates, fake car insurance cards, and even fake driver’s licenses.** The East Haven Four went to work, making hundreds of arrests. Every single person arrested for their involvement in this crime ring was an illegal immigrant – including dozens of suspects with rap sheets a mile long. Then Obama’s Department of Justice showed up. Instead of thanking these four officers for their hard work in breaking up this crime ring and getting dangerous criminals off the streets... ...the Obama DOJ accused them of racism and launched a politicized witch hunt, charging all four men with federal felonies for doing their jobs. Not only that – they launched a vicious smear campaign in the media, painting the officers as hateful monsters, just for doing their jobs. They even flew deported illegal immigrants back into the country to testify against the officers. My friend, this wasn’t just blatant lawfare... It was a message from Obama and his DOJ cronies to every other police department in the country: **“Give illegal immigrants special treatment, or you’re next.”** Because of Obama’s DOJ, all four officers went to prison. And even though the men are now all free, it’s been nearly impossible for them to rebuild their lives or provide for their families. Dave Cari was homeless for four months after he was released and wound up working at Home Depot for minimum wage. After months of unemployment, Jason Zullo was offered a job working as a janitor. But right before his first day, he got a letter withdrawing the job offer – with a copy of one of the news articles calling him a racist attached. And all these years later, the unjust felony convictions still make life difficult. They can’t coach their kids’ hockey or softball teams because they can’t pass a background check... They can’t travel with their families out of the country... And they’ll live every day knowing they’ll never get the time back they lost with their wives and kids – the missed wedding anniversaries, graduations, t-ball games, and babies’ first steps. My friend, you and I can’t help these four men recover that lost time. ...but we can help them clear their names and get the justice they deserve. That’s why your **Pardon Petition to President Trump** is so important. **[My friend, will you take a minute right now to sign your petition and then rush it back to me?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-cNw/s9q49b25008)** I’m hoping to deliver your petition to President Trump as soon as possible. Because as a former Deputy Police Commissioner, it makes my blood boil that four innocent officers with perfect records had their lives destroyed... ...while illegal immigrants who had the audacity to unlawfully enter our country and then break our laws walk away with zero consequences. But as you know, that’s the upside-down world we live in today. And that’s why the work we do at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF, is so important. My friend, if you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know we help get innocent officers like the East Haven Four get the legal defense they need to fight back against radical, anti-cop prosecutors. With the support of patriots like you, over the past 30 years we’ve helped dozens of officers stay out of prison and clear their names. Now it’s time to clear the East Haven Four’s names too. These men and their families have suffered long enough. And now that there’s a pro-police president in the White House, we finally have the chance to get these men and their families the long-overdue justice they deserve. So please, my friend, don’t let the East Haven Four suffer any longer. **[Sign your Pardon Petition to President Trump right away.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-cNw/s9q49b25008)** And when you send it back to me... ...would you also give a tax-deductible gift of $35 to LELDF? Your gift of $35 will help send out and collect hundreds of these Pardon Petitions from people like you who still “Back the Blue.” And if you’re able to send a special gift today of $50, $100, $250, $500 – or even $1,000, $2,500, or $5,000 – your gift will go even further in helping fuel this Petition Campaign and all our other efforts to defend innocent police officers from the radical anti-cop Left. But whatever you can afford to give, my friend... **[...please rush back your tax-deductible gift and your signed Pardon Petition to President Trump right away.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-cNw/s9q49b25008)** Thank you for taking the time to read this email today. Thank you for being one of the few Americans left who still supports our law enforcement. And thank you in advance for helping these four men and their families – and helping undo this injustice from the Obama Administration. I’ll be looking for your signed petition soon.
---
| | Sincerely,
---

---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---

And for more than 10 years now, these officers and their families have been suffering. It’s time to end this injustice and clear these officers’ names once and for all. **[Please sign your Pardon Petition to President Trump and rush it back to me right away.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.-cNw/s9q49b25008)** And don’t forget to include your tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to help fuel this pardon petition campaign.

clean_body: | | | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom. | | Dear Fellow Patriot, I’m writing to you today to ask for your help to undo a horrible injustice perpetrated on four innocent police officers by President Obama and his administration. Their names are Jason Zullo, John Miller, David Cari, and Dennis Spaulding. They’re known as the “East Haven Four.” As you’ll see in the enclosed report, all four men were highly respected, highly decorated police officers. Let me explain. Before they became the target of a political witch hunt, Officers Zullo, Miller, Cari, and Spaulding were police officers in East Haven, Connecticut. For generations, the town had been a small, close-knit community where everyone knows their neighbors – the perfect safe place to raise a family. But after Obama was elected and he threw open our borders, illegal immigrants from Ecuador started flooding into East Haven. And as the town rapidly changed... ...the four officers discovered something huge: Thousands of these illegal immigrants were using fraudulent documents to obtain license plates, fake car insurance cards, and even fake driver’s licenses. The East Haven Four went to work, making hundreds of arrests. Every single person arrested for their involvement in this crime ring was an illegal immigrant – including dozens of suspects with rap sheets a mile long. Then Obama’s Department of Justice showed up. Instead of thanking these four officers for their hard work in breaking up this crime ring and getting dangerous criminals off the streets... ...the Obama DOJ accused them of racism and launched a politicized witch hunt, charging all four men with federal felonies for doing their jobs. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. name: Team KTR Communications
subject: House Majority Leader Michael Carbone Endorses Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA
body:
Growing coalition of leaders are backing Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/karrinforarizona/carbone-endorsement?e=ebfb0fda52)
---
[|
---](https://karrinforarizona.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=473c144f5f100c2eff990c077&id=9d9ae5f4c7&e=ebfb0fda52)
| | | | | |
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** October 27th, 2025
**House Majority Leader Michael Carbone Endorses Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor** _Growing coalition of leaders are backing Karrin Taylor Robson for Governor_
**PHOENIX, AZ** — Karrin Taylor Robson, Trump-endorsed conservative business executive running for Governor of Arizona, today announced an endorsement from Arizona House Majority Leader Michael Carbone.
“Karrin Taylor Robson is the proven leader Arizona needs in the Governor’s Office. As a business executive, she understands how to cut red tape, create good-paying jobs, and strengthen our economy without expanding government. Karrin will work closely with the Legislature to keep our border secure, support law enforcement, and put Arizona families first. I’m proud to join President Trump in endorsing her campaign for Governor.” **— Michael Carbone, Arizona House Majority Leader**
“Katie Hobbs has failed Arizona. With President Trump’s endorsement and the support of leaders like Majority Leader Carbone, we will Make Arizona Strong Again,” said **Karrin Taylor Robson, Trump-endorsed candidate for Governor.** “I’ve spent my career cutting through bureaucracy, building teams, and delivering real results. As Governor, I’ll work shoulder-to-shoulder with the Legislature to lower costs for families, grow good-paying jobs, and fix our schools.”
Karrin Taylor Robson’s campaign continues to build a broad, America-first coalition that spans national, state, and local leaders, as well as law enforcement and military supporters:

* **National Endorsements:** President Donald J. Trump, Governor Sarah Huckabee Sanders, Senator Pete Ricketts, Speaker Newt Gingrich, and Rob Schneider
* **State Leaders:** Senator Tim Dunn, Senator Janae Shamp, Representative Walt Blackman, Representative Selina Bliss, Representative David Livingston, Representative Teresa Martinez, Representative Justin Wilmeth
* **Local Officials:** Mayor Stephanie Irwin (Pinetop-Lakeside), Mayor Doug Nicholls (Yuma), Mayor Eric Orsborn (Buckeye), Mayor Julia Wheatley (Queen Creek), Mayor Chip Wilson (Apache Junction)
* **Law Enforcement & Military: **Combined Law Enforcement Association of Arizona, Tucson Police Officers Association, Nogales Police Officers Association; Gen. Michael T. Moseley (USAF, Ret.), Gen. Robin Rand (USAF, Ret.), Lt. Gen. Richard Newton (USAF, Ret.), Lt. Gen. John Regni (USAF, Ret.), Maj. Gen. A. Bowen Ballard (USAF, Ret.), Lt. Col. Rusty Mitchell (USAF, Ret.)

---
|
---
| |
**About Karrin Taylor Robson** Karrin Taylor Robson is a lifelong conservative, business leader, and mother running for Governor of Arizona with President Trump’s endorsement.
Just like President Trump, Karrin is not a politician; she is a self-made business executive who has built one of the state’s leading land-use and economic development firms. Her work has helped bring jobs, opportunity, and growth to Arizona while cutting through bureaucracy and fighting government overreach. She’s also served on key military and education boards that impact Arizona families every day, including for more than 20 years on the Air Force Chief of Staff’s Civic Leaders Group.
A proud wife, mother of four, and grandmother, Karrin is running for Governor to keep our communities safe, fix, root out waste, fraud, and abuse in Arizona, and she will always have President Trump's back.
---
|
---
| | PAID FOR BY KARRIN FOR ARIZONA. AUTHORIZED BY KARRIN TAYLOR ROBSON.
---

| | I've spent the past few weeks traveling across New Jersey, and everywhere I go, I see the same thing: people fired up to get Democrats across the finish line. We've been launching canvasses, phone banks, and community events to make sure every voter knows what's at stake in this election. subject: If we lose in 8 days, there won’t be a Pennsylvania

MAGA seizing this critical court means they remake Pennsylvania in their twisted image.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HEgUyN2OZ3kBJisu7jV9I-GuNVCvjqYlxdE-1_UvcvD0X9htB2C9KiOUZKCiXwhX0_omzzVIJ7_1YEuJFgfsH55V4oqFA3VNiGOctVqHWsNQxrPDebc6aKWnp7pbXC98bHUq5R462ExP_Ebxwuy4_4RinhXnZOtXAhyK97hjiwv5xni9ZmrqT40SucoXyCwNZAAyFS9cyNW_R6UINOXo802EPQJlghpFal7jgQbVnDv8kth1RS2Xgg==&c=l98gf6_qcCwxFt2n8HaUzDkDRWnglpy3uxx4OnI8xMaOKpZvkUF4FA==&ch=6rdSiFYWvbn81sWsdK81kSsUoe1-WLlZMfJJnldlLk8dYGEd9g4Cdg==)

| Peter,
In 8 days the most important election of 2025 will take place: The Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election.
The stakes couldn't be higher, if Democrats lose (which is still a very real possibility) the Pennsylvania we once knew will cease to exist.
MAGA seizing this critical court means they remake Pennsylvania in their twisted image. They can enact an extreme abortion ban, gerrymander the PA congressional map blood red, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Democrats never win this critical swing state again.

| The GOP has flooded this race with tens of millions in ad spending aimed at deceiving Democratic and Independent voters into supporting their cause. Polling is showing that this disinformation strategy is working and a majority of voters are confused.
If the election were held today, there is a very real chance that we would lose it.
Defend our Courts is leading the defense of this court but we are outnumbered and outgunned. We have 8 days until election day to salvage this race and pull out a Democratic win.
[Please, will you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us buy more ads and redouble our efforts to save this critical court. name: Wes Moore
subject: Donald Trump is picking and choosing states to redraw their maps.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=829%2E1086043%2E-6olBY)
A lot of people have been asking me about redistricting, Peter.
But I need to be clear: The reason we’re even having this conversation in the first place is because **Donald Trump is picking and choosing states to redraw their maps.**
**His allies know they have nothing to run on in the midterm elections.** Prices are higher, unemployment is up, and people feel less safe in their communities.
Since they know they can’t win on their record, they’re changing the rules. They want to rig the game.
**If other states are having a conversation about “fair maps,” so will Maryland.**
**[If you’re with me in fighting back against these political games, I would appreciate it if you chipped in to power our campaign today. Here’s a link:](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251027-1.kGr6CC&refcode=em-20251027-1&t=4&akid=829%2E1086043%2E-6olBY)**

Thanks for standing with us, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Tim Walz’s shadow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e6d60820d52743b7885947a8ea040122&_e=iDRb94X0yBcVG-yF9kukJb5ZEzWE7LKFoWGfOaFh7_A5F9BMqiXc8D3GuI9s410ISJ8M9f-rB0axC0760FiF2nJc7E_emQkSD6x8SBmSuGuRgWpC_IOLIsXQ1V5RgHFOrPMS4yY4a5c0rGQ5XweKiHyjxngDlo1RIGNPR9aUYTHiLMX-b7h_of3bckq4f1mERFODoHnvUc-HEVf5JCMOUQze90fNh0IZI38EIAqIGbi2tWCfQqXvEQy3hgYxqvDn4LExwIPio8ZH6xM9aHLr_8jhh65z4dqycuKr3IQk2rkgNWhYoLcN5HJBozxo3Tzl8Qt01WAcEljn9zPf7Vb6wemVtKDL8B2nyxIImwD-jxjgK5OuT_MdsCDw76UE_L5oIpJyt2XH6JCOM83CIv-E8_HrNV85lQpEeKQXXSkoINtBYj_iQdfeBHwPaYEdhfidbSFKbUKbOen0-PBGQTlEex7YWreG3huGAiUB4SS7q6IaWB1A-UK-kFsiTkL60PNB5OfcL2vfNoCy4Rv8oXX0ucpV02I4IXRkCMz8DWlyS5k0UiiX9t3HhrdRNSuCqj2QCfn00jHawp-LSKmudMEgR77q69eiVeW7AVih1hNesXVYITNKgqFq4apg_grmKrv3z8bjP4CyIUovleWvoK6KMbhZaIN2HK2lWHadWkW9R1iFPEFBdvqI8wO5kqhkw1tAvNjQEKYdv6KJ7nRwEOSOfSUK5AroXxTSOKQCatIDWwJL5eGiq6ImxxvWldqU-E3txll97sJOkyjue-Rh5nBfOw4wvUP-0TVzL8_FLGvaHng%3D)

---
Peter,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.
