clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Peter, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: | DEVELOPING → "Hegseth Announces New Pentagon Press Corps Full of Right-Wing Grifters" | Here are just a few of the reasons Pete Hegseth is dangerous and ill-fit for his job as the leader of our military: ❌ His past is riddled with problematic encounters with women ❌❌ His last job was singing Trump's praises and spreading falsehoods on Fox News ❌❌❌ He leaked top-secret war plans to a journalist. AND NOW??? He's forcing journalists to abide by an unrealistic and undemocratic pledge if they want to report from the Pentagon... It's so extreme, even Fox News refused to sign it! He's disturbing the freedom of the press, and Donald Trump is supporting him. It doesn't matter if you're a Democrat, Republican, or Independent – you deserve to have free press that isn't filtered by government employees like Pete Hegseth. body:
| | | **I’m Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: a mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant running to defeat a MAGA Republican in the Virginia House of Delegates.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6HF4v65VHENXKXmwg_p7czKIzzzNXAU7jyr3brZu4P0Mbg-EH3ZSPAn0nGbOxffqbjUOddRkQ-UVUJ-2eKnRUbi1HQOat5d4X6d4JlEzCcIAgLWe5HYogPr0im6t9ubLN76rb1c5p7fIL9VXvaVE57R_rVWh5SgtfAgWb3XI5r-HiAu74KiQ3dW_Nx_wvfmdbMzxFMil3LvSjq8wEP3RBWndy7vx0LaeRtg09tgJOKaW0Zq0mtWxQEiCV-s6Z3tuRMupkdOUA1AJ8bp_IQ5q8I8/4l3/33XPJYYxTKCcLBMrxXYUeA/h0/h001.n2U0F-ceDzEKz8KNf3TSFECeJelgUEY8R9KEoz9Sii4)
[Election Day is just 8 days from today, and it’s our next chance to deliver MAGA a big defeat. Over 10,000 donations are powering our grassroots campaign, and ALL EYES are on Virginia ... donate to GET OUT THE VOTE!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviHNL1BmnLGk2qMbfShZuXKgHQFF53tTknAYB-QM_YZMDFRiBgHe-8HH1jOaGAvo26aSmHTGGsmrCgyq6KGlLWGp7Bsulpw4-y7UeU3EigBBWR_k3y1tw1VLKVKYZnGzO1HCS1F0syklUP-jTwwCpGRhqP3gWeSskhXEB-bjCF4fQwBZ693L4RMFbDWSoMw8gWe1E785DXbpX4W-93vEPFs3JLDxsnijHJMBsOHIpMc6i3qknBXncJow-n3vbxSdJBq-uZ1hxXIjChuc8C7y-NJY/4l3/33XPJYYxTKCcLBMrxXYUeA/h1/h001.qD24QWBxR6GjNR1zgMteTDm_ocuhCxSAt4O7qdlNB-w)**
* * *
Friend, we’re 8 days out from Virginia’s elections ... _so allow me to reintroduce myself._ I’m Elizabeth Guzman, running in a toss-up, red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates. I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us. **After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let anyone tell my children that they didn’t belong here.** I unseated an entrenched Republican incumbent, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history. I sponsored and co-sponsored laws that raised the minimum wage, gave teachers and firefighters the right to unionize, and kept abortion safe and legal in Virginia. **** Donald Trump lost this district by just one point, making it one of the most hotly-contested red to blue opportunities nationwide.
**Koch-linked dark money groups and national Republicans are spending BIG to stop us.**
****[**We’re running big digital, television, mail, and field campaigns to WIN, but it’s only possible if we _massively increase_ our fundraising in these final 8 days. Please, pitch in $100, $50, $10, or whatever you can.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqdxB9B_-Pj2UssOlSG4Io0evX2PNn_AWmY41uED1Qod-cHbX4srZhtLXhbV-RGgdnixFBOAMuj9hwIp6TxYRwlomPwIA-Owu6zRpLNd8NbUSSqYeuOtBU6SHCXLe_mVpfjj-H_7J3gTbX7el-yTqapK_0p9OTjuN5ohtS651Sh9QBFBLVs8PmwmQAd_hVRgbqDE9a-d35h6pTwq4822ak62VdUsD0tJsmWvASxNfUNae1qasELfHM11oaq_t2d7RN-8X3yDyb_glZyAHfmpOXPyskI4YhdZukxAn-PT8i84pCXYsg8PSTlMx4KzcJFQzM5rRzgClGv80rbqKzRh-gTo/4l3/33XPJYYxTKCcLBMrxXYUeA/h2/h001.7QNkAQZ3miTZObdUZEt5uy2KlJiqjTC5CcD9yywKjfw) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | I’m Donald Trump’s worst nightmare: a mom, social worker, and proud Latina immigrant running to defeat a MAGA Republican in the Virginia House of Delegates. Friend, we’re 8 days out from Virginia’s elections ... so allow me to reintroduce myself. I’m Elizabeth Guzman, running in a toss-up, red-to-blue race for the Virginia House of Delegates. I immigrated from Peru with $300 in my pocket, working three minimum-wage jobs at the same time as I finished my education, becoming a social worker and union leader. But when Donald Trump was elected President in 2017, my young American-born son asked me whether we should go back to Peru after Trump and MAGA Republicans disparaged Latinos like us. After all our hard work achieving the American dream, I wasn’t going to let anyone tell my children that they didn’t belong here. I unseated an entrenched Republican incumbent, becoming the first Latina immigrant elected to the Virginia House of Delegates in its 400-year history. I sponsored and co-sponsored laws that raised the minimum wage, gave teachers and firefighters the right to unionize, and kept abortion safe and legal in Virginia. Donald Trump lost this district by just one point, making it one of the most hotly-contested red to blue opportunities nationwide. Koch-linked dark money groups and national Republicans are spending BIG to stop us. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .

name: Team Lizzie
subject: Election Day Reminders [UPDATED]
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
With Election Day just around the corner, we want to share a few important updates and reminders to help you make your plan to vote and support our Democratic candidates up and down the ballot.
🗳 Texas Early Voting Ends Friday (10/31)
If you haven’t voted yet, don’t wait! Early voting in Texas ends this Friday, October 31. Make your plan today and bring a friend—every vote makes a difference. Remember, all Texans will have constitutional amendments on their ballots this year, so it’s important to show up and make your voice heard.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027]
* Harris County Early Vote Centers [https://www.harrisvotes.com/Vote-Centers]
* Fort Bend Early Vote Polling Locations [https://www.fortbendcountytx.gov/government/departments/elections-voter-registration/early-voting-schedulepolling-locations-nov-4]
Find all the voter information you need here: Texas Secretary of State – Elections Division [https://www.sos.state.tx.us/elections/index.shtml]
🤝 CD18 Special Election + Christian Menefee for Congress (TX-18)
People in the 18th Congressional District of Texas have been waiting far too long for this special election day. Lizzie endorsed Christian Menefee , the youngest and first Black County Attorney in Harris County, the day he launched his campaign this spring. Lizzie and Christian have worked together for years and share a simple belief: Houston deserves leaders who show up, stand up, and deliver. And, not surprisingly, Christian is an original member of #TeamLizzie, knocking on doors with us to elect Lizzie in her very first primary in 2018.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027]
🇺🇸 Big Races Across the Country
Democrats are fighting hard in key states like California, Virginia, and New Jersey, where every seat and every vote matters.
* In California , Lizzie encourages voters to support Proposition 50 , an important measure to defend fair representation and fight back against mid-decade redistricting efforts like those happening in Texas. Thanks to all our #TeamLizzie volunteers who participated in our phonebank for Prop 50!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027]
* In Virginia and New Jersey , competitive races for governor could shape the national landscape going into 2026—so we’re doing everything we can to help Democrat Abigail Spanberger flip VA blue and to make sure Democrat Mikie Sherrill keeps NJ blue. Thanks to all our #TeamLizzie volunteers who participated in our phonebank for Abigail Spanberger!
REMINDER: Join Team Lizzie for a virtual phonebank THIS WEDNESDAY, October 29, at 4 P.M. CT
https://www.mobilize.us/njvictory2025/event/862476/ [https://www.mobilize.us/njvictory2025/event/862476/]
SIGN UP HERE [https://www.mobilize.us/njvictory2025/event/862476/]
Let’s finish strong. Together, we can make sure every voter has their voice heard and every ballot is cast.
Thank you for being part of this team—and for everything you do to move our communities forward.
Team Lizzie

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027]

VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Ln8e8kjn2Euuh3daVlmozQ2]

P.S. Can’t volunteer right now? You can still make a difference:
* Forward this email to friends who may need voting info or who might be able to volunteer—this phonebank is virtual and can be done from anywhere.
* Make a financial contribution [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folfe251027?refcode=folfe251027] to our campaign—it is an investment in organizing in 2025 and winning in 2026, in Texas and across the country.
3262 Westheimer, PMB 636, Houston, TX 77098
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Don't want to receive these emails anymore? unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yiT4vmtXrUCBvy-D5k60rg2?unsubscribedata=eCNmWG1G0tI4%2BurYs5ENt0z0PAsgVLEX43JTX7tlF%2BhhTXIz7tEx46z6ZED4%2BmHF0eHrbxnOE%2BPwXNxz7BCaNd9%2Fivqz%2Fp7ibi9%2BZHscd5znOc4mEzyhoe4cNn3oQjrCb%2FueAyS3i4%2Bo1md003GII2GGLKGaDvzLuxHLA%2Bat2KnE5MOSsUYJPj5MgwvnDN%2Fe3%2FePdkJBZ9DYAKXncHw9yEewbFn0FQtv7MXy51I2EyqY9Par8KVynd1CAIC%2B5QuouXDeFvKhyWiG%2F9zaScMK2HGldvpGCMNMUZ9i6Yn1JHGs2zxKnYW57kmdtjK2RvMje%2FFf0QDHbbxT7%2BqOdPWZVPrdgEO9I0gna0YOo7qP3ZR6St5c2Mvi0Bhaiutb4WHoKNKaft9ZGP9rY0VcQIDlY5hAr2t%2FAODuXZqfnLmB%2F2ba2uRIRkH45aI%2Ba0AKEgrX www.lizziefletcher.com [https://lizziefletcher.com/]

body:

| Peter,
In 8 days the most important election of 2025 will take place: The Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election.
The stakes couldn't be higher, if Democrats lose (which is still a very real possibility) the Pennsylvania we once knew will cease to exist.
MAGA seizing this critical court means they remake Pennsylvania in their twisted image. They can enact an extreme abortion ban, gerrymander the PA congressional map blood red, and rig the 2026 and 2028 elections to ensure Democrats never win this critical swing state again.

**Gallup: Democrats Regain Advantage in Party Affiliation**

These last several months have been tough. I’ve heard so many stories from folks back home in the district – worried about their health care, rising costs, and the future of our country.

In Congress, I’ve made it a point to demand accountability from this administration and my colleagues on the other side of the aisle. We must keep working against the MAGA agenda.

As you can imagine, national Republicans aren’t so happy with people like me who are taking a stand. It’s why the NRCC is already airing baseless attack ads against me, and why I have a challenger with the full might of the GOP machine behind him.

While the midterm elections are over a year away, we’re making preparations now for the battle to come. I was one of only a handful of Democrats who flipped GOP-held seats in November, and that makes me one of the most at-risk incumbents in Congress.

There is hope: I’ve seen the power of this grassroots movement before. It’s how we were able to flip this seat, and why I’m able to work to get results in Washington.

**[So today, ahead of my end-of-month deadline on Friday, I’m only asking you to chip in $1. If everyone reading this email donated $1, we’d send an unmistakable message of strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118098131/578647341/148511826?refcode=em-10.27.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmI5OGI2NS01NmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOL2_PbRC8GGd92adycABj-7BINtNH4jWe3ELvQcWIE=)**

clean_body: | = = = | **= These last several months have been tough. I’ve heard so many stories from folks back home in the district – worried about their health care, rising costs, and the future of our country. In Congress, I’ve made it a point to demand accountability from this administration and my colleagues on the other side of the aisle. We must keep working against the MAGA agenda. As you can imagine, national Republicans aren’t so happy with people like me who are taking a stand. It’s why the NRCC is already airing baseless attack ads against me, and why I have a challenger with the full might of the GOP machine behind him. While the midterm elections are over a year away, we’re making preparations now for the battle to come. I was one of only a handful of Democrats who flipped GOP-held seats in November, and that makes me one of the most at-risk incumbents in Congress. There is hope: I’ve seen the power of this grassroots movement before. It’s how we were able to flip this seat, and why I’m able to work to get results in Washington. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Noem drafts plan to dismantle election security** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118098541/578648789/-248329304?refcode=em-10.27.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWI5OGI2NS01NmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o5dkFSqfCA7w7nj4d718VgIpFLOqMslTMpB1VMbgmb4=)**
* * *
We’ve been warning about this for months, friend: The Trump administration is quietly dismantling CISA – the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency – and replacing it with loyalists who will do their bidding. Now, it’s happening. A leaked draft strategy from Kristi Noem’s office revealed a dangerous plan to sideline CISA and hand control of election-related cybersecurity to political agencies like ICE and DHS. **CISA is the agency that helped protect the 2020 election and debunked Trump’s lies about widespread fraud. That’s why it’s in the crosshairs.** This plan would gut nonpartisan election protections and replace them with a politicized system designed to help Trump and his allies cling to power – no matter what the voters say. And unless we act now, they’ll get away with it. We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: **Democratic Secretaries of State are our firewall against federal overreach.** While Trump’s DOJ and DHS rewrite the rules, it’s state officials who safeguard voter rolls, oversee election infrastructure, and stand up to unlawful interference. But they can’t do it alone. name: Deb Haaland
subject: a broken leg and a major warning for our national parks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I made it down a mountain after breaking my leg — but our national parks might not make it through this shutdown.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5318%2E400544%2EnvQMYq)
A few years ago, while visiting Shenandoah National Park, I took _a bit_ of a tumble.
I was hiking up the side of a mountain when I slipped on a loose rock. It was a total freak accident — I couldn’t believe it. But there I was, covered in dirt with a pain in my leg and ankle and three options:
* Get airlifted down in a helicopter
* Take eight National Park staff away from their jobs to carry me down
* Hike down myself

**I chose to walk all the way back down the mountain** — on what turned out to be a broken leg — because I couldn’t stomach the idea of taking our National Park staff away from their work, even for a few hours.
The federal workers who care for our public lands have absolutely crucial jobs to do. They preserve and protect our public lands for millions of visitors each year and for future generations.
**But right now, nearly two-thirds of them are furloughed due to the government shutdown** – and the few still on duty are stretched thin without pay.
Now, **Donald Trump is threatening to make those furloughs permanent** — and if he does, **this could be the beginning of the end for our national parks.**
As Governor of New Mexico, I will always stand up for the dedicated workers who serve our state, and I will be a fierce defender for our rivers, mesas, farmlands, and forests. **[If you’re with me, will you donate $5 to support our campaign before our end-of-month deadline on Friday?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251027_1_brokenleg.ldsOQ_&amount=5&refcode=em20251027-5318&t=2&akid=5318%2E400544%2EnvQMYq)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251027_1_brokenleg.ldsOQ_&amount=5&refcode=em20251027-5318&t=21&akid=5318%2E400544%2EnvQMYq)**
This isn’t just irresponsible for public lands and the people that protect them — it's**extremely dangerous for visitors**. People are entering parks without reliable safety updates, road closure information, or enough rangers on duty. For anyone who takes a fall like I did, gets lost, or has a medical emergency, it could quickly become life-threatening.
Meanwhile, parks will lose up to $1 million a day in revenue. The rural communities that depend on tourism? They could lose nearly $100 million in visitor spending.
This breaks my heart.
**But just like the day I chose to hike down the mountain on my broken leg, I am determined to stand up and fight back.**
[**New Mexicans need a governor who isn’t afraid of the tough fights — someone who fights for working people and public lands when Washington abandons us. I can’t win this campaign without you, so please chip in $5 if you can today.**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251027_1_brokenleg.ldsOQ_&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251027-5318&t=22&akid=5318%2E400544%2EnvQMYq)
Be fierce,
Deb
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20251027-1&t=23&refcode2=5318_400544_nvQMYq&akid=5318%2E400544%2EnvQMYq)**
[](https://deb4gov.us/text-me)

Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6a05f984ae431eab2a041afd9e835b&_e=HnLyJVPfxqMx0KiwoLLe5tbIGlqi77lKZqTEgyvdGHrlK9bF-ND5ZJcWtyWbamF--nLKTuXe09eyWobfPDkzNUctZm1BDO3f7JCJCzYd3UPBsNCDgDHQegBJmbqonhIhrH_3bBGo6Ufcoz5SX7hP0dfK97cgIT7t6ZRlz7mf_KQqzb-HCUj_EVmVUCplQR0PuAg4Pfj0pYRK4DjFv232Y6nVo8lzApnMTJs3NL7csiV_yf8GDLQe0Su4m9I-IjCPBgDrkomRHuHhk8Sp3fXWx08KBTPyLa8clSBX5uPUslOx7l4nL9rMEtW0PXVWThzQ1k35_j_KTqrlkMSvybvXzhGbT5gScuWbfrmBIry_g69wknpcqx9hG6EfSxf6AAIt7uPoCdLQcxfBKUfqOBd_C0Qg3yJPAG_lC0_1Y7Kv6OOnCgIo5G-DvCw9bE3jBhaB5CX7FUJkFKw-r1t2J4VAHMWAAtyGciOZCt6qpus_eGHdpO3HXqrfpdhcgXKfuwx9hPsS9ef19OTIFrEee_apONQEQ-xcG2eyBGwRJY2auqtsZcobV5CkCDFUoUQ8wi8SS3gmNQG_emGqePg8_t4CqGADMdu-CJq6iUx-opn_t5UvDLjAoyesbAV1UfCJ3-tLIzIyqFjwFIUAnBayWqxJWGYRzuVwZQ1nYPZRS8YNn5Qv6dDMEB2ctKAPdtvK3fAHMsvxXezzThIJHijgwi29dfQBzHeiVnZPlKLK67NFr1MDO8UvfTF2Xe8HchQOHFPCWi0iJPKET2oJEpHMcanzp2dWbUi_rI_Sw1oBNH-6Lj0%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6a05f984ae431eab2a041afd9e835b&_e=HnLyJVPfxqMx0KiwoLLe5tbIGlqi77lKZqTEgyvdGHrlK9bF-ND5ZJcWtyWbamF--nLKTuXe09eyWobfPDkzNUctZm1BDO3f7JCJCzYd3UPBsNCDgDHQegBJmbqonhIhrH_3bBGo6Ufcoz5SX7hP0dfK97cgIT7t6ZRlz7mf_KQqzb-HCUj_EVmVUCplQR0PuAg4Pfj0pYRK4DjFv232Y6nVo8lzApnMTJs3NL7csiV_yf8GDLQe0Su4m9I-IjCPBgDrkomRHuHhk8Sp3fXWx08KBTPyLa8clSBX5uPUslObCA0jfkBUG013jmZVUpuBb7KkoM60dQKp5KaTAIpcKkE5ovC8uUVB-mYmuimCvegfoDa5S_teQ58FVmsIEvLiR6iRP0oDTlPYRJ06hv5nasqSolKm5Vrdlnj5iRqxkhTQwSpZO5woVKmHXVZrlZLn4XdTinMM1aLMelB_R2VhwV44PW11Ls2-WBskQxCfFmmeqtJIhj1ebtuB9-m8jtsNPrubUE0AzMvkf7BS3hMGfCMN0lcPOCb44CM1lsdz8-A_JXVwg60DtqOzmPsey1-VXKr1DlOMPGyO6d5AAWzVnIlNcdmBo-hcnltbXph65e-jP65jZI7FCb4ZtaHDHoNLCn12RjYuNIoMh4j48zIt-A51MqTNugfbDCeIdwangFYaczDCKvbQhW7kemgsJUWDvtvXxCLWqud9VwntPOpL8Vl4Gm9Nwsm42CweYgsAy7Y1N7AK0D4TMbb7ydyJcXx2BVePShQAINYyA1gBuBPQzlYjORefYQDMZIUmOQYI3pc%3D)

**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.

_**[Now, I need you to join me.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6e6a05f984ae431eab2a041afd9e835b&_e=HnLyJVPfxqMx0KiwoLLe5tbIGlqi77lKZqTEgyvdGHrlK9bF-ND5ZJcWtyWbamF--nLKTuXe09eyWobfPDkzNUctZm1BDO3f7JCJCzYd3UPBsNCDgDHQegBJmbqonhIhrH_3bBGo6Ufcoz5SX7hP0dfK97cgIT7t6ZRlz7mf_KQqzb-HCUj_EVmVUCplQR0PuAg4Pfj0pYRK4DjFv232Y6nVo8lzApnMTJs3NL7csiV_yf8GDLQe0Su4m9I-IjCPBgDrkomRHuHhk8Sp3fXWx08KBTPyLa8clSBX5uPUslMCeM0r5mV2xdqJRqeRv6bhi6D5jfrFiTcHTjPaLO3VReaQ8CrLrRqS-Nn8EdGLmvHdOjgTUl9ltSO6UmwSqDeHxB8qH3vBY4_GffkSfc386fU5gVLarvgh-XAiDCS3ukdYo7gDuWSzW2vZ0DuZKtARLqNZk8VnjrTT6cFSh5eKkyTzXSkqJs31ArTIKK9y0e66ZqGmTRmyHZR9zjzIJy8hN1vrSPEjEPS_By1kIuhbTOQbRKY-y9Yxwnhbtmj3wGlqrcs1M1i4sbiVaiTseeiSIUjPt6I1onprBeJXKyJ2IXkrWjXcEwVLds1X-vRzsW5ghH_cUgc4YjvKABSluA6zUhyI2LgvXuZlgEzuce-njAkLbxThhTawPoN7go9WIKqPMvQeVAWkp9EJJrJmv51-JT2FfmXDzUaVFHnxvcmg3OnC0sXjKNkJtE_KwZd5AeCR6h0iVdKcIsB0xlxYC1ry1qMz5RHI5ArUUnA_5lqNzgT1OQtG7UQnbgu64vRb8_s%3D)**_

clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Fellow Conservative, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---

Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6dc4fhqcdp7te3abq71ns5em3t7vd1pt36jh2c0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4clie1o71cdh2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. body:
Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**

You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to: 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states 🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists 🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. He showed us HOW WE WIN. Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you. How We Win is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up." Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth. The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. For Charlie, The Turning Point USA Team 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Ret.)
subject: $5 to defeat Lauren Boebert

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-hickenlooper-laubacher?amount=15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-hickenlooper-laubacher?amount=15]Hello,

$5.

That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign today to help me defeat Lauren Boebert. Yes, just $5.

$5 because I am the retired Navy Rear Admiral and Democrat running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.

$5 because Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country.

$5 because Lauren Boebert has never been more unpopular than she is now.

And $5 because Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, and I need your help now to fight back if we’re going to send Boebert packing and flip this seat.

I know $5 probably doesn’t seem like much, but combined with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we out-raised Lauren Boebert and her corporate PAC supporters last quarter. But we cannot stop here or let up.

We’ve set a goal to raise another $25,000 to defeat Boebert and flip this seat blue, and right now, we are still dangerously short.

Please, can I count on you to split a donation right now between my campaign and John Hickenlooper – any amount you can afford – to help me finally defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-hickenlooper-laubacher?amount=5]

DONATE → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-hickenlooper-laubacher?amount=5]

Having the support of people like you means the world to me.

Thank you,

Eileen

Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

# Trump bullish on China deal as barnstorming Asia trip heads to Japan
President Donald Trump **[declared Sunday aboard Air Force One](https://substack.com/redirect/b8071fec-e004-4685-be28-7126435eae2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** en route to Japan that the U.S. and China are on the verge of a landmark trade deal, before his pivotal summit with President Xi Jinping in South Korea amid tensions over tariffs rare earth minerals and TikTok's future.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b8071fec-e004-4685-be28-7126435eae2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Xi Summit Accelerates** Negotiations in South Korea Thursday are building on Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) sideline talks yielding preliminary framework for export controls, fentanyl curbs, and shipping fees after intense U.S.-China discussions.
* **TikTok Fate Hangs** Trump could finalize a TikTok deal by Thursday, potentially allowing the app to persist despite national security fears, ahead of meeting Xi during the Asia-Pacific Economic Cooperation.
* **Tariffs Teeter on Edge** The 100% China tariff threat is "effectively off the table," per Treasury Secretary Bessent, with a truce extension likely in exchange for China's resumed $12.8 billion soybean buys. John Woods, chief investment officer at Lombard Odier described the situation **[telling CNBC](https://substack.com/redirect/b8071fec-e004-4685-be28-7126435eae2e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Markets are increasingly getting used to a 'punch-first, negotiate-second' tariffs overture,"
* **ASEAN Pacts Counter China:** These fresh U.S. agreements with Malaysia, Cambodia, Thailand, and Vietnam seek to boost U.S. exports, secure rare earth minerals, and ease barriers to offset Beijing's growing regional trade dominance.

# Texas mint churns out Silver bars as demand soars
A gleaming new silver mint outside Dallas is melting raw silver ore into pure **[investment bars at blistering speeds](https://substack.com/redirect/571d517e-eeb0-41b9-b096-db78f07a30a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , as prices soar to $48 an ounce amid investor panic over inflation and global turmoil.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/571d517e-eeb0-41b9-b096-db78f07a30a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Prices Spike Dramatically** : Silver recently surged to $51-$53 per ounce before dipping to $48, fueling nationwide rush for physical bars.
* **Robotic Refining Revolution** : Technicians at Dillon Gage's facility purify molten silver with robotic arms and 2,190°F ovens, churning out bars in an operation "built for speed" to handle explosive order volumes.
* **Demand Fueled by Fears** : Investors pile into silver as a hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical strife, and economic uncertainty, driving sharp year-to-date sales hikes for minted products.
* **Volatility Looms Large** : Bank of America predicts more upside potential, but J.P. Morgan warns high rates and fading global momentum could curb retail buying and trigger base-metal slumps.

# Milei ROMPS home in Argentine election on pro free market ticket, stocks surge 19%
Argentina's battered markets **[erupted in a stunning rebound](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa484d7-a837-4851-8d69-11f5d6e1ff18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday after President Javier Milei's libertarian party defied polls to clinch a sweeping legislative victory Sunday, surging stocks 19%, bonds over 13% and the peso 10% as fears of reform gridlock and economic meltdown evaporated overnight.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5fa484d7-a837-4851-8d69-11f5d6e1ff18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Unexpected Vote Triumph Secured** : Milei's coalition grabbed 41% of votes, far exceeding forecasts of 30%, while claiming 64 lower-house seats and 13 Senate posts to bolster his reform agenda.
* **Bonds Break Historic Peaks** : Dollar-denominated 2035 bonds leaped 13 cents to 70.18 cents on the dollar, shattering previous highs amid a broad maturity rally that reversed weeks of pre-vote slumps.
* **US Rescue Line Eases Pressure** : The Trump administration's $20 billion intervention to prop up the peso may now retract, following the win that averted a feared currency plunge and reserve drain.
* **Investor Confidence Restored** : A global cash flight halted as locals ditched dollar hoarding, with strategists hailing the outcome as a "best-case scenario" for Milei's sustained free-market overhauls.
* **House Seats Surge Dramatically** : La Libertad Avanza leaped **[from 37 to 64 deputies, capturing 41.5%](https://substack.com/redirect/33e0daf8-eb69-4cbf-920b-ac45501e5907?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Peronist bastion Buenos Aires to narrowly top opposition's 40.8%.
* **Inflation Tamed Through Austerity** : Milei's spending slashes dropped monthly inflation from 12.8% to 2.1%, yielding first fiscal surplus in years and wooing global investors.
* **Cabinet Overhaul Looms Large** : Post-win reshuffle eyes party allies, fortifying Milei's congressional pacts to veto fiscal threats and speed deregulation.

# Qualcomm wades into the AI Chip Wars with smartphone inspired neural tech
In a bold pivot to the red-hot data center arena, **[Qualcomm unveiled Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/1068ed9b-dec6-421b-8e4e-870c548499ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** its AI200 and AI250 accelerator chips, leveraging smartphone-proven neural tech to challenge Nvidia's iron grip on AI inference--promising hyperscalers like Microsoft and OpenAI more efficient, mix-and-match alternatives amid an expected $6.7 trillion server boom through 2030.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1068ed9b-dec6-421b-8e4e-870c548499ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **AI200 Debuts 2026** : Qualcomm's first data center chip, AI200, launches in full liquid-cooled racks next year, packing up to 72 units for seamless AI model running, with 768GB memory per card outpacing rivals.
* **AI250 Powers 2027** : The follow-up AI250 will arrive in 2027, scaling Hexagon NPU efficiency from mobiles to massive server farms, targeting inference workloads where power-hungry training isn't needed.
* **Hyperscaler Flexibility Boost** : Chips enable custom "mix-and-match" designs, letting cloud giants blend Qualcomm parts with Nvidia or AMD gear for lower costs and easier upgrades in global data centers.
* **Saudi Partnership Accelerates** : Qualcomm scored an early win with Saudi Arabia's Humain committing to 200-megawatts of AI deployment, fueling regional AI growth and validating Qualcomm's edge by reducing total ownership costs over dominant players for smaller markets.

# Biden-era "Venmo snooping" regs formally consigned to the trash
The Trump administration's Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is formally rescinding a Biden-era rule **[requiring nonbanks to report regulatory violations](https://substack.com/redirect/37e2d75a-3867-4462-9bb3-90348a286d42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** **[such as Venmo transactions of more than $600 to a public registry and the IRS,](https://substack.com/redirect/d5f68280-20b0-489a-b1a1-dd24a1e4e7f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** citing unjustified costs passed to consumers, while withdrawing a proposal targeting contract clauses that curb legal rights.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/37e2d75a-3867-4462-9bb3-90348a286d42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Rescinding NBR Registry Rule** : Finalized in July 2024, the rule mandated 1,550 to 7,752 nonbanks report financial violation orders annually, imposing $2,100 labor costs per entity deemed speculative in benefits.
* **Withdrawing Contract Terms Proposal** : 2023 draft rule sought data on supervised nonbanks' clauses waiving claims, limiting class actions, or restricting reviews, now abandoned due to burdensome, uncertain gains.
* **Interim Non-Enforcement Step** : **[CFPB halted NBR enforcement earlier in 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/f871b4b8-aaed-4b36-a775-f76ca1175020?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/f871b4b8-aaed-4b36-a775-f76ca1175020?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)under acting director Russell Vought, signaling swift deregulation pivot from Biden's Rohit Chopra era.
* **Broader Deregulation Implications** : Rollbacks reduce monitoring tools but rely on other agencies for enforcement, aligning with Trump's CFPB overhaul to curb regulatory overreach and lower business burdens.

# Oil Tycoon hails Trumps million barrel oil purchase for the SPR
Energy titan Harold Hamm hailed President Trump's order to buy 1 million barrels of cheap crude **[for America's depleted Strategic Petroleum Reserve](https://substack.com/redirect/f91bb76a-c6a0-44c1-a687-543a6b1a557b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, calling it a vital step for national security saying "the president gets it on energy and realizes, certainly, this is the right thing to do."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f91bb76a-c6a0-44c1-a687-543a6b1a557b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Hamm Slams Biden Policies** : Founder of Continental Resources blasts prior administration's record SPR sales and anti-oil stance as a "terrible policy" that weakened U.S. energy independence after Russia's 2022 Ukraine invasion.
* **SPR Depletion Exposed** : The U.S. emergency stockpile now holds just 409 million barrels of its total 700 million capacity after the Biden administration's draining, lagging far behind China's 1.1 billion-barrel reserves.
* **Oversupply Window Closing** : Current low commodity prices offer a rare buying opportunity, but Hamm forecasts domestic production must ramp up soon to avert supply crunches and economic fallout.
* **Energy-Security Nexus Highlighted** : Hamm ties U.S. natural resource abundance to broader competitiveness, urging investment to shield against vulnerabilities like Europe's gas woes or China's mineral dominance.

Milei ROMPS home in Argentine election on pro free market ticket, stocks surge 19% Argentina's battered markets Monday after President Javier Milei's libertarian party defied polls to clinch a sweeping legislative victory Sunday, surging stocks 19%, bonds over 13% and the peso 10% as fears of reform gridlock and economic meltdown evaporated overnight. | | ---|---|--- Unexpected Vote Triumph Secured : Milei's coalition grabbed 41% of votes, far exceeding forecasts of 30%, while claiming 64 lower-house seats and 13 Senate posts to bolster his reform agenda. Bonds Break Historic Peaks : Dollar-denominated 2035 bonds leaped 13 cents to 70.18 cents on the dollar, shattering previous highs amid a broad maturity rally that reversed weeks of pre-vote slumps. US Rescue Line Eases Pressure : The Trump administration's $20 billion intervention to prop up the peso may now retract, following the win that averted a feared currency plunge and reserve drain. Investor Confidence Restored : A global cash flight halted as locals ditched dollar hoarding, with strategists hailing the outcome as a "best-case scenario" for Milei's sustained free-market overhauls. House Seats Surge Dramatically : La Libertad Avanza leaped in Peronist bastion Buenos Aires to narrowly top opposition's 40.8%. Inflation Tamed Through Austerity : Milei's spending slashes dropped monthly inflation from 12.8% to 2.1%, yielding first fiscal surplus in years and wooing global investors. Cabinet Overhaul Looms Large : Post-win reshuffle eyes party allies, fortifying Milei's congressional pacts to veto fiscal threats and speed deregulation. Qualcomm wades into the AI Chip Wars with smartphone inspired neural tech In a bold pivot to the red-hot data center arena, its AI200 and AI250 accelerator chips, leveraging smartphone-proven neural tech to challenge Nvidia's iron grip on AI inference--promising hyperscalers like Microsoft and OpenAI more efficient, mix-and-match alternatives amid an expected $6.7 trillion server boom through 2030. | | ---|---|--- AI200 Debuts 2026 : Qualcomm's first data center chip, AI200, launches in full liquid-cooled racks next year, packing up to 72 units for seamless AI model running, with 768GB memory per card outpacing rivals. AI250 Powers 2027 : The follow-up AI250 will arrive in 2027, scaling Hexagon NPU efficiency from mobiles to massive server farms, targeting inference workloads where power-hungry training isn't needed. Hyperscaler Flexibility Boost : Chips enable custom "mix-and-match" designs, letting cloud giants blend Qualcomm parts with Nvidia or AMD gear for lower costs and easier upgrades in global data centers. Saudi Partnership Accelerates : Qualcomm scored an early win with Saudi Arabia's Humain committing to 200-megawatts of AI deployment, fueling regional AI growth and validating Qualcomm's edge by reducing total ownership costs over dominant players for smaller markets. Biden-era "Venmo snooping" regs formally consigned to the trash The Trump administration's Consumer Financial Protection Bureau is formally rescinding a Biden-era rule citing unjustified costs passed to consumers, while withdrawing a proposal targeting contract clauses that curb legal rights. | | ---|---|--- Rescinding NBR Registry Rule : Finalized in July 2024, the rule mandated 1,550 to 7,752 nonbanks report financial violation orders annually, imposing $2,100 labor costs per entity deemed speculative in benefits. Withdrawing Contract Terms Proposal : 2023 draft rule sought data on supervised nonbanks' clauses waiving claims, limiting class actions, or restricting reviews, now abandoned due to burdensome, uncertain gains. Interim Non-Enforcement Step : acting director Russell Vought, signaling swift deregulation pivot from Biden's Rohit Chopra era. Broader Deregulation Implications : Rollbacks reduce monitoring tools but rely on other agencies for enforcement, aligning with Trump's CFPB overhaul to curb regulatory overreach and lower business burdens. Oil Tycoon hails Trumps million barrel oil purchase for the SPR Energy titan Harold Hamm hailed President Trump's order to buy 1 million barrels of cheap crude , calling it a vital step for national security saying "the president gets it on energy and realizes, certainly, this is the right thing to do." | | ---|---|--- Hamm Slams Biden Policies : Founder of Continental Resources blasts prior administration's record SPR sales and anti-oil stance as a "terrible policy" that weakened U.S. energy independence after Russia's 2022 Ukraine invasion. SPR Depletion Exposed : The U.S. emergency stockpile now holds just 409 million barrels of its total 700 million capacity after the Biden administration's draining, lagging far behind China's 1.1 billion-barrel reserves. Oversupply Window Closing : Current low commodity prices offer a rare buying opportunity, but Hamm forecasts domestic production must ramp up soon to avert supply crunches and economic fallout. Energy-Security Nexus Highlighted : Hamm ties U.S. natural resource abundance to broader competitiveness, urging investment to shield against vulnerabilities like Europe's gas woes or China's mineral dominance. clean_body: Someone is turning 40... | Peter, Did you know? Our very own Congresswoman Emily Randall is turning 40 on the 30th! Usually, Emily would be planning the menu for a birthday dinner, cooking, and inviting friends — but she’s been a LITTLE busy: working to end the Republican shutdown, lower healthcare costs, hold the Trump regime accountable, and so much more. The gift that would mean the most to her right now is hearing from YOU and her amazing grassroots team. With everything our country is going through, we’re grateful to have something joyful to celebrate! Emily appreciates every message she gets from supporters and friends, especially during tough days in Congress or long cross-country flights. Thank you so much 💙🎂 – Team Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on: | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: With Honor Action
subject: NEW EXPLAINER: Renewed bipartisan push to hold Russia accountable for war crimes 🇺🇦
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
A bipartisan move in Congress to hold Russia accountable for the reported abduction of over 19,000 Ukrainian children. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/withhonor/invitation-two-parties-two-veterans-one-conversation-rep-lalota-rep-ryan-special-session-with-president-carter-alumni-14054750?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | [ ](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=8b7589c4f2&e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | | Friends,

At With Honor Action, we believe America stands for democracy, the rule of law, and the protection of the innocent, the principles that led many of us to choose to serve our country in uniform. When a foreign power attacks another nation, abducts children, undermines international norms, and defies everything we hold dear, we cannot stay silent.

That is precisely what’s happening in Ukraine, where mounting evidence shows Russian forces have committed atrocities on a massive scale. Today, Congress and the White House face a choice: Will we meet this moment with strength — or turn away?

Representative Brian Fitzpatrick, a former FBI agent, and Senator Lindsey Graham, a U.S. Air Force veteran, have introduced a pair of [bipartisan bills](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=7e3f26eced&e=33f53a5b1a). It would require the Secretary of State to designate Russia as a State Sponsor of Terrorism unless Moscow returns the [more than 19,000 Ukrainian children reportedly abducted over the course of the invasion.](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=3e026a18de&e=33f53a5b1a)

**Here’s the bottom line: **
* Ukrainian authorities estimate that over 19,000 children have been forcibly taken to Russian or Russian-occupied territories since the initial invasion in February 2022.
* Under U.S. law, countries that repeatedly engage in terrorism or abductions can be designated by the State Department as State Sponsors of Terrorism — triggering some of the most serious economic, diplomatic, and strategic consequences.

These actions are not only a violation of human rights but a direct challenge to international law. The bipartisan momentum behind this legislation reflects a growing understanding: the world is watching, and silence is complicity.

Meanwhile, the United States has announced new sanctions targeting Russia’s oil revenues, striking at the financial lifelines of Putin’s war machine.

**Why this matters to America:**

Supporting Ukraine is not just about stability in Europe. It’s about deterring aggression, defending democracy, and upholding a global order that condemns war crimes. When we stand firm against tyranny abroad, we strengthen freedom at home.

If you share these values, take a moment to read our full explainer – and share it via email, social media, or your network. The more Americans understand what’s at stake, the stronger our collective voice becomes.

---
| [Read Full Explainer Here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=65f50faf82&e=33f53a5b1a "Read Full Explainer Here")
---
| Thank you for standing with democracy, justice, and Ukraine.

Warmly,
The With Honor Action Team
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=e660d2fcc7&e=33f53a5b1a)

subject: WATCH: KBAK video [NEW]

body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118101387/578658282/1981932150?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0MTBhYzctNWViMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhbpSyw4Xi-RyYHurrRxIF64ErwZRJYUb4R3gM6HbEQ=)
Hi there, When I decided to run for Congress, it wasn’t about chasing power. It was about standing up for families like mine. I sat down recently to talk about that decision, what pushed me to run, and what it means to fight for the people who’ve been left behind for far too long. Watch the full interview **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118101393/578658312/1630935481?refcode=em-10.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0MTBhYzctNWViMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhbpSyw4Xi-RyYHurrRxIF64ErwZRJYUb4R3gM6HbEQ=)** : [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118101401/578658354/1234867255?refcode=em-10.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0MTBhYzctNWViMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhbpSyw4Xi-RyYHurrRxIF64ErwZRJYUb4R3gM6HbEQ=) | [WATCH THE VIDEO ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118101407/578658370/1630935481?refcode=em-10.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0MTBhYzctNWViMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhbpSyw4Xi-RyYHurrRxIF64ErwZRJYUb4R3gM6HbEQ=)
---
In this interview, I share why I refuse all corporate PAC money, while David Valadao (and even some Democrats) keep cashing checks from companies like PG&E, Big Pharma, and private prisons.
I talk about growing up on Medicaid. Watching my parents wake up every day to work multiple jobs and still struggle to get by. And I talk about what it means to be the son of immigrants in a district where families are terrified of ICE raids and unjust deportations.
This campaign is about showing up – not just at election time, but _always_. It’s about putting our communities before corporations.
**[I hope you’ll take a minute to watch this video, share it with your friends, and help us get the word out across the Central Valley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118101411/578658381/1630935481?refcode=em-10.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0MTBhYzctNWViMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhbpSyw4Xi-RyYHurrRxIF64ErwZRJYUb4R3gM6HbEQ=)**
[WATCH THE VIDEO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118101413/578658387/1630935481?refcode=em-10.27.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWE0MTBhYzctNWViMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YhbpSyw4Xi-RyYHurrRxIF64ErwZRJYUb4R3gM6HbEQ=)

Randy

name: Tristan Rader
subject: Our Neighbors need Help Give to the Food Bank
body:
SNAP benefits could stop in November, let's do our part and give to our local food banks who are already struggling. | | | |
---
| | |
# 1.5 Million Ohioans Could Go Hungry,
Here’s How to Help
---
|
---
| [ ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=913e29e02e&e=869bcf0641)
---
| , Because of inaction at the state and federal level, **over 1.5 million Ohioans,** including kids, seniors, and people with disabilities, could soon lose their SNAP and WIC benefits if the federal shutdown continues past November 1. This is a crisis. For every **1 meal provided by a food bank** , **SNAP provides 9**. That’s a gap no nonprofit can fully close. But right now, **food banks are our last line of defense** to keep families from going hungry. That’s why I gave to the **Greater Cleveland Food Bank** — and why I’m asking you to consider giving too. [👉 ](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=ce42d96ff6&e=869bcf0641)[**Donate to the Greater Cleveland Food Bank**](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=0693706e29&e=869bcf0641) Every dollar counts. Every meal matters.

We may not control Washington or Columbus, but we can **stand together as a community** to make sure no family is left behind. Thank you for stepping up when leadership won’t,

**\- Tristan**
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://tristanrader.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fe296f262404fb3f98dc9e04f&id=819df8eddf&e=869bcf0641 "Donate")
---
|
---

clean_body: SNAP benefits could stop in November, let's do our part and give to our local food banks who are already struggling. | | | | | | | 1.5 Million Ohioans Could Go Hungry, Here’s How to Help | | | , Because of inaction at the state and federal level, over 1.5 million Ohioans, including kids, seniors, and people with disabilities, could soon lose their SNAP and WIC benefits if the federal shutdown continues past November 1. This is a crisis. For every 1 meal provided by a food bank , SNAP provides 9. That’s a gap no nonprofit can fully close. But right now, food banks are our last line of defense to keep families from going hungry. That’s why I gave to the Greater Cleveland Food Bank — and why I’m asking you to consider giving too. Every dollar counts. Every meal matters. We may not control Washington or Columbus, but we can stand together as a community to make sure no family is left behind. Thank you for stepping up when leadership won’t, \- Tristan | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Tristan Rader for Ohio, All rights reserved.

name: AZ Dems
subject: What Andy Biggs won't tell you about losing ACA subsidies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
A 60-year-old couple making $80k would see costs jump from $567 to $2,026 per month. That's the reality Biggs won't mention. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102336/578661681/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU4NzIwZTItNWZiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zEcnR3TZw9k_xkMZgE_B4ny8XCY3i-NzzzKcRmEfo5k=)
---
Hi there, In case you missed it: Andy Biggs went on _Good Morning Arizona_ and lied about healthcare. **The gubernatorial candidate and current congressman claimed that people making up to $600,000 a year are getting free healthcare through Obamacare subsidies.** Viewers immediately called the station to fact-check him. Here's what the facts actually show: The nonpartisan Joint Committee on Taxation found that no one making more than $500,000 receives ACA subsidies. About 85% of subsidies go to households making under $150,000 — not wealthy individuals, but middle-class Arizona families. **Biggs is lying — and he knows it.** But guess what Biggs didn’t mention during his TV appearance: What happens to middle-class Arizonans if Republicans eliminate these subsidies. The Arizona Public Health Association ran the numbers: A 60-year-old couple making $80,000 a year**currently pays about $567 a month** for health insurance. If the subsidies Republicans are blocking disappear, that **cost jumps to $2,026 a month — more than $17,000 a year** just to stay insured**.** That's not a typo. That's a nearly $1,500 per month increase for a middle-class Arizona couple. This is the Republican shutdown playbook in action: lie about who benefits from healthcare subsidies, manufacture outrage about imaginary problems, then strip protections from the people who actually need them. **[Can you support Arizona Democrats as we expose the truth about what Republicans are doing to healthcare?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102337/578661682/541746778?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU4NzIwZTItNWZiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zEcnR3TZw9k_xkMZgE_B4ny8XCY3i-NzzzKcRmEfo5k=)** | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102338/578661683/79744751?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251027_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWU4NzIwZTItNWZiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zEcnR3TZw9k_xkMZgE_B4ny8XCY3i-NzzzKcRmEfo5k=)
---
Biggs cited a study from the Paragon Health Institute — run by a Trump administration official — to justify his false claims. That's not policy analysis. That's partisan propaganda designed to justify taking healthcare away from Arizona families.
We're making sure every Arizona voter knows exactly what Republicans like Biggs are trying to do.
Thanks for standing with us,
AZ Dems

name: Phil Weiser
subject: An urgent priority list item
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
As governor, you can count on me to fight back. Always.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102525/578662334/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_TrumpProof_102725_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYyZjlkZi02MGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzI8_rhJNp5YYeKw1vSXqSQxHmrs76q0t-iOW6mJD2U=&emci=82c479b5-5db3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2f62f9df-60b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=51844520) As Colorado’s next governor, I’ve got a long priority list, Friend. When the house is on fire, however, it’s hard not to start with putting out the fire. And to protect our values, we need to**Trump-proof our state.** Simply put, that means vigilantly defending our constitutional principles and the rule of law. If you’d like to hear more about our plan to protect our rights and freedoms, read on — **[but if you’re already on board, you can make a donation right now to support our pro-democracy campaign>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102527/578662338/-1377276739?refcode=em_WEI_FR_TrumpProof_102725_B&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjYyZjlkZi02MGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CzI8_rhJNp5YYeKw1vSXqSQxHmrs76q0t-iOW6mJD2U=)** I count myself most fortunate to be a Coloradan. And because I love our state and am deeply committed to serving the six million people who live here, I understand how much we stand to lose if we don’t stand strong against this lawless, bully administration. I’m proud of the many ways my office has already fought back against the Bully-in-Chief. **We’ve sued Trump 39 times (so far)** to defend our privacy, to preserve our right to vote by mail, to help federal workers keep their livelihoods intact, and to protect our immigrant and LGBTQ+ neighbors. _And in most cases, we’ve won._ **[I’m the only candidate for governor who’s stood up to Trump every chance I’ve gotten. clean_body: With Trump and his state-side allies wreaking havoc, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | | | | ---|--- There are over 30 special elections happening before the end of the year. With Trump and his state-side allies cutting Medicaid, attacking public education, and raising everyday costs for you and your family, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. Over a dozen states are holding elections that require our immediate attention. The MAGA movement is pouring millions of dollars into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way Democrats can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. $7 from youis all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Georgia and Minnesota around the country. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Mark Lamb
subject: After prayer and reflection, I’ve decided
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=503c1152fa77489e9e43a3f2f903b4b4&_e=1wWZCQBwJJsVsJ9G5OS1X1JhbgF0a-vVHK2fExzKomm8OwpKsO5Xh0xb-RTgDStHa0O5eWOYhBxM2Zx_GMU_uOAZL17Zd-WlRyxAP6gXYDBt5qeK9ut8blszL5t973Rkp4O-9Q2sgGDXydrsp2jnZ6lMrYmhx1WPw9kpbg8QwzHmBE5gYSGg6txSMccrZ6Px1nXmdx09YhkGD7v064WZZNzWVMtTdqHAV0zNGFj2q0Yd-Cs_kse544qbGvYsuhi7R_q1FcW-yU0tbCQ-CcTvFiBe_G6BTvs-AxlhXQQlFFBQ9a7TNZkqwqO0uL_Ss8D6spuc963fMe_rQ6Wc1yObNlwc507Qd6jN5-4t4ZsGnl25ocfD1yRBgXNLoRSiSXFk7yEfKwqf6To_PeforNppPPkDuQURE2c8GoYBVn-Qp_Uky4tYuYIxYjl723gCdh1LiWDi4ORzCbOn1B80-fggLudKVJOAyCh0xjYSNpbl1tK7B5s0oEN-XW3q8ZPvTAwNgZfjikia_AjU0C2HjQt1T-fpJymfFRPYsXDvl2M7YhSSMk0mPPCTA71uZRHOYGLrJspXzS41zumPBaANeLlscG2tdGr3hHQwMnOz1h8y7q9d067JSgMLNHPhcHrPJMEyjkJLqIOG4DLySF80pU7BfvG33ugz0OsWwrb7G5mvS6c%3D)
---
Peter —

You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well.

But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and **share some exciting news.**

**My name is Mark Lamb** — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona.

After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: **I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District!**

[ **JOIN MARK LAMB »** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=503c1152fa77489e9e43a3f2f903b4b4&_e=1wWZCQBwJJsVsJ9G5OS1X1JhbgF0a-vVHK2fExzKomm8OwpKsO5Xh0xb-RTgDStHa0O5eWOYhBxM2Zx_GMU_uOAZL17Zd-WlRyxAP6gXYDBt5qeK9ut8blszL5t973Rkp4O-9Q2sgGDXydrsp2jnZ6lMrYmhx1WPw9kpbg8QwzHmBE5gYSGg6txSMccrZ6Px1nXmdx09YhkGD7v064WZZNzWVMtTdqHAV0zNGFj2q0ZopWv_kTWsCdJf1k-hdHtxHRH5zevYrsXAVjlOJkP2eCxPE0YmOyXR4RHinBNL4KfXyt5qXKpf_BBebkqMpV1K-eZcizgYwp7ZCu7qwGiM8uZGDoWsoyyLgSCLKTB_193foctSTeYLIXpLER-qdcQyq-b0QPI_1npqh9TsOOyj0gW8pQOIX9-kusRAi41tXshWOeS6168RFHUsgxJXDbRpT1a8azxzZZ40Fli0p0Lprm4LtM_nVQa4Lr_l-Sds9rnAQbGN_8AZh5JNbyxhf2N4HIOdQmnpabob9ohRXCi4BBk62h7F-ynpUdl1yLTX7GvPSPD6R3X5Nji5rBwLvoZBTr5Rb-1BrYbQTLh1lru6keXp9ECR4fm9eV7VOJkgaUq-ORp4ZprsMz_FlwhKIKl-Feom5ZOhx0CAM0iwlBkdmAIwp24zDZT0CAzqa_fCDV0%3D)
This isn’t about ambition — _it’s about service._ I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families.

**I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right** — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now.

clean_body: I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. | Peter — You may already know me – some of you know me and my story well. But I want to take this opportunity to reintroduce myself and share some exciting news. My name is Mark Lamb — I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and the proud former Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona. After much prayer and reflection with my family, I’ve made a huge decision: I am officially running for Congress in Arizona’s 5th District! This isn’t about ambition — it’s about service. I’ve seen what happens when leaders lack courage and conviction, and I refuse to sit by while feckless politicians and bureaucrats fail our nation’s families. I’ve never backed down from doing what’s right — even when it wasn’t popular — and I won’t start now. Before I go any further, I want to thank Congressman Andy Biggs for his years of service to AZ-5 and wish him well in his decision to step down from this seat and run for Governor of Arizona. Andy has always fought hard for conservative values, and you can trust that I will do the same. You know me, and you know my record. As Sheriff, I spent years on the frontlines — battling the fentanyl epidemic, fighting cartel violence spilling over our borders, rescuing children from trafficking rings, and holding gang members and criminals accountable. Every day, I put on my badge and carried the responsibility of keeping our communities safe. I’ve seen families ripped apart by crime and drugs, and I’ve felt that pain personally. I’ve seen firsthand the devastating effects of rising crime and failing leadership. I won’t stand by while career politicians in Washington make excuses, play politics, and leave families unprotected. Our liberty, our safety, and our freedom are not guaranteed by silence — they are defended through action. I will fight in Congress for the same principles I’ve lived by as Sheriff: personal responsibility, faith, courage, and an unwavering commitment to the people I serve. I will stand up to the woke left, to the weak political establishment, and to anyone who puts politics above the safety of our communities. This fight will not be easy. Washington isn’t used to someone who tells it like it is, someone who’s willing to get their hands dirty and put people over politics. But that’s exactly what I intend to do — for Arizona families, for our law enforcement, and for our Constitution. I’m ready to step up and bring real leadership to Congress, but I can’t do it alone. Every contribution — big or small — sends a message: that hard-working families won’t be ignored, that our freedoms matter, and that courage still counts in America. I’m ready, Peter. Are you with me? For God, Family, and Country, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 P.S. I want to make it clear that the outpouring of support you’ve shown me and my wife, Janel, in the past factored into our decision to make this run. As Sheriff, I couldn’t have accomplished what I did without my deputies, and I won’t be able to succeed in this fight without you. Thank you!
