| | Hi Peter, I recently spent the day with Democratic candidate for Congress and former Emmy award-winning news anchor Janelle Stelson. We were out in Harrisburg, chatting with Black business owners about what they need to thrive. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102771/578663776/2089644103?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_102425_Business_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMyNzJmMy02MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B0RsmdM40f5M_96RrJpisFKM8p_RzRxSuCg_Xb9sbW4=) Thanks to the policies of the Trump administration, Black businesses and their customers are facing the brunt of the impacts of inflation, the rollback on DEI policies, and rising health care costs. It’s hard to hear that these small business owners are struggling, but it reminds me of why I’m in this fight. In my time as Lieutenant Governor, I have worked tirelessly to support all Pennsylvanians. Days when I get to visit the communities I serve and listen to the **real issues** facing Pennsylvanians are one of the best parts of this job. As the son of a union bus driver and hairdresser, I believe in the power of personal stories. My team and I have worked to increase the number of good jobs in the Commonwealth and increase protections around those jobs. We have no intention of stopping anytime soon. I will not stop fighting for small business owners of our community and the hardworking brothers and sisters throughout the Commonwealth. **However, I need your help, and so does Janelle Stelson. Our campaigns are built on grassroots supporters, like you.** [**Will you help us fight for Pennsylvania by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118102776/578663779/2089644103?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_102425_Business_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGMyNzJmMy02MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B0RsmdM40f5M_96RrJpisFKM8p_RzRxSuCg_Xb9sbW4=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, I recently spent the day with Democratic candidate for Congress and former Emmy award-winning news anchor Janelle Stelson. We were out in Harrisburg, chatting with Black business owners about what they need to thrive. = Thanks to the policies of the Trump administration, Black businesses and their customers are facing the brunt of the impacts of inflation, the rollback on DEI policies, and rising health care costs. It’s hard to hear that these small business owners are struggling, but it reminds me of why I’m in this fight. In my time as Lieutenant Governor, I have worked tirelessly to support all Pennsylvanians. Days when I get to visit the communities I serve and listen to the real issues facing Pennsylvanians are one of the best parts of this job. As the son of a union bus driver and hairdresser, I believe in the power of personal stories. My team and I have worked to increase the number of good jobs in the Commonwealth and increase protections around those jobs. We have no intention of stopping anytime soon. I will not stop fighting for small business owners of our community and the hardworking brothers and sisters throughout the Commonwealth. However, I need your help, and so does Janelle Stelson. Our campaigns are built on grassroots supporters, like you. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I won’t give up this fight, Austin Davis * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. We're not just fighting for bragging rights - we're on a mission to lift families up and create a better future for our kids. But we can't do it without your help. Winsome is up against a MAJOR deadline, and she needs your urgent support to stay competitive. Winsome's opponent is doubling her fundraising numbers thanks to wealthy megadonors like George Soros. If we don't act now, we risk losing the fight for the values that make our country great. But with your help, I know we can make a difference and elect a true conservative champion like Winsome Earle-Sears. Sincerely, Gov. Sarah Huckabee Sanders | Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 Pop Acta Media | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

subject: Right now we have the advantage, let’s use it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act]
Hey Peter,
Team Cori here. We are FOUR days away from our FIRST end-of-month deadline of the cycle, and this deadline sets the tone for our entire campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act]
We're running for Congress again, and the corporate interests who want us to fail are watching. They’re waiting to see if we have the strength and resources to fight back.
If corporate interests do succeed in keeping Cori Bush out of Congress, that means higher rent, rising costs, and no champion in Congress fighting for you .
But if you help us elect Cori Bush by contributing today, you’re making a critical early investment that lets us build a campaign capable of winning next year. Every dollar we raise now will be worth twice as much next year, giving us the foundation, energy, and organization to win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act]
Brick by brick, we can construct a movement St. Louis deserves: leadership that isn’t bought by billionaires, but powered by and fighting for families like yours.
That’s why we’re asking you to become a monthly supporter today. Your gift isn’t just a donation. It’s a commitment to ensuring we have a fighter for all of us in Congress.
Can you chip in $5, $10, or $20 every month to build this campaign and protect St. Louis? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act&recurring=1]
BECOME A MONTHLY SUPPORTER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act&recurring=1]
Every brick counts. Every month matters. Together, we’ll prove that people power beats billionaire money and that St. Louis deserves leadership that answers to you.
In solidarity,
— Team Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251027_recurring_eom1_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Join Team Cori today and sign up to volunteer. [https://www.coribush.org]

We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive.
Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a _billion_ dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use.
**[Winning this toss-up race won’t be easy, but I know that we can do it — especially if we’re able to make the most of these early days. If you’re able to contribute before our deadline on Friday, I would deeply appreciate it. clean_body: Is there any amount you can give? | Peter, I know better than anyone how difficult it is to win as a Democrat in North Carolina, and how hard we’ll have to work to succeed in this toss-up U.S. Senate race. I also know that early investment goes further. That’s one rule of campaigning that never seems to change. With my opponent gaining in the polls, it’s more important than ever that we can stay competitive. The earlier funds come in, the earlier we can plan our campaign expenses for the months ahead. That makes our efforts all the more effective, so I’m asking for your help today, so please don’t put it off. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = It’s no secret that national Republicans see me as the greatest threat to their control in Washington, plus that GOP lawmakers in Raleigh have taken steps to make it harder for Democrats to win here. We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive. Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a billion dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. subject: “We have to move FAST!!”

body:
Join Jane Fonda’s fight! >>
| | [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251027_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: CO-SIGN THE COMMITTEE FOR THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251027_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID)
---
80 years after McCarthyism, Trump and his MAGA mob are using the same tactics to scare and SILENCE anyone who disagrees with them.

**Jane Fonda is a Democratic HERO — so she needs YOU in her corner to fight back._Trump will do anything to stop her!_**

[**Will you join Jane Fonda’s movement to defend free speech and stand up to Trump by adding your signature now? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251027_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID)
[SIGN: I SUPPORT THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251027_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID)
---
**_IF we sit idly by,_** Trump will ELIMINATE free speech and punish anyone who dares to speak out against his MAGA authoritarianism.

**_BUT IF we all band together,_** Trump doesn’t stand a CHANCE against our grassroots momentum — we can SAVE our democracy!

[**So please, SIGN NOW: Co-sign Jane Fonda’s Committee for the First Amendment »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251027_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID)

Thank you for doing what’s right,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21623%2E878179%2EZksKID) to request fewer emails. name: MAHA Action
subject: Soldiers Reinstated and Health Freedom Advances — Your Weekly MAHA Wins
body:
See how MAHA’s push for healthier families is making headlines, and get this week’s recap fast.

| | | [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/?e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_wins_and_media_251027_3&n=1)
---
---
## From peanuts to patriots, MAHA is restoring common sense to public health.
---
| [ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=KKXXdNjFlMURpT7OBl6BEiVFrYyP-itFdEa4LGisybRVCX9zVfy6FfSMHD1_3--gXksETnr4L4xWGwhy6vj2Nw&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_wins_and_media_251027_3&n=2)
---
|
#### If you don’t have time to read, check out [Caitlin Sinclair’s _MAHA Minute_](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=KKXXdNjFlMURpT7OBl6BEiVFrYyP-itFdEa4LGisybRVCX9zVfy6FfSMHD1_3--gXksETnr4L4xWGwhy6vj2Nw&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_wins_and_media_251027_3&n=3) for a quick recap. Dive into this week’s MAHA Wins below. 👇
**New HHS Initiative to Deliver Better Health and Cut Costs****
**Dr. Robert Malone outlined a sweeping new HHS proposal called the **Administration for a Healthy America (AHA)** — a new division designed to unify prevention, chronic disease, and public health programs under one roof to better serve Americans. **Lockdowns Failed Miserably****
**NIH Director Dr. Jay Bhattacharya highlighted Sweden’s success during COVID, where **mortality dropped without lockdowns.** He wrote, “They were immune to the folly and harms of lockdown.”
---
**Senator Threatens to Subpoena Fauci****
**Senator Rand Paul called Dr. Fauci’s funding of Wuhan lab research **“the most catastrophic failure in modern medical history,”** warning that if he won’t testify voluntarily, he will be subpoenaed. **FDA Implements Radical Transparency****
**The FDA released **new internal checklists for reviewing drug applications**. Dr. Marty Makary said the move will streamline approvals and boost transparency for both companies and consumers. **Department of War Reinstates Discharged Soldiers****
**Secretary Kennedy praised Under Secretary Anthony Tata for **reinstating service members discharged for refusing the COVID-19 vaccine****,** calling it a long-overdue act of justice. **President Trump Removes High Fructose Corn Syrup from Coke****
**President Trump reached a deal with Coca-Cola to**replace high fructose corn syrup with cane sugar** in U.S. products, marking another step forward for MAHA’s push toward real food and better health. **Peanut Scandal Goes Viral****
**An HHS-shared op-ed revealed that early peanut introduction for infants has **cut allergy rates by 43%** and prevented over 60,000 cases annually. **Cheryl Hines: Parents Deserve to Be Heard****
**Speaking with Tucker Carlson, Cheryl Hines**criticized the medical establishment for ignoring parents** of vaccine-injured children, saying, “Why are we shouting them down?”
---
| [](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=CjIPhRT4CzYYH7usCPIijwPT9w3EQQ61ndLm2qnONVTfUgjJnyGKr0MEgX88jJZ_MVKUepTjUwVS85m9R3Wc-IycrDqfmyP5zmFVnkW4IhY&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_wins_and_media_251027_3&n=4 "KEEP READING") [KEEP READING](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=CjIPhRT4CzYYH7usCPIijwPT9w3EQQ61ndLm2qnONVTfUgjJnyGKr0MEgX88jJZ_MVKUepTjUwVS85m9R3Wc-IycrDqfmyP5zmFVnkW4IhY&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_wins_and_media_251027_3&n=4)
---

[ ](https://www.mahaaction.com/r?u=4ZVGYeoz2xiTn3loqsmrT_uf724Dzgpm-Ij45CSqp0ezS6tUnkWPAD0uWA3p-Cu0&e=674c9b4e7ea0bed829630c80c355f23d&utm_source=maha&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=maha_wins_and_media_251027_3&n=5)

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: “Democrats get warning sign in New Hampshire”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
National Republicans are cheering this poll.
🚨Peter, this isn’t the news we wanted to share.
**_Republican John Sununu and Democrat Chris Pappas are virtually tied in the latest poll for New Hampshire’s Senate seat._**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96884?refcode=em20251027-9618&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9618%2E614464%2EyJR_xu)
**[Help us stay ahead by splitting a donation of whatever you can between Chris Pappas and Heartland Patriots today »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96884?refcode=em20251027-9618&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9618%2E614464%2EyJR_xu)**
**Reminder:** _New Hampshire IS a purple state._
Democrats can only take back the Senate majority if we defend this open seat, and Republicans know it. They’re going to throw everything they can into defeating our grassroots movement to elect Chris.
**But Chris Pappas knows how to win tough races, and he’ll take on anyone to do what’s best for Granite Staters.**
Sununu and the GOP will have the backing of corporate PACs and their megadonors, so we need to keep building our strong people-powered campaign to fight back.
**[Can you split a donation between Chris and Heartland Patriots to help us defend this seat for Democrats and Granite Staters? $15, $50, or even just $5 will help power our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96884?refcode=em20251027-9618&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9618%2E614464%2EyJR_xu)**
**[Donate](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96884?refcode=em20251027-9618&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9618%2E614464%2EyJR_xu)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you.
— Chris Pappas HQ

Democrats can only take back the Senate majority if we defend this open seat, and Republicans know it. They’re going to throw everything they can into defeating our grassroots movement to elect Chris. But Chris Pappas knows how to win tough races, and he’ll take on anyone to do what’s best for Granite Staters. Sununu and the GOP will have the backing of corporate PACs and their megadonors, so we need to keep building our strong people-powered campaign to fight back. Thank you, thank you, thank you. — Chris Pappas HQ | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. I’m the Democrat running to flip PA-10 — one of the closest U.S. House races in the country. **_This month has been a stark reminder of exactly why I am running for Congress._** The federal government shut down causing millions of furloughed workers to miss paychecks, families are unable to access SNAP benefits and health premiums are about to skyrocket. And how is our so-called leader Congressman Scott Perry addressing this catastrophe? He is making national headlines for disrespecting our troops. You know, the selfless men and women who are currently worrying about when their next paycheck is coming. It makes as little sense to me as it does to you. What is clear is the fact that we have to get Scott Perry out of Congress. But I need your help. **[Right now, I am facing my end-of-month fundraising deadline and I need to raise $10,000 before Friday at midnight. clean_body: We have to get Scott Perry out of Congress. Janelle Stelson is running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi, it’s Janelle Stelson. I’m the Democrat running to flip PA-10 — one of the closest U.S. House races in the country. This month has been a stark reminder of exactly why I am running for Congress. The federal government shut down causing millions of furloughed workers to miss paychecks, families are unable to access SNAP benefits and health premiums are about to skyrocket. And how is our so-called leader Congressman Scott Perry addressing this catastrophe? He is making national headlines for disrespecting our troops. You know, the selfless men and women who are currently worrying about when their next paycheck is coming. It makes as little sense to me as it does to you. What is clear is the fact that we have to get Scott Perry out of Congress. But I need your help. = | | = Political pundits are calling this race to flip PA-10 one of the closest U.S. House races in the country, and Democrats’ biggest shot at winning back a Congressional majority. There is a lot on the line, which makes it all the more critical that I hit my October fundraising goal. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Janelle | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson is someone we can trust. She has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for over three decades as an Emmy Award-winning journalist. Now, she is taking on MAGA extremist Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — standing up for abortion rights, investing in high-quality healthcare and education, and bringing good-paying jobs to the district. =** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. body:

Peter, we’re proud
to share this number with you:

[ A ]A graphic showing Abdul and text that says 'Money taken from AIPAC:
$0.00'

This $0.00 represents something rare in politics today — integrity.

While establishment Democrats chase checks from AIPAC and corporate PACs,
Abdul is doing the opposite by rejecting their money and proving that you
can build a winning campaign powered entirely by the people.

Voters are sick of the status quo. They see politicians who say one thing
on the campaign trail, then take AIPAC’s money and vote to send our tax
dollars overseas to bomb schools and hospitals instead of investing in
communities here at home.

Too many of our leaders would rather curry favor with billionaire donors
than build a coalition of working people. That’s why Democrats are losing
trust.

But Abdul is fighting to change that. He’s showing what it looks like when
a campaign refuses to play by the establishment’s rules — and wins by
standing with the people, not the powerful.

In order to do that, we need you with us. Every individual donation helps
us reach more voters and prove that grassroots power beats billionaire
money.

Mark Warner

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. Should you wish to stop receiving emails from us, you can unsubscribe at any time by . If you wish to unsubscribe from this offer, please . Stark Media LLC appreciates your feedback and inquiries. However, please note that by law we are unable to provide individualized advice. To guarantee that our emails keep reaching your inbox, please add our email address to your contact list. | Unauthorized replication Stark Media LLC, duplication, or dissemination of our content, either entirely or partially, is strictly prohibited without prior written consent from Stark Media LLC. We appreciate your adherence to our intellectual property rights. If you require assistance, you can reach us via email at mailto:support@yourcapitalminds.com "support@yourcapitalminds.com". I'm asking my strongest long-time supporters to join me in stepping up for our great Democrats on the ballot. I’m reaching out with five reasons why you should chip in $5 to this campaign today. >>

5. And lastly, I won the Democratic nomination in June with one of the slimmest margins in history, and as we turn to the General Election, I need your support now more than ever.

name: Reagan Dunn
subject: A little more than a week to go— Let’s finish strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
Ballots are out. Every vote — and every dollar — counts. | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=7e4baaba1b&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cd3a92de8b8c/a-little-more-than-a-week-to-go-lets-finish-strong?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=5ad5613c1c&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friend,

We're officially **just a little over a week from Election Day**, and ballots are already in mailboxes across King County.

We don't want this race to be close! Your support right now could make all the difference.

I'm proud to have earned the endorsement of community leaders across our district -- including every mayor in the district from the cities of **Bellevue, Issaquah, Enumclaw, Kent, Maple Valley, Renton, Covington, Newcastle, and Black Diamond** -- as well as organizations like the **King County Police Officers Guild** and the **Eastside Business Alliance**. They know I'll keep standing up for affordability, accountability, and public safety.

**_But my opponent is trying to buy this election with his own money_** and false attacks, while pushing for higher taxes, fewer police, and policies that would make our region less affordable. We can't afford to sit back.

Will you [make a contribution of **$25, $50, or $100** today](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=f5f7ab0507&e=77eef70c61) to help us finish strong? \---------------
[DONATE NOW!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=98149939cf&e=77eef70c61)
\---------------- And don't forget -- **return your ballot today**. Let's make sure your vote is counted early!

Thank you,
**Reagan Dunn**

subject: BREAKING: President Trump's Approval Rating SKYROCKETS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:

subject: Together, we’re building a future where we protect abortion access, workers’ rights, and our fair court.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251027-757&t=1&akid=758%2E294397%2Efsh-n_)
What if we told you that just $1 can stop right-wing special interests?
It’s true.
You see, right-wing special interests are preparing to pour tens of millions of dollars into Wisconsin to try and buy a seat on our state’s highest court.
**But their money can’t match the grassroots momentum of thousands of people pitching in together — people like you.**
When you pitch in $1, someone else pitches in too. Then another. And then one more after that.
_That’s_ how we build a people-powered campaign strong enough to overcome the far-right money machine that’s trying to overthrow our democracy.
Together, we’re building a future where we protect abortion access, workers’ rights, and our fair court.
[**Will you start that chain reaction of support by pitching in $1 or any amount right now?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/154?c0=em_ms_jct_20251027_1_ak.kcmpaL&refcode=em20251027-757&t=2&akid=758%2E294397%2Efsh-n_)

name: Matias, United We Dream
subject: Uniting in the face of adversity
body:
Our spirit of resistance is stronger than ever. Help us continue empowering immigrant youth and allies: | | | Peter — Now more than ever, we need to come together to support one another and build strong, connected communities. United We Dream Congress**** will do this by bringing immigrant youth and allies together for authentic connection, with a goal to draw strength from our shared history and honor the legacies that brought us to this point. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIjLP_dyTavBD0xIKPQPlAwK9kNO5DgEYk5BR9VsEqfIrOpAZwcMPx0cPgyq8E34b_dAlKQ1ARvBEnfURiSVKHU4TkzPtVJtj0c9l2AujcqMlshvTq6Y7OxgXIS9KWzg96-aqB-ZJTyxLvp8QxL4XX8BZS03L9EExfAU0B8TwiW9AIem4KT7MlweFoxIqQ-pNjI5qQbva_obUvTsdEJcwxHj_SrYcnG-YUKplaeBM1niDRMktcAE8JszPNHPE-5Yvwlo1NI-5I2pjAcqN8V_SpKAEs4tDYM7HKGMnnuNl-QssoGMSb-MnUF0IY5WAtGWhJvLrvwKxFExsqzHvKS-g_iiQrXEinSAfy2Q_f6fqOs30lY1FW2fmUJ-uOtI6aSeM0gn1IaJSzXocCoWpD77IhmF2dOFyUBdWo-kGUFrvQQlrwSRAPu1EooWUG_BJV-OTo5RNFdCdIyAS5Po6W80J5T0/4l3/61YD2abFTXyy2aCXPeWw2Q/h0/h001.l-V-CEZgE2f0w_2BrShdplV_b3iq48uz8hYTUACTzmw) This year's UWD Congress is two days packed with profound reaffirmation of our vision for immigrant justice. Over 300 attendees — including UWD members, educators, and advocates — will join to safely reconnect, heal, and empower each other to stand in unwavering solidarity. **Authoritarian challenges make this an urgent mission.** Our young people must know unequivocally that they are neither isolated in their struggles nor the first to confront such formidable obstacles. [**These spaces serve as an empowering reminder that our fight is part of a longer, ongoing lineage of resistance. Please, help UWD keep building these sacred and necessary spaces for immigrant youth and allies with a $5 donation today:**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIjLP_dyTavBD0xIKPQPlAwK9kNO5DgEYk5BR9VsEqfIrOpAZwcMPx0cPgyq8E34b_f9dN8zzk-wkR7Z_5hMmZrNVPtA1Ezii7LQeerR7t-aGBoBEh9OIztIOdmhZNAVbgCA2wWoeohiCCX-Ns9giPD7925NVR8zwlJ9yYlp-xZ0uCWrDyOAayitV2uMoWMeFbPSbVjG7ppfSTGafKHIUBVb_IQ1bSktBD2M1LeMpumFlrxXYqh7qmFEh5sOM1SSkG8AE5nrkmDsnPj1RvmoWaxXGBYgPK2P7UNzN60A8S02Bv4p_ujKGFq7vunz0Kmpy7wIYJqa_gyBhdLbJJjS7QvNfdcd5pAh6P5n5ISFsRAPHq4zHb3hQ6nEzAMO2_4dpn3UgKyW_6PuB6OmekiR8TlcowKHx0aY7JdeDQYTwklPjmeas0b2H-heNzEUHiuzxH9pb3c0Cl11fjkcBWhs6NhOad4XkdxCIlOS-DuiVM48B/4l3/61YD2abFTXyy2aCXPeWw2Q/h1/h001.YPR1iR7lANmixtfurCbKxJgAZu0OVw8qjgBVN19wWw0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAekMDT887VITlFf_D1bXsJIjLP_dyTavBD0xIKPQPlAwK9kNO5DgEYk5BR9VsEqfIrOpAZwcMPx0cPgyq8E34b_VPJrn4XdNzD808Mmpo8ZZlxr4lP7jJqGujVw9XfjpAVXsMvOZ9txW1dC6Wu00JrwzjQN1e8Kvkvu_eAYrso1uVN8l40v3RfnPiKhYKskHcbwfpwaEZZr4aqXA-HC-dPopAXH8DZLCavH6lckIiS9ZgUgNUVIUzwJ3rhlZiikkxD-2fZ5pW8gO-Di-4QeuHRz7oK0I0VMO41YUV_7sRi0mn9IhhCAYRzEeLqhAMHCDgT7Lxr_hVhBZ3Lr8uzGMvI8NNCf1kJE2JPKlzl93T6S6uC3XgrSvD49NsC69RRyeJ5USgZZ9EWJibXxQ2NrlfwdkVOMmKD4lugAIrW0YHDWd7CoopL_jOk2ekaTKOAgboTHBIhtTusqVW8f3xQM61vy9M2UvQuKqIBygVQCoM6-p-QQSYsv9w4is3YnKgTi9Zs5c4lBLRHrS2lm8uYkj9kDA/4l3/61YD2abFTXyy2aCXPeWw2Q/h2/h001.E5siavWoZutDFVHKbH4ZLDCGvlyjzBaOA_WGC9jxw14)

clean_body: Our spirit of resistance is stronger than ever. Help us continue empowering immigrant youth and allies: | | | Peter — Now more than ever, we need to come together to support one another and build strong, connected communities. United We Dream Congress** will do this by bringing immigrant youth and allies together for authentic connection, with a goal to draw strength from our shared history and honor the legacies that brought us to this point. This year's UWD Congress is two days packed with profound reaffirmation of our vision for immigrant justice. Over 300 attendees — including UWD members, educators, and advocates — will join to safely reconnect, heal, and empower each other to stand in unwavering solidarity. Authoritarian challenges make this an urgent mission. Our young people must know unequivocally that they are neither isolated in their struggles nor the first to confront such formidable obstacles. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you, Matias, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

Peter, families in Washington state and across the country are already feeling the consequences of Donald Trump's second term:
* **He's illegally taking advantage of the government shutdown to hurt people** – leading to mass firings, and sometimes rehirings, of thousands of federal workers who do critical work for the American people. He’s even threatening to withhold back pay from government employees.

* **His administration has pushed over $1.2 trillion in federal spending cuts through the so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill,"** with Medicaid taking the greatest hit – jeopardizing rural hospitals, community clinics, and long-term care for Americans across the country in order to fund massive tax cuts for billionaires.

* **And now, he's doing NOTHING to stop health care costs from skyrocketing.** Republicans’ refusal to extend the health care tax credits means millions of Americans will see their premiums double, triple, and even quadruple starting next year.

Sen. Patty Murray is working tirelessly to hold the Trump administration accountable and protect families in Washington state and across the country. But she needs to know where YOU stand.

The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November.
_We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond:_ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It’s why Donald Trump is attacking me from inside the Oval Office._And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at the CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.

Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come. That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. name: Team McBride
subject: Can you chip in $5 to support Sarah and help us reach our goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
What we raise between now and October 31st will determine how effectively we can fight back.
#
**We’re working to raise $20,000 by our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Friday — and here’s why it matters:**
Right now, Donald Trump is scheming to consolidate his power, rewarding his allies and billionaire donors, and using the federal government to punish his political enemies.
And in Congress, the majority party is marching in lockstep to stay in his good graces.
Sarah is standing up to them, but sometimes that makes her an easy target for billionaire-backed Republicans — and that’s why we need your help.
[**What we raise between now and October 31st will determine how effectively Sarah can fight back. If you’re able, will you pitch in $5 to help us reach our goal?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251027-1.HGv6rl&refcode=em20251027-2443&amount=5&t=1&akid=2443%2E21716%2E8wNCSJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251027-1.HGv6rl&amount=5&refcode=em20251027-2443&t=2&akid=2443%2E21716%2E8wNCSJ)**
Your donation today will be put _immediately_ to work to:
→ Keep Sarah’s voice strong in Congress as she calls out corruption and delivers for Delaware
→ Shine a light on Republicans’ cruelty and make sure voters know about the real harm they’re doing
→ Help Democrats build the grassroots power we need to hold the GOP accountable and take back the House in 2026
[**This is one of our _last_ major fundraising deadlines before the midterm election year. So please, pitch in $5 or whatever you can to power our movement. **](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251027-1.HGv6rl&refcode=em20251027-2443&amount=5&t=3&akid=2443%2E21716%2E8wNCSJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251027-1.HGv6rl&amount=5&refcode=em20251027-2443&t=22&akid=2443%2E21716%2E8wNCSJ)**
Thank you,
— Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251027-1&t=23&refcode2=2443_21716_8wNCSJ&akid=2443%2E21716%2E8wNCSJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=2443%2E21716%2E8wNCSJ)

name: Jena Griswold
subject: It’s almost November…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251027-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251027-email]
Peter -
We’ve made incredible progress this month. Just in the last few weeks, I’ve met with Coloradans in Paonia, Montrose, Grand Junction, Castle Rock, Ft. Collins, Boulder, and Denver, and I got to tell you: the momentum is building.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251027-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251027-email]
But I know this: Donald Trump and his MAGA allies aren’t backing down when it comes to attacking the stability of our nation and our rights. They’re working to roll back the progress we’ve made on voting rights, reproductive freedom, and climate action.
That’s why the next Attorney General will be so important. This end-of-month deadline is our chance to show that Coloradans are united behind a campaign that protects democracy, working families, and the Colorado way of life.
Can I count on you to chip in to help us finish October strong? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2510-q4-jg?refcode=251027-email]

clean_body: [] Peter - We’ve made incredible progress this month. Just in the last few weeks, I’ve met with Coloradans in Paonia, Montrose, Grand Junction, Castle Rock, Ft. Collins, Boulder, and Denver, and I got to tell you: the momentum is building. [] But I know this: Donald Trump and his MAGA allies aren’t backing down when it comes to attacking the stability of our nation and our rights. They’re working to roll back the progress we’ve made on voting rights, reproductive freedom, and climate action. That’s why the next Attorney General will be so important. This end-of-month deadline is our chance to show that Coloradans are united behind a campaign that protects democracy, working families, and the Colorado way of life. Can I count on you to chip in to help us finish October strong? body:
Hospitals Here to Stay! 🏥

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/robforpa/robs-nepa-rundown-8n42khwgss?e=131e83a3c2)
---
| | | | |
---
| | Good Afternoon,
While the government is still being held hostage by radical Senate Democrats, we’d like to give you a bit of good news: Tenor Health has signed a purchase agreement with Commonwealth Health Systems. This is an important step in making sure Regional Hospital and Moses Taylor Hospital in Scranton and Wilkes-Barre General Hospital remain open and are able to continue serving the community. Below is Rob’s statement on the sale:
“I am encouraged by this positive step toward ensuring continuity of care for our community,” Bresnahan said. “These hospitals are essential to Scranton and the broader region, not only as providers of critical health services, but as major employers and anchors of our local economy. My team and I will continue to work closely with all local, state, and federal leaders involved to help bring this agreement across the finish line and ensure that quality, accessible care remains available to everyone in Northeastern Pennsylvania.”
[**Read more here.**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=a07482c2c3&e=131e83a3c2)
---
|
---
|
---

Zohran Mamdani is a dangerous radical leftist who will be devastating for nearby NYC. We would really like to know what Portland Paige thinks about this. After all, she warned Democrats against rejecting Mamdani [**in a quote to CNN**](https://robforpa.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4aaa9665caa590d8638bb435d&id=56842536a4&e=131e83a3c2). Will she denounce Leader Jeffries' endorsement of Mamdani, or will she side with the communist?
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | Our Volunteer of the Week is Dwayne, from Bikers for Trump. He’s been a rockstar getting people involved to grow the Republican Party across our district. Thanks for all your hard work, Dwayne!
---
|
---
| | Portland Paige is campaigning for Congress against Rob while also seeking a second term as Mayor. She is a political climber and far-left extremist who has backed open borders, defunding the police, and even supports taxpayer-funded sex change operations for illegal immigrants. We must stop her and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

name: Team Bohannan
subject: Poor Mariannette's feelings 🥺
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
After Iowans, reporters, and pretty much everyone who understands how democracy works raked her over the coals for ignoring Iowans, Mariannette Miller-Meeks finally caved and decided to hold a “town hall.”

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118106338/578676396/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDE5MTE2Yi02ZWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pmUl1OIxOcEs4uHrmDMVDA9Mg5Ntm9L0BCQGuMtsGXE=)
Peter, Mariannette Miller-Meeks said it herself: "I don't have to hold a town hall so you can come and yell at me." That's quite a thing for a representative to say, isn't it?

After Iowans, reporters, and pretty much everyone who understands how democracy works raked her over the coals for ignoring Iowans, Mariannette Miller-Meeks finally caved and decided to hold a "town hall."

**Except it wasn't in person. It wasn't even open. It was a telephone event where every single question and participant was hand-picked by her team to make sure no one would hurt her feelings or make her uncomfortable.**

clean_body: These changes might definitely affect you. So I want you to be the first to hear about what I just signed into law! | | | | | MESSAGE FROM THE PRESIDENT ON SOCIAL SECURITY! Friend, These changes might definitely affect you! Here’s what happened to Social Security: I just signed into LAW something I’m very proud of: NO TAXES ON SOCIAL SECURITY! But don’t thank me yet. Democrats and Radical Judges are trying to shut down all the progress we’ve made TOGETHER. They hate that I’m putting the American people first. They’d rather keep wasting your money on their radical agendas. It’s going to be hard, but in order to make this plan a reality, I’m going to need your help TODAY, not tomorrow. Tomorrow will be too late. All I’m asking is for you to respond to me, IMMEDIATELY: Thank you, Donald J. Trump | | | | | | | Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc. ## Commonsense Corner:
---
The virtue-signaling Democrats are at it again—clutching their pearls and melting down over the White House ballroom project. You’ve probably seen them ranting and raving, so there’s no need to rehash it. But this is just another case of Trump Derangement Syndrome rotting any last shred of common sense these people had. White House modifications are [nothing new](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/XXCsLPseVOnmVcg5EXMfPQTuBG3ClnE7DzUGXGnbaNCLfV2AoRrJfPjJatL3EMV2qiH3kXnLc1YvqChNFBy7t9ZvYMVFsICC5U_5CLGE01gLw_Kd-ZLQmPFb7SzvDjZ1nW1leU1DT-S55gQhQOuxJdE7Tf3RTiRgzRe8TIx9AkQoQ-q-kLrhPVoyQlYjTjcIuiyNZ-udcyBXP3NEyueJvr6IWRWKFdiPy3cbPArPJlGFS7XLsjajxzsrCtudEjr80TJpMid5WmFK6wGw-kB-0AC20cfQ6KY1_3HxXnWFPSqMp37ZawEAme8Vs8m_Mjyd2bC-toFxm4zvt0R8Kz1l3UcHGv66bwf-IgefFE4q-02Yb9VR-wssbJFVyNZHu5n7RAmC3u_4QoZ5AEoZZkbwJtXVTDty52VKyWubeGuoaXdRIcrgXO2smGNZ8hMoQpLJhEKIEDVUv7Ad8FMfvhmhNW24Iv-_Gw3JTbnRBiMmA8LyKcYewpg9YlrGBA1bHWUXI4Gz3zNpeohE1OvvfW7v0i7Dqhfxe-zsb3ykOapBe2xLRQCthzsG0ar33JXd7LWQl2GkDkS1VNHG5bCkNIhL14rVLA/0BhbNAXgF3DMNWWDGOHvks5oe4DuYgaI/14). From Truman to Kennedy, a lot of presidents have left their mark on the place! And let’s be honest, some of the renovations were pretty pointless. Can we talk about Obama’s basketball court!? _This_ makeover actually makes a lot of sense. The White House is one of the most beautiful, historic buildings in the world, yet it lacks a proper ballroom to host major events with world leaders. Instead, they’ve been throwing up an unsightly tent on the lawn. President Trump (with help from generous donors, not taxpayers) is building a stunning, permanent [ballroom](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/wXDG3p_oqH21gFlbeADyF7rtQUbrbDHItV9nbw8KmdcZeTh9NuSYhYyvWsfGHnsxYrlgU83g1cxPvZrPGjy0nADIEOovsOpK1Il7zPN5U8cEfrZfWT2GpQuGFxLE0TkqDb6SeVLqbfBNcwql-LdgP2OFD6qsrQqxsj23jMo3jWwSMFBnJsYk6DBUBfEoJh3EF6cErNY59kEoE5m3vyX_1bXZrhqc3w_NDYPmeLMkCK2xFLwXrYl1eHleXOCfNssmt5d79qo_wA4OxDnQYKbuc7T-hB0dT8WMgb1qS7GKMUW8iWZ6CnWk0vXQVZWdz3rb-EMNhs8uW3XrWFjqWUheure9RTaGPfCOfEX6j5NvzRyxmxeGS6epZ9NXNHN1oS8qcJzw1ja3C5-NJX2BhUtfZhX49cKGCGnQ-e3v5I7ip2DfTOn19fd2diZBgJfDZb11hpfl2sreEjvnne9bVuDUdkdZQ8m9gaVHLBZuIFKkqndsfddRk5HxxaJ_UtLlGEyoir5brD_KMskDfmuZf_v3vfCIcMzM930og7L5hM_72YQvG3eLUWNmQBsY_CLG8TIzMDiiHI5F1wVC4PJ-_uDdGHhLq69OYkwwnBMPdW3Snb8LwwxnoxAZ/2IWct8c2pn14apffnNI9I8dtbuM9iVM8/14) that’ll serve our country for generations. And the Left’s reaction? Whine, complain, blame—rinse and repeat. Talk about first-world problems!

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: The virtue-signaling Democrats are at it again—clutching their pearls and melting down over the White House ballroom project. You’ve probably seen them ranting and raving, so there’s no need to rehash it. But this is just another case of Trump Derangement Syndrome rotting any last shred of common sense these people had. White House modifications are . From Truman to Kennedy, a lot of presidents have left their mark on the place! And let’s be honest, some of the renovations were pretty pointless. Can we talk about Obama’s basketball court!? This makeover actually makes a lot of sense. The White House is one of the most beautiful, historic buildings in the world, yet it lacks a proper ballroom to host major events with world leaders. Instead, they’ve been throwing up an unsightly tent on the lawn. President Trump (with help from generous donors, not taxpayers) is building a stunning, permanent that’ll serve our country for generations. And the Left’s reaction? Whine, complain, blame—rinse and repeat. Talk about first-world problems! | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you think President Trump’s ballroom will be a positive addition to the White House? As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: RFK Jr. is attacking folks like my son, Ben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107162/578679126/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.27_Ben-EOM_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE4YTU2MS02ZmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1Sda84YbMU6rUsy_SMlbMZknS8CoydtC_y5xh1GpJQ=) Folks, this is Maggie Hassan, and I’d like to take a moment to talk about my 37-year-old son, Ben.

When Ben was born with cerebral palsy, I knew his life would look a little different from other kids. As Ben grew up, I became an advocate to ensure that kids with disabilities would have every opportunity to succeed.

Being Ben’s mother taught me about the critical role that public health plays in helping people with disabilities thrive. At times, Ben has needed up to nine doctors, a dozen or more different medications, and 24-hour care. **So when I hear top public health officials like RFK Jr. make offensive statements about folks with disabilities and attempt to slash the programs that support them, I am outraged. And so are millions of Americans.**

RFK Jr.’s radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and disinformation campaign around autism undermine key rights and protections for people with disabilities. We can’t stop calling him out.

Donald Trump and RFK Jr. are attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access. This injustice and cruelty cannot stand.

**_[I’m more than ready to continue taking action in the face of RFK Jr.’s prejudice, falsehoods, and malice, but I need your support: Will you please chip in $5 or more before my October deadline to fuel my work in the Senate and elect a wave of disability champions in the midterms?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107164/578679130/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.27_Ben-EOM_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE4YTU2MS02ZmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1Sda84YbMU6rUsy_SMlbMZknS8CoydtC_y5xh1GpJQ=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [ CHIP IN $5 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107166/578679132/1734447991?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.10.27_Ben-EOM_B1_F1_S1_C1_60OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE4YTU2MS02ZmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u1Sda84YbMU6rUsy_SMlbMZknS8CoydtC_y5xh1GpJQ=)

name: Earle-Sears, Winsome
subject: the ball is in your court, Peter

Peter, I'm relying on you entirely right now.

I have an important update and a heartfelt request. _This is a sensitive issue, and I need you to understand just how crucial it is._Please_ take a moment to read through the entire message!_

As a Christian, a mother, and a Marine, I have never backed down from a fight. Even when things looked tough in 2021, Governor Youngkin and I fought back and won big. We pulled off a historic win and have been getting conservative victories for Virginians ever since! Now, I'm running for Governor to continue our work.

**But I need your help now more than ever.**
---
While I was _legally restricted_ from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign during Virginia's legislative session, my presumptive Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, built a _**MASSIVE**_ war chest. _**She even got a $500K donation from a far-Left group all at once! **_
---
The polls show we're tied, but Spanberger's **MONSTROUS** cash advantage has given her a __**significant**__ edge. **If we don't close the gap, our conservative values and way of life will be in _serious_ jeopardy, and Virginia will be pushed down the path of socialism!**

I'm coming to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine for your help. _I'm counting on you to help me fight back._**[**Will you send a donation today to support my campaign? Every dollar brings us closer to victory.**](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/AL5FhaBRJRE7WjGTP8O9sNiHyh242JkfSNnecNKJ7k1n9yLAqI3MS4GOxFMpijGz7Ce-qpv3mH7PulUtik8yueQX2WWob4AaWIZ_pX-ArXQdSo1koqz7Bh0F0y7t9zqf2xYCEN5sWCDLCMTi0hUHzXcqhrjW8LSkscvouO3Ge00gDrkcCIzHO6NmgiRFNHxMcx0outrKJ9yJWBcv_CPX9VuYqLofQmmdRKPOC7KqwBlzPWYK0Zq0qZK5dekMya_1WMSNYUW92yQVcWEyE71I5JrOF1vToDNTiOtsndLvQruA2JZB1VV3u-vuEcT7n3SFA9QtBCZEpWG8m1Yiud8id2iHPI5uoRclM_pN6WBeJrXJfC8QvMdy0egohXSPabk4VR6wKol_0wlNOg-mIILzZif7hC5eXrp4EU_jV52yluEc7357BJzAkzT-FboAyc4UnyjM7h8Vmj2Gzuyu1es-44CbyU9V7Di5FsafxEc0SE7ZHdF0LTXHAG5CUoobanSsvk2V6wG0m9quUqMQYpUAsIV45YhUTwpIbAKuaQEDbrwmz2fFlE5IgZUXkWHGwaOCCCQrQIRdhQUvxLY6v3LU7R-CgStIpDbkwEYWyhd7EoTHeXHcysa7_zltbXp6WyG9wwFqOtXIF5fV-ucqOjvEDPwS1jWY9rH5ce4Xdv1MMXgjpAerEI02YbXC_7qSWjap_OutRwd7_-N_phXeC7wMWqSNkV4xnLWwnOkWGPOXdxlaEJTKietCqOTDcS56gwcP9AhzpM3AmrBb-_D1JFGPwiwbcpM106s4tDCgzl6salrDx_IECUFtMcgg8jpMuhk_wPPr8acIlNuh4dUX6FxYLDKw8bAUs5SCgrHJ-9nYuvmPZ_3RimtvtjGFnA/ncwa52-4oKHqlZJYO5CA5iXdkVaLZQhT/14)**

clean_body: You’re holding all the cards here| | | You’re holding all the cards here| | | | Peter, I'm relying on you entirely right now. I have an important update and a heartfelt request. This is a sensitive issue, and I need you to understand just how crucial it is.Please take a moment to read through the entire message! As a Christian, a mother, and a Marine, I have never backed down from a fight. Even when things looked tough in 2021, Governor Youngkin and I fought back and won big. We pulled off a historic win and have been getting conservative victories for Virginians ever since! Now, I'm running for Governor to continue our work. But I need your help now more than ever. While I was legally restricted from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign during Virginia's legislative session, my presumptive Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, built a MASSIVE war chest. She even got a $500K donation from a far-Left group all at once! The polls show we're tied, but Spanberger's MONSTROUS cash advantage has given her a significant edge. If we don't close the gap, our conservative values and way of life will be in serious jeopardy, and Virginia will be pushed down the path of socialism! I'm coming to you as a Christian, a mother, and a Marine for your help. I'm counting on you to help me fight back. I'm not asking for a lot - just a small contribution to help us level the playing field. The fate of our Commonwealth hangs in the balance and I know we can win this battle together. Here's the truth: if we don't act NOW , the Democrat elites will continue to outpace us and our conservative mission will be cut short! If you can't donate at this time, I understand. All I ask is that please keep me and my team in your prayers and I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving! Ever Forward, Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet! Peter,

Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda.

Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back.

I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. **I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos.**

Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans.

_**Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe.

[**CONTRIBUTE WHAT YOU CAN →**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a942f9b8ff0440548eb1ad4a3ba0d8d9&_e=iSGWZl3R9uDSeFpeD3wi7Gsuk1VcyGKTbqnPi6Tra6LMfA2k-xuNbcKQsyBdp7ti5k_K0ySfUP3utAF7zCJr4WOJliUqPBdMlRjEeHvPLvEWO4VvEhZHoh7xcRgJ_Tw_5cu-ePD5nm--VyQpt8UbjRBFU_x1lLO2AgmDy6iknoMJuYmDubPbOxR7Xm511uE06byhNbDfyMOmnmtMg4AVA8zWSWLhW8EebbY6gEK3Z5zCt3TNdagMLwjl_7aKYFGs2fUf1yM94J1t_UiDsH36XOdZRdT0zjWh_OL6ZeCxH3u1blAynbrIaVvZ5fx8L0JoYMgEIAqraYjMhS6OtTADWZR3amGzZ5YercFJOHA_lX9NCm-U8CIgXxzychwJr_kv9xiImhY1H3my297ZE488UMQHfHqWsOLQzXRJ4UvjzEvTiBltYidWe0u84bHWQ0Bxcd0DoXaEM8_UXCMoJer_X9DSykfn4zzMuzarQdDXgk9pjGbpdj9-KO4oXvbfGsr467lC6yB5mIdro4qa1Y5RnXWNSe9Iid9zYE3bYm73fBscWn8eerZ9gFyy_3tnuliHfTNjdIJ-61RHMyQ4LjS074Y2eW9kaEcGMABdggza4IAB6JwIM8zwZJLDeYOXuwZ9CPPfo7XA4ma7YmRqK3sARMBUMpErPJIyJWnSr0_ABnk8k77AzO7Agp4ayLUMvCTc5OY3DZ4OhS6DSSa_W4v92lgwOujbQf2MzHgmtpMswyBO32Jj8DVglgu5NH77Lt5X6m2TmqBPb55wUQmzmfFBrtXL1nbwED0CDkd_7vgK6y9TKo_e16uiCYngGnsOqtOJ)
**_ _[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a942f9b8ff0440548eb1ad4a3ba0d8d9&_e=iSGWZl3R9uDSeFpeD3wi7Gsuk1VcyGKTbqnPi6Tra6LMfA2k-xuNbcKQsyBdp7ti5k_K0ySfUP3utAF7zCJr4WOJliUqPBdMlRjEeHvPLvEWO4VvEhZHoh7xcRgJ_Tw_5cu-ePD5nm--VyQpt8UbjRBFU_x1lLO2AgmDy6iknoMJuYmDubPbOxR7Xm511uE06byhNbDfyMOmnmtMg4AVA8zWSWLhW8EebbY6gEK3Z5zCt3TNdagMLwjl_7aKYFGs2fUf1yM94J1t_UiDsH36XOdZRdT0zjWh_OL6ZeCxH3sM8jn52mQ0bqmrRdjlPUrte62IKHd2C0SyXyoMpgNWCo_V06URLWaMQM-65mtvy0bVulYErVu9_pzmW-GBERm6MHdHPCVQJpDjLyxgl2PblIBcdqyueg7EuWBCYfMdyi06bnz3IZgJieti_aVqckwXz_fwuHch_VQ8LgzK78nVTi71D8sJlLWxtSnUUttEl7psWgKfg8MG8TgewIwYMYBltwWFlD5JSFf56_pWfwdlOppIh2A5c_Z35qvm-Oc6vYBL6MotM-jITWQdQwEx89l2b6NXeoNyNsEvM0bbE4h3vjJ_vIoBr0a2qrNgeMPKJQcadeIyGcYpgM2E0OcJbrKi7IbxKKL832fZEG1_28GvcCGWJ2RtxXyZxpT1FWE4qc4UIDTsQlFl56Wz0CWGucERLwnRNBHubN-ujmtlDWSgp8VHO4ly0ieTMRPz0ORtneOc5lwlSVma7rdViSo_5oWkaVA4hZl0xR8rTKxhu5Dz1gwacC37TVl40MjVfiT7FxkyM1tT6zyehOSmUcgVBF7b)_
**Here’s the spark:** Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. **With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades.** Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good.

**I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom.**

We’re the underdogs, no question. **Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet.** But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything.
