clean_body: Democrats have treated Minnesota like their personal fiefdom - but with your help, we can put those days behind us. | Peter, Picture 2002. You were renting movies at Blockbuster, maybe flipping open that new Motorola phone to call a buddy. CSI was must-watch TV, and the first iPods were hitting the shelves, promising a thousand songs in your pocket. That was the last time a Republican won a full Senate term in Minnesota. Twenty-three years. For over two decades, Democrats have treated this state like their personal fiefdom—silencing conservative voices, pushing radical policies, and turning our Minnesota values into a punching bag for their far-left agenda. Enough is enough. It’s time to take our state - and our country – back. I’m Adam Schwarze, born and raised in the Twin Cities—St. Paul kid, Bloomington hockey player, and a former Navy SEAL and Marine Corps veteran. I enlisted on my 18th birthday, weeks after 9/11, because America called, and I answered. Nine deployments, 70 countries, leading SEAL teams through Iraq’s battlefields, commanding covert ops across the Pacific and Middle East, earning valor awards and early promotions—I’ve served with everything I’ve got. Now, I’m home, and what I see in Minnesota breaks my heart: skyrocketing prices crushing retirees, open borders flooding our communities with drugs and crime, and Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, my opponent, ready to double down on the chaos. Peggy Flanagan? She’s Walz’s shadow: suing Minneapolis police while riots burned our cities in 2020, blaming law-and-order folks for her party’s failures, and now eyeing an open Minnesota Senate seat to push more tax hikes, fan the flame of culture wars not yet started, and spearhead policies that put illegals ahead of hardworking Minnesotans. Under their watch, crime spiked. Walz talks “Minnesota nice,” but his budget cuts and fiscal flops have left our veterans ignored, our police underfunded, and our neighborhoods less safe. Here’s the spark: Recent polls from their own side show a generic Republican trailing by just two points. With United States Senator Tina Smith retiring, this seat is open for the first time in decades. Minnesota hasn’t gone red in a presidential race since Nixon in ’72, but the tide’s turning—Trump’s legacy is firing up folks like you, retired patriots who’ve built lives on hard work and faith. We can flip this seat, secure the Republican Senate majority, and give President Trump the muscle to drain the swamp for good. I’m running to cut taxes, back our police, secure the border, and defend the values you’ve spent your life upholding—family, faith, and freedom. We’re the underdogs, no question. Minnesota’s been blue since the days of dial-up internet. But I’ve led missions through worse odds—high-stakes ops where one mistake meant everything. Our last fundraising push got us halfway to our goal, but with Q4 filings looming and Flanagan raking in cash from coastal elites, You—retired vets, churchgoers, grandparents who’ve paid your dues—can fuel the ads, the door-knockers, the momentum to shock the system. You’ve got a choice. Delete this and let Democrats keep choking our future. Or stand with a battle-hardened SEAL ready to fight—not with noise, but with the quiet professionalism that wins wars. Help me make it real. Because we built this country on sacrifice and resolve, and we’re not done fighting. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Justin Riemer - RITE President
subject: RITE PAC Scores Initial Win in Arizona “Never Residents” Challenge
body:
Maricopa County Superior Court has denied a state motion to dismiss |
---
| |
---
| | **RITE PAC Scores Initial Win in Arizona “Never Residents” Challenge** PHOENIX, AZ — The Maricopa County Superior Court has [denied](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=638a1e21ae&e=ea91f782ea) the state’s motion to dismiss in a lawsuit challenging an Arizona statute that permits individuals who have never lived in the United States (“Never Residents”) to register and vote in Arizona if their parent is a registered voter in the state. Restoring Integrity and Trust in Elections PAC (“RITE PAC”) is supporting the Republican Party of Arizona’s participation as a plaintiff in the suit, which also includes the Republican National Committee. The suit contends that the statute violates the Arizona Constitution’s residency requirements for voting.

“This is an important victory for the rule of law and for common sense,” said Justin Riemer, President of RITE PAC. “Arizona’s Constitution plainly requires voters to be residents of the state. The idea that someone who has never set foot in Arizona could vote in the state’s elections defies both logic and law. We’re grateful the court recognized that this challenge deserves to be heard on the merits.”

The suit does not challenge the voting rights of any military voters or their spouses and dependents, who are eligible to vote under the federal Uniformed and Overseas Citizens Absentee Voting Act (UOCAVA). ###

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name to defend the Voting Rights Act before it’s too late
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
The cornerstone of our democracy is under attack
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107755/578681063/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzZmZjE4Mi03MGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKaVjVjUQ25FYhdyhqR7iJaT0upampnmKw9krZbG4Ms=)
Hi, it's Robert Garcia — the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
**I won’t sugarcoat it:_Right now, the Voting Rights Act — the cornerstone of American democracy — is under attack._**
Section 2 of the VRA outlaws racial discrimination in voting. It’s what ensures every voter — no matter their race, zip code, or background — has a fair shot at electing leaders who truly represent their communities.
But extremist politicians are trying to gut it, paving the way for more gerrymandering, more voter suppression, and less representation for communities of color.
**The Supreme Court must protect the Voting Rights Act.** We cannot go back to an era where politicians pick their voters instead of voters picking their representatives. We cannot allow decades of civil rights progress to be erased in a single court decision.
**[That’s why I’m calling on you to join me in demanding that SCOTUS uphold Section 2 and preserve the VRA — because free and fair elections are not negotiable. Add your name to our petition right now to stand up for the Voting Rights Act and defend every American’s right to vote.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107756/578681064/1472272769?refcode=251027_RG_VRA-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzZmZjE4Mi03MGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKaVjVjUQ25FYhdyhqR7iJaT0upampnmKw9krZbG4Ms=&emci=a4800898-46b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4c6ff182-70b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107757/578681065/1472272769?refcode=251027_RG_VRA-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzZmZjE4Mi03MGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JKaVjVjUQ25FYhdyhqR7iJaT0upampnmKw9krZbG4Ms=&emci=a4800898-46b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=4c6ff182-70b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
We’ve come too far to go backward. Let’s make sure the Court — and the country — hears us loud and clear.
Thank you
Robert Garcia

We cannot allow decades of civil rights progress to be erased in a single court decision. We’ve come too far to go backward. Let’s make sure the Court — and the country — hears us loud and clear. Thank you Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

Hi there, it’s Jay.
As of this morning, more than 800,000 Virginians have already voted early! This is democracy in action, and it shows that people across the Commonwealth are paying attention.
And they should, because here’s the truth: ours is one of the most important elections in the country this year.
2025 is an “off-year,” and most states aren’t voting, which means all eyes are on Virginia. What happens here will shape the national conversation heading into 2026 and beyond.
If we win, we’ll prove that fairness, decency, and common sense still have a home in America.
If we lose, Donald Trump and Jason Miyares will keep their foothold in Virginia and continue to drag us backward with their extreme agenda.

Does he have to actually pull the trigger?Fellow American,
In our recent debate, I pressed Abigail Spanberger to take a clear stand on Jay Jones, and I refused to back down. I asked her point-blank why she wouldn't say that Jones' remarks were not okay and that he must leave the race.
And you know what? She still had nothing to say.
That's not leadership. That's cowardice. And it's a clear sign that Abigail Spanberger has no business being elected Governor.
But I am. I'm a leader who will always stand up for what's right, even when it's hard. I'm a leader who will always fight for our values and our way of life. And I'm a leader who needs your support to win this election.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: This Is What Momentum Looks Like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
We’re going to win. Are you in?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1195%2E49239%2E1OYx1D)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7672?t=2&akid=1195%2E49239%2E1OYx1D)
---
Hi, null,

I’ve got some big news to share, straight from the heart of our campaign:
**We've outraised every other Democrat in this race.
**
That’s right. We raised more last quarter than any Democrat running for Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat.
I’m blown away and so incredibly grateful for the grassroots support my campaign has received.

But it’s not just about the dollars. It’s about what those dollars represent: the teachers, auto workers, nurses, retirees, parents, and truck drivers — people who chipped in five bucks at a time because they believe in this grassroots campaign. And they’re willing to stand up and join me in fighting for the workers who built this country.
That’s humbling. _And it’s powerful._

**It tells me our momentum is real. Our message is resonating. And our movement is growing.**
Let me tell you something else: Over the past several months, polls have consistently shown **I’m the best Democrat to defeat the Trump-endorsed Mike Rogers.**

_Why?_ Because Michiganders know I show up and listen, I tell the truth, and I’m always going to fight for them.
They also know I have a winning record:
* I flipped a longtime Republican district blue in 2018.

* I helped save 200,000 auto jobs during the Great Recession while working on President Obama’s Auto Rescue Task Force.

* I’ve consistently delivered for working families in Congress on health care, jobs, infrastructure, and more.

I’m running for U.S. Senate to keep doing what I’ve always done – fight for the people I love and make our government actually work for them.

But here’s the truth: **There’s so much at stake, so we can’t afford to get this wrong.**
This is the battleground race that experts say could ultimately decide Senate control. Trump and his MAGA megadonors know it — which is why they’re lining up behind Mike Rogers and preparing to spend tens of millions of dollars to flip this seat red. **They almost succeeded in 2024, losing by just 0.34% of the vote.**
That’s why early, strong, and consistent support matters. And it’s why I’m so proud of what we’ve built. We’re powered by grassroots supporters who are ready to get in this fight.

So if you’ve been watching this race, reading these emails, and wondering when to get involved, I’ve got a message for you: **This is the moment.**
We’ve got the polling. We’ve got the people. We’ve got the momentum. **_Now, we just need you._**

**[If you’re able to, can you chip in to fuel our campaign, defeat Mike Rogers, and help Democrats flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7673?t=3&akid=1195%2E49239%2E1OYx1D)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7673?t=4&akid=1195%2E49239%2E1OYx1D)
---
Thanks for being in this fight with me.

Let’s win this. More soon.

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7685?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1195%2E49239%2E1OYx1D) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7672?t=6&akid=1195%2E49239%2E1OYx1D)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Birmingham, MI 48009

body:
Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history.

| | |
---

That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**

subject: Stunning rebuke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
RFK Jr.’s “leadership” has been incompetent, politically motivated and potentially deadly.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118107929/578681870/796105017?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk957-su-nd&refcode=jtk957-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQxYjE5Yy03MWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aheWk08iQGiuWvl8evDb7-6InqdqtAvC-u-WbUY8i_I=&emci=a178f46a-25b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=6441b19c-71b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)
Friend,
In a stunning rebuke of Health and Human Services Secretary RFK Jr., six former U.S. surgeons general have issued a joint public warning for the first time in history:
_“... The profound, immediate and unprecedented threat that Kennedy’s policies and positions pose to the nation’s health cannot be ignored.”_

**RFK Jr.’s “leadership” has been incompetent, politically motivated and potentially deadly.**
• He's fired thousands of health care workers – including the director of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.
• He's endangered the future of Medicaid, Medicare, and Obamacare, and with them, affordable access to health care for tens of millions of people.
• He's gutted federal grants for medical research and set back lifesaving cures by decades.
• He's limited access to COVID-19 vaccines across the country and canceled funding that helps states prepare for future pandemics.
The list goes on, friend. **But it’s going to take a massive public outcry to keep up the pressure and ensure he no longer holds this position of power.**

name: Breaking:
subject: Chair of CO Libertarians just became a Democrat — because of Trisha
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Hannah Goodman credits Trisha Calvarese, Boebert’s Democratic opponent, for inspiring her decision to switch parties.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wqc292fACcnEbektPU28XFwAhjvwa33j8kvgMaSQ81wcRpdJ69mUJ5eE8Ta4fLUHBiDZrfLB6Bw8KC7bIvDQQl4Wy571A86FON06_lf2_JaKHNIlXg4Xf1CbEifzOB8CeZddTc5j6qwxmYAfdDPjdWa-PAofsM1wCnHDruaQly5G2pcIcqNGDq433j5DPG25_RpOx7fTBUDaInuoJRIAex5aklmgOKq5fqd-ubFurbk=&c=3ps0VHDclCxR-AjKbbPCbLCkbKukkc9H4lbclOHo4kyAglrUhQmukQ==&ch=r0mY1Bd9sxqQhdyNo5I0V7J-cTIPK_z4VeApSY42TYLAs-HGfhi21A==)
---
|

Peter,
The outgoing Chair of the Colorado Libertarian Party, Hannah Goodman, just changed her party registration to Democrat.
In an interview describing how she came to the decision she credited Democrat Trisha Calvarese for inspiring her decision to switch parties.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wqc292fACcnEbektPU28XFwAhjvwa33j8kvgMaSQ81wcRpdJ69mUJ5eE8Ta4fLUHBiDZrfLB6Bw8KC7bIvDQQl4Wy571A86FON06_lf2_JaKHNIlXg4Xf1CbEifzOB8CeZddTc5j6qwxmYAfdDPjdWa-PAofsM1wCnHDruaQly5G2pcIcqNGDq433j5DPG25_RpOx7fTBUDaInuoJRIAe0u-kA71y1nefEplDUrEqVg=&c=3ps0VHDclCxR-AjKbbPCbLCkbKukkc9H4lbclOHo4kyAglrUhQmukQ==&ch=r0mY1Bd9sxqQhdyNo5I0V7J-cTIPK_z4VeApSY42TYLAs-HGfhi21A==)
---
Goodman said, "Debating with Trish, and then talking after (the debate) with her and watching her social media, it was really refreshing, because I hadn't met a Democrat like her for a very long time... It was such a homecoming sort of feeling for me to hear a Democrat giving that perspective, that Truman-style perspective of the Democratic Party."
It's proof of the strength of Trisha's message, character, and platform.
Trisha is showing how Democrats can win in red areas while the same old DC establishment power brokers recycle the same losing strategy of recruiting former Republicans to run on moderate Republican-lite platforms as Democrats. It isn't fooling anyone.
By returning to the roots of the Democratic Party and running on an unapologetically people-first platform, Trisha is proving that Democrats can win back the voters who have felt abandoned by the party, and form a winning coalition strong enough to defeat MAGA supervillains like her opponent Lauren Boebert.
Lauren Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. She's in Congress because of less than 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. And just last quarter, our campaign outraised Boebert 5-1.
Our campaign has serious momentum, and we are gaining support from Democrats, Republicans, and Libertarians alike. [Will you add your name to the rapidly growing list of Trisha supporters with a contribution of $50, $25, or even $10?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wqc292fACcnEbektPU28XFwAhjvwa33j8kvgMaSQ81wcRpdJ69mUJ5eE8Ta4fLUHBiDZrfLB6Bw8KC7bIvDQQl4Wy571A86FON06_lf2_JaKHNIlXg4Xf1CbEifzOB8CeZddTc5j6qwxmYAfdDPjdWa-PAofsM1wCnHDruaQly5G2pcIcqNGDq433j5DPG25_RpOx7fTBUDaInuoJRIAe8pRPPMZes-8pK_8KFXl_rk=&c=3ps0VHDclCxR-AjKbbPCbLCkbKukkc9H4lbclOHo4kyAglrUhQmukQ==&ch=r0mY1Bd9sxqQhdyNo5I0V7J-cTIPK_z4VeApSY42TYLAs-HGfhi21A==)

clean_body: Hannah Goodman credits Trisha Calvarese, Boebert’s Democratic opponent, for inspiring her decision to switch parties. | | | | | == | Peter, The outgoing Chair of the Colorado Libertarian Party, Hannah Goodman, just changed her party registration to Democrat. In an interview describing how she came to the decision she credited Democrat Trisha Calvarese for inspiring her decision to switch parties. | == Goodman said, "Debating with Trish, and then talking after (the debate) with her and watching her social media, it was really refreshing, because I hadn't met a Democrat like her for a very long time... It was such a homecoming sort of feeling for me to hear a Democrat giving that perspective, that Truman-style perspective of the Democratic Party." It's proof of the strength of Trisha's message, character, and platform. Trisha is showing how Democrats can win in red areas while the same old DC establishment power brokers recycle the same losing strategy of recruiting former Republicans to run on moderate Republican-lite platforms as Democrats. It isn't fooling anyone. By returning to the roots of the Democratic Party and running on an unapologetically people-first platform, Trisha is proving that Democrats can win back the voters who have felt abandoned by the party, and form a winning coalition strong enough to defeat MAGA supervillains like her opponent Lauren Boebert. Lauren Boebert is more vulnerable than she has ever been. She's in Congress because of less than 546 votes. In 2024, when Trisha faced Boebert head to head, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district. And just last quarter, our campaign outraised Boebert 5-1. Our campaign has serious momentum, and we are gaining support from Democrats, Republicans, and Libertarians alike. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | When we beat Boebert in 2026, it will send a loud and clear message across the country--the Democrats are back. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Republicans want to deport Zohran and me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is the GOP’s new strategy.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1926%2E791427%2EbsYatA)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251027-1-180&t=2&akid=1926%2E791427%2EbsYatA)
Friends — This is the GOP’s new strategy.
Republicans can’t compete with the rising tide of progressives like myself and Zohran Mamdani, who are turning Americans away from the GOP’s anti-immigrant, pro-billionaire, fear-mongering politics and towards a positive vision of the future where every American can thrive.
So, they abuse the law and their own power as elected officials to threaten, silence, and punish their opponents rather than beat them at the polls. It’s par for the course given the Republican Party’s complete capitulation to authoritarianism under Trump’s second term.
The truth is, I don’t know how far these efforts will go. Randy Fine and other far-right members of Congress have already threatened me, like Zohran, with denaturalization. Rep. Brandon Gill started a petition calling for my deportation. Senator Tommy Tuberville sent his supporters a fundraising pitch asking them to buy me a ticket back to Somalia. Trump himself even claims that he asked the President of Somalia to “take her back.”
But no matter what these little wannabee-dictators throw my way, **it will not shake my commitment to fighting their far-right agenda and pushing forward our movement for an affordable life and justice for all.**
They want to deport Zohran and me because they are **afraid of us.** They are afraid of the powerful grassroots energy we are building all across the country, from Minneapolis to New York City. They are so afraid that they feel the need to take these extraordinarily un-American steps to stop us in our tracks.
So, the best way you can help us prove that their attacks will not blunt our momentum is to become a sustaining part of this campaign by chipping in what you can today.
**[Please: Help us show that we have the power of thousands of grassroots supporters on our side. Every donation we raise today sends a message to Rep. Randy Fine and the entire GOP that will not be intimidated into silence. Chip in here:](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251027-1-180&t=3&akid=1926%2E791427%2EbsYatA)**

clean_body: This is the GOP’s new strategy. Friends — This is the GOP’s new strategy. Republicans can’t compete with the rising tide of progressives like myself and Zohran Mamdani, who are turning Americans away from the GOP’s anti-immigrant, pro-billionaire, fear-mongering politics and towards a positive vision of the future where every American can thrive. So, they abuse the law and their own power as elected officials to threaten, silence, and punish their opponents rather than beat them at the polls. It’s par for the course given the Republican Party’s complete capitulation to authoritarianism under Trump’s second term. The truth is, I don’t know how far these efforts will go. Randy Fine and other far-right members of Congress have already threatened me, like Zohran, with denaturalization. Rep. Brandon Gill started a petition calling for my deportation. Senator Tommy Tuberville sent his supporters a fundraising pitch asking them to buy me a ticket back to Somalia. Trump himself even claims that he asked the President of Somalia to “take her back.” But no matter what these little wannabee-dictators throw my way, it will not shake my commitment to fighting their far-right agenda and pushing forward our movement for an affordable life and justice for all. They want to deport Zohran and me because they are afraid of us. They are afraid of the powerful grassroots energy we are building all across the country, from Minneapolis to New York City. They are so afraid that they feel the need to take these extraordinarily un-American steps to stop us in our tracks. So, the best way you can help us prove that their attacks will not blunt our momentum is to become a sustaining part of this campaign by chipping in what you can today. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | I know I can count on this team to have my back today. In solidarity, — Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
Your input is important to me| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108133/578682687/-569431239?refcode=251027em-ban-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzE0NmQ5Yy03MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tp8zdmqZ9oqjTetwgMxP5ogD3co0mTIyuiwlbpMRGvE=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108134/578682688/-569431239?refcode=251027em-ban-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzE0NmQ5Yy03MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tp8zdmqZ9oqjTetwgMxP5ogD3co0mTIyuiwlbpMRGvE=)
---
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously. As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum. **That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.** [**So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108135/578682689/-577767784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzE0NmQ5Yy03MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tp8zdmqZ9oqjTetwgMxP5ogD3co0mTIyuiwlbpMRGvE=&emci=7b983bdb-fdb0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cc146d9c-72b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
[ **ANSWER NOW >>** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108136/578682690/-577767784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzE0NmQ5Yy03MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tp8zdmqZ9oqjTetwgMxP5ogD3co0mTIyuiwlbpMRGvE=&emci=7b983bdb-fdb0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cc146d9c-72b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done. There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in. **However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.** [**So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108137/578682691/-577767784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzE0NmQ5Yy03MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tp8zdmqZ9oqjTetwgMxP5ogD3co0mTIyuiwlbpMRGvE=&emci=7b983bdb-fdb0-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=cc146d9c-72b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=30662126)
---
Thank you, Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State

clean_body: Your input is important to me| | | = | | = As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously. As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum. That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me. The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done. There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in. However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues. Thank you, Tobias Read Oregon Secretary of State = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Friends of Tobias Read (5208) PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Working Families Party
subject: Millions dropped to steal an election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, **Jeffrey Yass isn’t a household name — yet.** But he should be. He spent over $46 million last year to prop up right-wing candidates across the country.1 He bankrolls efforts to defund public schools, crush unions, and silence progressives. He even came close to joining Trump’s Cabinet as Treasury Secretary. And now, he’s zeroing in on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court. Because if Yass and Trump’s billionaire allies can tilt this court, they can clear the path for partisan redistricting, voter suppression, and election interference in the country’s biggest swing state — and set a dangerous example for others to follow. That’s why the Working Families Party is going all in. **Our organizers are leading a massive grassroots campaign across 10 counties** — partnering with more than a dozen local organizations to reach voters directly. We’re phonebanking, knocking on doors, running anti-billionaire ads, and making sure voters know the truth before they head to the polls. [**Will you rush a donation today to help us phonebank, knock on doors, and run ads that cut through billionaire disinformation before voters cast their ballots? Every dollar helps ensure working people — not billionaires — decide the future of our courts.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T90364flPlfL2w6VWtJDmeFtMVtn6Ot6O2O7hC-ma9doQNX2Wf-eRhWJ_QWNzpmlC4tGzDtGsk1TLR-6xLF435j5Lic3xkU3-0SZfuH3P6xYxX9agNpE6U0Ri7WJI3MtJhO5qzPW_KqQtmR4BMQkQGue67xW4sgngzBgsDrF1ZlpFY-g6_NJhBYLafaqxS49Ztv1-Bdxok5AYAYMk00PaNune1G-x9BbQFz86ubdvDBs_cIazYH6JX8_FWWQFhSJY9UtxDxixvJpXvd2ipNuN-w2shmiKHFBtGko4GYSMCcBJeOezu9rPwgQOxYZ8dgstf-6kYmrgp7ILNxxq5RqNaWzh9wvA6MNB8gnHL8-gBYZGh5qOmILVD93x97rbWXerL-gcn-E0_hIUNWosMAmVCaQ/4l3/YPhaie4aQ6ejCu6VbDiYJw/h0/h001.0pvVpgRobzBtZcGyWvlpIl3rTyKLVODQmTg129HfqTs) **[Donate $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T90364flPlfL2w6VWtJDmeFtMVtn6Ot6O2O7hC-ma9doT3r0RRQRtvSapeUpsCU9z29tKGxSE8laZuSpTK1WIxmT7BHPPTU9jR20RTZ-_s_vWGzxd6uRPmdiuZe2LaxKofuas4TOD10trAGBJQhzJgSqBBiYXIW7F-TwusdpWxBWRniYaXXbTIf1AzUP2Wx-LBLlEOYqLomazqyy1GnRThRcWxRK5GzlcVb2eslE1iSiZy3e0zICebPaJ91vkgHdr8CH8t5gkjL_fP2CGseoIFLNUAZ-d4LW7n_yrDRyHTYs8RTgFKLruKCFPX9vFqj6ZFJiKbk2P4cPAmvpBAF6cmTNY1xJmugBjhcw9iQSmUi5Mi0jYSDnXfE11ADw9y3NxAzJT-KMBNsozDM27947LlD1KHVOvzhdEoLJkuu32wzVg/4l3/YPhaie4aQ6ejCu6VbDiYJw/h1/h001.gn2IU7UxwM6kcZEOKwJF-F6vLNuCzigJLdlX1htzvO8)** First, it was **Elon Musk** — dropping $14 million to try to buy Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat for a MAGA extremist earlier this year.2 Now, it’s **Jeffrey Yass** , Donald Trump’s (second) favorite billionaire, turning his sights — and his millions — on Pennsylvania, the biggest swing state in the country. Yass is trying to flip the PA Supreme Court that has overturned rigged maps, protected fair elections, and stopped Republicans from using the courts to steal power. His playbook is the same one Musk tried in Wisconsin: flood the airwaves with lies, spread confusion, and trick working people into voting against their own interests. In Pennsylvania, Yass-funded groups are even sending out fake “Democratic” mailers to mislead voters about who’s really fighting for them.3 **But this fight isn’t just about one state.** It’s about whether billionaires like Yass and Musk get to decide our future — or whether _we the people_ still do. **With Election Day on November 4th and early voting already underway, this race could determine whether the court continues to stand up for working people — or becomes another weapon for the billionaire class.** If we don’t fight back, Yass’s money could tilt the court toward extreme rulings that gut public schools, block voters, and strip away protections for families and working people. **We can’t let that happen.** [**Chip in now to help Working Families Party organizers stop billionaire control of our courts — in Pennsylvania and across the country.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T90364flPlfL2w6VWtJDmeFtMVtn6Ot6O2O7hC-ma9doQNX2Wf-eRhWJ_QWNzpmlC479b6yR2PAXvFDf-F-hFG3QopPj4MGdO9B455B-5r56-_MZPAWOV6RUCH0WxoU7YitA3BfKhMdiNLVxuDx0EV6AVfwEpa81nl1-Md467VlcyU4LXEM6BJQgRaMHyL3fLtYNrU9K6tg65GQVAAvrp_hqKyiI3v1dy-9tDw7wrh4Ta7uF-0zHbvmfLYJFUg9Woz5tG9Zmdpk-G0140JoxlVqKTG7IK83TFCySQBGDSFqiGbAMDrym-K3ixTSmdV4XKdE-6z0ffxzwELy2WWDtzVu5dK0XVOHHJta368kvUj5yGLb6GbrOrJiaYRmyO79_RtXDj8ov5fAD8kRFXGo1SYzw/4l3/YPhaie4aQ6ejCu6VbDiYJw/h2/h001.0LRhyjRfJ3BPdxDbED_Q2Q_C0S7InGdT-0SLb5Y0ESE) Every dollar helps us reach voters directly — cutting through billionaire disinformation with real conversations and real organizing. **[Donate $10 Because here’s the truth: if billionaires can buy Pennsylvania’s courts, they can buy any state’s. But if we stop them, we’ll prove again that people power beats big money. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, Jeffrey Yass isn’t a household name — yet. But he should be. He spent over $46 million last year to prop up right-wing candidates across the country.1 He bankrolls efforts to defund public schools, crush unions, and silence progressives. He even came close to joining Trump’s Cabinet as Treasury Secretary. And now, he’s zeroing in on Pennsylvania’s Supreme Court. Because if Yass and Trump’s billionaire allies can tilt this court, they can clear the path for partisan redistricting, voter suppression, and election interference in the country’s biggest swing state — and set a dangerous example for others to follow. That’s why the Working Families Party is going all in. Our organizers are leading a massive grassroots campaign across 10 counties — partnering with more than a dozen local organizations to reach voters directly. We’re phonebanking, knocking on doors, running anti-billionaire ads, and making sure voters know the truth before they head to the polls. First, it was Elon Musk — dropping $14 million to try to buy Wisconsin’s Supreme Court seat for a MAGA extremist earlier this year.2 Now, it’s Jeffrey Yass , Donald Trump’s (second) favorite billionaire, turning his sights — and his millions — on Pennsylvania, the biggest swing state in the country. Yass is trying to flip the PA Supreme Court that has overturned rigged maps, protected fair elections, and stopped Republicans from using the courts to steal power. His playbook is the same one Musk tried in Wisconsin: flood the airwaves with lies, spread confusion, and trick working people into voting against their own interests. In Pennsylvania, Yass-funded groups are even sending out fake “Democratic” mailers to mislead voters about who’s really fighting for them.3 But this fight isn’t just about one state. It’s about whether billionaires like Yass and Musk get to decide our future — or whether we the people still do. With Election Day on November 4th and early voting already underway, this race could determine whether the court continues to stand up for working people — or becomes another weapon for the billionaire class. If we don’t fight back, Yass’s money could tilt the court toward extreme rulings that gut public schools, block voters, and strip away protections for families and working people. We can’t let that happen. Every dollar helps us reach voters directly — cutting through billionaire disinformation with real conversations and real organizing. Because here’s the truth: if billionaires can buy Pennsylvania’s courts, they can buy any state’s. But if we stop them, we’ll prove again that people power beats big money. In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Axios, March 21, 2024. 2\. , The Associated Press , March 24, 2025. 3\. , The Philadelphia Inquirer , September 28, 2025. Thoughts? Feedback? subject: This is my least favorite part of campaigning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I didn’t run for Congress to raise money. I ran to deliver results for West Michigan, protect our freedoms, and make government work for the people again.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108238/578683080/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-10-27_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmRmOTI5Yi03M2IzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmKnASPplVaGVI-GK_2tuKTaz0nKCxoRaDK_34qK3kA=)

| Hey there, it’s Hillary.

My least favorite part of campaigning is asking for money.

I didn’t run for Congress to raise money. I ran to deliver results for West Michigan, protect our freedoms, and make government work for the people again. But the reality is, running a competitive campaign in one of the most closely-watched districts in the country means I can’t avoid fundraising.

In the short amount of time I’ve been in Congress, I’ve seen just how much damage Republican chaos and dysfunction can do. Democrats only need three seats to take back the House next year. If we want to take back the House majority, we need to build a firewall right here in Michigan.

[_**Our October fundraising deadline is just four days away, so I have to respectfully ask: Will you chip in $15, or whatever you can, to help us hit our monthly fundraising goal so we can take back the House next year?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108239/578683081/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-10-27_1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmRmOTI5Yi03M2IzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hmKnASPplVaGVI-GK_2tuKTaz0nKCxoRaDK_34qK3kA=)

Thank you for always sticking by my side and reading this note.

Gratefully,

Hillary

clean_body: I didn’t run for Congress to raise money. I ran to deliver results for West Michigan, protect our freedoms, and make government work for the people again. | = | Hey there, it’s Hillary. My least favorite part of campaigning is asking for money. I didn’t run for Congress to raise money. I ran to deliver results for West Michigan, protect our freedoms, and make government work for the people again. But the reality is, running a competitive campaign in one of the most closely-watched districts in the country means I can’t avoid fundraising. In the short amount of time I’ve been in Congress, I’ve seen just how much damage Republican chaos and dysfunction can do. Democrats only need three seats to take back the House next year. If we want to take back the House majority, we need to build a firewall right here in Michigan. = | | | = Every time I press send on an email like this, I wish I didn’t have to. But when I remember that our campaign is about delivering for West Michigan, it makes it worth it. Thank you for always sticking by my side and reading this note. Gratefully, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49516 United States | = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: =?utf-8?B?QeKAmXNoYW50aSBHaG9sYXI=?=
subject: I could tell something wasn’t right.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
When I was in high school, I confronted a politician who lied about raising the minimum wage. After he argued with me in front of my class, I volunteered for his opponent, and we won.

| Peter,

Even as a kid, I could tell something wasn’t right.

While other kids were watching Sesame Street, I’d sit in front of the TV watching C-SPAN, and I noticed who wasn’t in the room.

There weren’t many women in those chambers.

And there definitely weren’t women who looked like me.

That realization shaped everything I’ve done since.

When I was in high school, I confronted a politician who lied about raising the minimum wage. After he argued with me in front of my class, I volunteered for his opponent, and we won.

That moment taught me something I carry to this day: women don’t have to wait to be invited into power — we can claim it.

**And that’s exactly what Emerge is about.**

We train Democratic women to run for office because when women run, they win.

But we can’t slow down.

We’re not on pace to hit our October fundraising goal, and if we don’t raise $10,000 before the deadline, we’ll have to delay the trainings that prepare the next wave of Democratic women to lead.

Every delay gives extremists a head start.

Every missed training means fewer women ready to run when democracy needs them most.

[_**That’s why I’m asking you directly: Can you chip in $10 or $25 today to help us close the gap and keep training women ready to lead?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108296/578683310/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-10-27_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhYWFmNGJiLTczYjMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9fKN4o8_ds-HI7tLqIv4THOf7lgQNMdQBENM_1ePepc=)

subject: "Major boost" for Winsome Earle-Sears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
There's a new poll showing Winsome Earle-Sears just three points behind Abigail Spanberger.
Did you see this headline?
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251027_1_spanberger.CLjUyx&refcode=em20251027-1&t=1&akid=3131%2E582294%2E2xqxp8)
There's a new poll showing Winsome Earle-Sears just three points behind Abigail Spanberger.
_That's inside the margin of error._
While no single poll tells the whole story, there's no denying it: _The Governor's race is tightening._
That's why we've set our biggest fundraising goal yet to fund the ads and organizers that will lead us to victory on November 4th. Abigail is no stranger to close races, but she can't win this alone.
**[So, can Abigail earn your support today? Your contribution of $5 or more will be split with Chris Pappas to help us reach undecided voters across Virginia.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251027_1_spanberger.CLjUyx&refcode=em20251027-1&t=2&akid=3131%2E582294%2E2xqxp8)**

Peter, I'm a fighter. I will always take on the mainstream media and expose their double standards.

**My husband is black. Our children and grandchildren are black. I am black. **

The liberal media can't comprehend that I think for myself and refuse to be bound by their ideology--just because of the color of my skin!

In 2021, I made history and became the first woman to be elected Lt. Governor of Virginia. That's right, I shattered a glass ceiling as a black Republican woman. All along the way, these Leftists threw nasty, racist insults at me. They simply couldn't comprehend that I'm conservative because _I actually think for myself!_

_**Believe me, I've been called every awful name in the book, but the mainstream media 's vicious attacks have only strengthened my resolve to spread our winning conservative message.**_
---

I thought they were the party for regular people, but I was wrong. Republicans are the ones who are fighting to lift people out of poverty, to ensure kids have access to quality education without indoctrination, to create good-paying jobs, and to keep our communities safe.

clean_body: An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices' An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices' | | | | An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices'| | | | An MSNBC liberal called me a 'Black mouth' for 'White supremacist practices'| | | | Peter, I'm a fighter. I will always take on the mainstream media and expose their double standards. My husband is black. Our children and grandchildren are black. I am black. The liberal media can't comprehend that I think for myself and refuse to be bound by their ideology--just because of the color of my skin! In 2021, I made history and became the first woman to be elected Lt. Governor of Virginia. That's right, I shattered a glass ceiling as a black Republican woman. All along the way, these Leftists threw nasty, racist insults at me. They simply couldn't comprehend that I'm conservative because I actually think for myself! Believe me, I've been called every awful name in the book, but the mainstream media 's vicious attacks have only strengthened my resolve to spread our winning conservative message. You may not believe it, but this is the truth: I used to be a Democrat! I thought they were the party for regular people, but I was wrong. Republicans are the ones who are fighting to lift people out of poverty, to ensure kids have access to quality education without indoctrination, to create good-paying jobs, and to keep our communities safe. Honestly, when the liberal talking heads on MSNBC started attacking me, I knew I must be on the right path! Don't hold back - No amount is too small! Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears (R-VA) | | I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. body:
Where Pennsylvania goes, so goes the nation.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rN3fk4vrgC9LrzHQqPs9Qwy3V43brbdYLu4hb66deoyt1NT4YLhW8bbZmxYA5LjCdE7of48amBhYHfsHHhylwo_MOWDuOz_dIaGYmKHXmpl0T3TjkcNWoFCuaFhpFy7vLC7juFmHg8bQq9iaXxhBl_IklvggJ4x5Ed-0NFwhE9BWhFgMZBsDTBB-F3lgRTa716BgIdPh5LmVFTFfPCLWzZDQHkOic4eRGnxfb5UQut8NH6TohNqMig==&c=wP0jItXgTwZlfse2ZElOXiz4LVxEeQ6gIls-zCWJiQOMVqls8ciZhA==&ch=cc2Br3Iupc4R_lEe2ZX6OgL9DUPUccbqe4jW-PRbhO7Ss43yllLwcQ==)

| Peter,
The upcoming November 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election isn't just about a court. It's about a woman's right to choose -- and those rights are on the line in Pennsylvania.
Spotlight PA, just covered the work of Defend our Courts, along with several major pro-Democratic groups who have made abortion rights the centerpiece of their messaging for the November vote for Pennsylvania's Supreme Court.

Abigail is ready to roll up her sleeves and get to work for Virginians.

Peter, I like to say that Pennsylvania is the "center of the political universe."
_But right now, it's Virginia._ In eight days, Abigail Spanberger can win back the Governor's office. No candidate anywhere else in the country can say the same.
Just like we have in Pennsylvania, I know Abigail will roll up her sleeves and get to work for Virginians, lowering costs and protecting real freedom — the freedom to get ahead no matter where you come from, what you look like, who you love, or who you pray to.
_First, we have to help her win on November 4th._
So, that's why I'm asking you to chip in a few bucks to make sure Abigail hits her final fundraising goal.

clean_body: Abigail is ready to roll up her sleeves and get to work for Virginians. = Peter, I like to say that Pennsylvania is the "center of the political universe." But right now, it's Virginia. In eight days, Abigail Spanberger can win back the Governor's office. No candidate anywhere else in the country can say the same. Just like we have in Pennsylvania, I know Abigail will roll up her sleeves and get to work for Virginians, lowering costs and protecting real freedom — the freedom to get ahead no matter where you come from, what you look like, who you love, or who you pray to. First, we have to help her win on November 4th. So, that's why I'm asking you to chip in a few bucks to make sure Abigail hits her final fundraising goal. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thanks for all your help, Josh Shapiro Governor, Pennsylvania = By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

body:
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=acc55fa845bf4417974cc05cdf76a86d&_e=Vq5zSA_GWXU9Rn8A9_iUDkPdFHxqA6aGw-qyph-yBSy7Auj4mLC940jZpE923T47yBw1JjxzBB5eYtAOJbUnhH00OGf-XlFvlY-v0-7hWMvT_DCOE0GooMbS2GJJnMu46WKAgGLmOPq5DoDZ8lcWv-TG6FReq0IlPFYhqwDAUwDiwqPvQIJ5aqLz_yiEuTgizGoU3aZipqSYCW2uhtsAiPir1SHSEwDArcx8zxbEQDYfetn6sNzqFNflaDPIL4B1EYxFDspqADccbT7IEU0TuH-EN-j6AwiLAkQyAMAoSFzSsogIpNDbEQIcgfpMEB43cQzb5GN52kjtJQSLNnGMMpE7xpE_prYm5I0iRxrh8Bf4U9mRaeFH8hRVpfvIEZcA1yg0iD4305FI5j86h731A8u0FQIjdHj4TBQKi3xZpkquJW9M4KLuFYbe_gLwFNxP_FqpJtdT8cKr_KyCfIloYN_zqLJCzqUzxyvvTS6eQkSDtZ0HHZRlCQ92l2KvfNmWTvA4KzWL-GJgQD5tpTROEYCQ7kSSlUn7nQGMd29NCuwNjL6MJlXlalxlsY7d63OweMRlfbLNSloT-VWJeeJPTwP5bUb2mC--5dtUhLL0rNDcg-1N9_8aV79J7za8mjYIfHtgOpkDQ2bMjkj_Hf1Usn2GuViEsVLuf7YeZdE3D1YrOyG2HJPLxz7YUQA9N0B7kybYz6lsP7UeatVSxo9HaMz-Bcn2xg00AlpEVHwyZO9Mdg_MeIK4bZh_dH-zCnukgattKEjBy9dnDPaRLpnIsbxJQu8RLMYVLOpiiqE_JG8OHy-8XmgsiCqhEI-8g-C6TTb5Wxb27XQtybXyewDMhZXFcqu5SdOMKYM7m1Z4msgf5KlHksLo_0Gu6aSI_Qjebi0rSe5uvX_55_h0Tyrq0zLEuu9L-Mk6rUs_kIFARXcCZ0IKlHxxi8YjtDY0mKwQ)If fantasizing about murdering a dad and his two boys isn't enough for Abigail to drop her endorsement of Jay Jones--what is?
Does he have to actually pull the trigger?Fellow American,
In our recent debate, I pressed Abigail Spanberger to take a clear stand on Jay Jones, and I refused to back down. I asked her point-blank why she wouldn't say that Jones' remarks were not okay and that he must leave the race.
And you know what? She still had nothing to say.
That's not leadership. That's cowardice. And it's a clear sign that Abigail Spanberger has no business being elected Governor.
But I am. I'm a leader who will always stand up for what's right, even when it's hard. I'm a leader who will always fight for our values and our way of life. And I'm a leader who needs your support to win this election.
[Please help me STOP the Democrats & their violent rhetoric and spread my positive, conservative message:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=acc55fa845bf4417974cc05cdf76a86d&_e=Vq5zSA_GWXU9Rn8A9_iUDkPdFHxqA6aGw-qyph-yBSy7Auj4mLC940jZpE923T47yBw1JjxzBB5eYtAOJbUnhH00OGf-XlFvlY-v0-7hWMvT_DCOE0GooMbS2GJJnMu46WKAgGLmOPq5DoDZ8lcWv-TG6FReq0IlPFYhqwDAUwDiwqPvQIJ5aqLz_yiEuTgizGoU3aZipqSYCW2uhtsAiPir1SHSEwDArcx8zxbEQDYfetn6sNzqFNflaDPIL4B1EYxFDspqADccbT7IEU0TuH-EN-j6AwiLAkQyAMAoSFzSsogIpNDbEQIcgfpMEB43cQzb5GN52kjtJQSLNnGMMpE7xpE_prYm5I0iRxrh8BeviOtkrX-B9IbKkauNXGZaxE_XJ0c-AQ9YkzBipYIaWWS7ZorGvhunkqGjmzjbWjDw1xR3ovhEtLGzE_0IGQVV3FBXyw3XtWwSPxlEVlzCLQ8mYlO2CcfSQPbC7aN96USoPu3RLL-mI4QaFNgyu_q2VVaAUMNr9JfaYE0DxKWlS7B4T--goxZqQXcHod7SOcv_0YPmJRGM4feHfm6CJIkbLh0XtC33_tpACdfaJiBqXm71ivTgaVF8QK7Ms6cFz-pHqezRiL6v7YclmD86OOkIZ1FhDuW_xtw2osubuZf5ts2vGtTSKuEn5tpnXOnBR0LwSzG9mpbXGwMMjdYVU5T-Z9G6DpWS65XAN5xy--uy1Ju_4DUOqsCWjmyS0_xs-s9rlvNFeogMUltRhgTalMmkUnIPF5FxUwVOkQ4hz73YlLDftw0_Av4dI9iub2kKueQyALN23Btq-nRCK1db1MS673RbbmmqVBeKxuW5jaczmiOcHU4BdCpHa4kSH7zfAeGfJJ80i0fdSZBlQA8STeVxUUlDHqy3tvmlrwndfUsOTDGW8mEmnHFJ0gCP5CVqJYmvaZvEUN4UP0Cma-zwV5hJ)[DONATE $150 >>

I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That’s why I’m reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=acc55fa845bf4417974cc05cdf76a86d&_e=Vq5zSA_GWXU9Rn8A9_iUDkPdFHxqA6aGw-qyph-yBSy7Auj4mLC940jZpE923T47wNhba0m_mniYHcK7vdFWq-aJIcID2viNAujQmEcBhtHyh7GXTCVv0febKlBLkGubcGbmNaDf-uvhQPnvyflCwc2pmYJmwcRTSm_GUsOr5VjJwc8PRcgU7DzMNAl8GBw1EbGfuNnyeWFTqxbLMJ5iF9tl0AAM7-u9t-SuPvCqqD9okfGofRzjpbRU-IrvscNe-IFfE5F8Qie3fK6K4rh63GeTY-pJsS72lnvWc29ugMkMx0huc_wLXWDK2DN3M-2i4Uh3qtLujt6uwfKLHjnctZt8f7rR5HArtakDu1_3vqMuo6m3TEwwMs-ZVri3QLh-EQxUNEIFW8asRvsRzF0nECH3HVnfxWUyZyvNwJdbFrB5YFfB7vGpKaDtnqk5ooy92OYVNDkUiBx9ldt-ed4gMM0idO8pIM-ULjfp5WnLEyy0m9oLyoRT0Z8smCl96hvGHLWE3B7r1QoIsKRVrDHO5mRapeC06Iu7nw95KhoFtcbR9pNl4XQQJQukgqTSWjgJMd64eTdzbDXpD3CbYOdEaRO0ND-kUwEK6QO2aZaU_HKt7hPn2HeqA9ebj7CujdpBHhsMBwA_0E51BmOjq06KSYBqp7xzyY7gcpLZl-Q-g7oIwteJJMb5gidYcTzAe0a1wn3sK3z-TYVcvK52I8FaXxbeonowvg-pmC0h5In4MMIZ4RTXebY4gPL4zbTsVVal2w_LW-rcq5lYIdbglFQX-Kac1rKMDyA4KlPfDtYp7GI_EV4fpnf-khm64sRWH-a0bO78Uo-V7ZccqqQ_v8eSjFdWpA54-F8U50GTm8o0vSqbhNbWWgmkcb8Y5ENq9p1L)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

clean_body: | fantasizing about murdering a dad and his two boys isn't enough for Abigail to drop her endorsement of Jay Jones--what is? Does he have to actually pull the trigger?Fellow American, In our recent debate, I pressed Abigail Spanberger to take a clear stand on Jay Jones, and I refused to back down. I asked her point-blank why she wouldn't say that Jones' remarks were not okay and that he must leave the race. And you know what? She still had nothing to say. That's not leadership. That's cowardice. And it's a clear sign that Abigail Spanberger has no business being elected Governor. But I am. I'm a leader who will always stand up for what's right, even when it's hard. I'm a leader who will always fight for our values and our way of life. And I'm a leader who needs your support to win this election. cannot stress how important it is that we win this race to soundly REJECT Spanberger and Jones' calls for political violence in our Commonwealth and across the nation. Thank you for your support, Fellow American. -Winsome Earle-SearsLt. Governor of Virginia| . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. | _The Government Is Shut Down.
But Not for Fossil Fuels._
– New York Times, Oct. 17, 2025
---
**Did you see this _New York Times_ headline?**
While over 700,000 federal employees have been forced to put their jobs on hold, there have been some exceptions: namely, those tasked with executing Trump’s plans to produce dirty fossil fuels, pollute our environment, and crush clean energy.
The polluter-in-chief is leaning on his January declaration of a “national energy emergency”, and a Department of Interior spokesperson even defended the continuation of fossil fuel projects during the shutdown as “necessary”. **But the facts tell another story.**
Right now, the U.S. is producing record levels of oil and gas. And although electricity demand is up, the White House has been throwing obstacles in the way of affordable, renewable energy.
**[The Trump Admin isn’t on our side, so we’re rolling up our sleeves to raise $50,000 for climate champions up and down the ballot who are brave enough to take on Big Oil – and WIN. Can we count on you to chip in $10 or any amount that feels right for you before our end-of-month deadline in just four days?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118108830/578685232/2105508926?amount=10&refcode=ea.bb8d46ad-75b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.bb8d46ad-75b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJiOGQ0NmFkLTc1YjMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=O5aHerU3tA_bKVuw_QhEbShVYijl4jt7av2SpyPQKrQ=)**

It’s obvious that after spending at least $445 million to put Trump back in the White House and influence Congress, Big Oil is calling the shots.
They don’t care if they destroy our public lands, unleash neurotoxins into our air and water that make us all sicker, or exacerbate the climate crisis by rolling back emission limits. _All they care about are their own profits._
Look, this is why we work so hard to elect climate champions at all levels of government. **Now more than ever, as the Trump Administration tries to destroy our planet for their own gain even as a shutdown drags on, we need a firewall of leaders at local, municipal, and state levels who will challenge their greed.**
**[Trump and his cronies don’t have our backs — but together, we have the power to elect leaders who _will_. clean_body: We can’t let Big Oil call all the shots | | The Government Is Shut Down. But Not for Fossil Fuels. – New York Times, Oct. 17, 2025 Did you see this New York Times headline? While over 700,000 federal employees have been forced to put their jobs on hold, there have been some exceptions: namely, those tasked with executing Trump’s plans to produce dirty fossil fuels, pollute our environment, and crush clean energy. The polluter-in-chief is leaning on his January declaration of a “national energy emergency”, and a Department of Interior spokesperson even defended the continuation of fossil fuel projects during the shutdown as “necessary”. But the facts tell another story. Right now, the U.S. is producing record levels of oil and gas. And although electricity demand is up, the White House has been throwing obstacles in the way of affordable, renewable energy. = = It’s obvious that after spending at least $445 million to put Trump back in the White House and influence Congress, Big Oil is calling the shots. They don’t care if they destroy our public lands, unleash neurotoxins into our air and water that make us all sicker, or exacerbate the climate crisis by rolling back emission limits. All they care about are their own profits. Look, this is why we work so hard to elect climate champions at all levels of government. Now more than ever, as the Trump Administration tries to destroy our planet for their own gain even as a shutdown drags on, we need a firewall of leaders at local, municipal, and state levels who will challenge their greed. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

**To:** Democratic supporters and campaign donors
**From:** Team Carol Obando-Derstine
**Re:** State of the Race: Why Carol is the best candidate for PA-07

Carol Obando-Derstine is ready to flip PA-07 and send a true community leader to Congress. Here’s where our campaign stands — and why Carol is best positioned to defeat MAGA Republican Ryan Mackenzie in one of the most competitive districts in the country.

**1\. Carol’s story is a Pennsylvania story**
Carol is the daughter of Colombian immigrants, a bilingual community leader, and an energy engineer who’s dedicated her career to helping working families lower costs. She’s served as Regional Affairs Director at PPL and advised Senator Casey and Governor Wolf on Latino affairs.

**2\. We’re building grassroots momentum**
Carol’s campaign is built by and for the community she’s spent her life serving. From local volunteers organizing neighborhood events to bilingual outreach connecting with Latino voters in every corner of the district, this campaign is powered by people — not insiders or special interests.

**3\. Major endorsements from trusted leaders**
EMILYs List, 314 Action, Latino Victory Fund, BOLD PAC, Former Rep. Susan Wild, and Rep. Veronica Escobar have all endorsed Carol because they believe in her campaign and the trust she’s earned from advocates across the state.

**4\. The only candidate in the race who isn’t a white man**
Carol is the only woman and the only Latina on the ballot — and the only candidate authentically engaging with Latino voters in their language and on their platforms. Carol looks nothing like her opponents, and that’s a good thing! It’s time we elect voices that are representative of our community.

**5\. Ryan Mackenzie is dangerously out of step with Pennsylvania families**
Ryan Mackenzie has spent his career siding with Donald Trump and MAGA extremists. He voted to slash health care and SNAP benefits for thousands of local families — and he’s refused to hold a single in-person town hall since taking office.

We’re building a winning coalition, but we need your help to stay competitive and show national Democrats that we’re ready to take this seat back. clean_body: Here’s where our campaign stands — and why Carol is best positioned to defeat MAGA Republican Ryan Mackenzie in one of the most competitive districts in the country. | = | | | Below is an important PA-07 State of the Race Memo for top supporters. If you don’t have time to read it right now, we hope you’ll consider= | = To: Democratic supporters and campaign donors From: Team Carol Obando-Derstine Re: State of the Race: Why Carol is the best candidate for PA-07 Carol Obando-Derstine is ready to flip PA-07 and send a true community leader to Congress. Here’s where our campaign stands — and why Carol is best positioned to defeat MAGA Republican Ryan Mackenzie in one of the most competitive districts in the country. 1\. Carol’s story is a Pennsylvania story Carol is the daughter of Colombian immigrants, a bilingual community leader, and an energy engineer who’s dedicated her career to helping working families lower costs. She’s served as Regional Affairs Director at PPL and advised Senator Casey and Governor Wolf on Latino affairs. 2\. We’re building grassroots momentum Carol’s campaign is built by and for the community she’s spent her life serving. From local volunteers organizing neighborhood events to bilingual outreach connecting with Latino voters in every corner of the district, this campaign is powered by people — not insiders or special interests. 3\. Major endorsements from trusted leaders EMILYs List, 314 Action, Latino Victory Fund, BOLD PAC, Former Rep. Susan Wild, and Rep. Veronica Escobar have all endorsed Carol because they believe in her campaign and the trust she’s earned from advocates across the state. 4\. The only candidate in the race who isn’t a white man Carol is the only woman and the only Latina on the ballot — and the only candidate authentically engaging with Latino voters in their language and on their platforms. Carol looks nothing like her opponents, and that’s a good thing! It’s time we elect voices that are representative of our community. 5\. Ryan Mackenzie is dangerously out of step with Pennsylvania families Ryan Mackenzie has spent his career siding with Donald Trump and MAGA extremists. He voted to slash health care and SNAP benefits for thousands of local families — and he’s refused to hold a single in-person town hall since taking office. We’re building a winning coalition, but we need your help to stay competitive and show national Democrats that we’re ready to take this seat back. Together, we can defeat Ryan Mackenzie and send a leader who will fight for affordable healthcare, reproductive rights, and a better future for all of us. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Carol Obando-Derstine * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Can I count on you to help us stand up to Trump's attacks?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.

| Donald Trump attacked me on Truth Social.

_I will not be rattled._

I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians and shut down the federal government.

_Trump is attacking me because he feels threatened._

He knows that I will call out the chaos he's unleashed as President. He knows that I will stand up for Virginia at every opportunity as Governor. And he knows that we are on the verge of flipping the Governor's office from red to blue on November 4th.

[_**But I can't do this alone, Peter. Can I count on you to help us stand up to Trump's attacks by splitting a $25 contribution between our campaign and Linda Sánchez? name: Kim Schrier
subject: From my heart, and from my years as a pediatrician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I wanted to take a moment to reintroduce myself, Peter. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118109677/578688259/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmI5YjAwZS03OGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3PpW_mXXQz-1F0DPv2xhot1Uz7sogxJFTRoK_cnC-8Y=&emci=c9c9e259-41b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3fb9b00e-78b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to remind you why I first ran for office.

Before Congress, I worked as a pediatrician in Issaquah for nearly 20 years. My days were filled with the laughter (and occasional tears) of kids, and the quiet courage of parents trying to do right by their families— _even when the system made that harder than it should be._

I saw personally what it meant for families to navigate the healthcare system. I saw parents delay appointments because they hadn’t yet met their deductible. I saw the relief when insurance covered a needed treatment, and the frustration when it didn't. Those moments are what drove me to run for Congress—because our previous representative voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act just days after I met with his office to discuss how critical it was to save the ACA. Healthcare isn't just another policy debate for me; _**it's personal.**_

As a doctor, and as someone who lives with Type 1 diabetes, I know what it means to depend on affordable, reliable care. And I know how terrifying it can be when that stability is threatened. And right now, that's exactly what's happening. **Open enrollment for Affordable Care Act coverage starts on November 1st, but because Congress hasn't extended the extra ACA subsidies that help keep premiums affordable, millions of families could see their costs skyrocket when they renew their plans.**

Some states are warning it's already too late to fix their rates before open enrollment. That means families could open their renewal letters and find out their premiums have gone way up— _all because Congress didn't act in time._ And when care costs too much, people drop coverage and try to get by without seeing a doctor. That’s a big risk to take. And that's why I'm fighting to protect the Affordable Care Act, to extend these subsidies, and to make sure every family in our community can afford to see a doctor when they need to.

We've made so much progress over the last few years, like lowering prescription drug costs, capping insulin prices, and expanding coverage for people across Washington and beyond. But it only works if people can stay covered. This is what keeps me up at night, and it's what drives me every single day in Congress. I promised myself I'd do something about it; when you hear me talking about healthcare, know that it's not about politics, **it's about people.**

Thank you for being part of this work and for your unwavering support.

—Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118109680/578688262/474981299?refcode=em25_251027_lngfrm_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_251027_lngfrm_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=3fb9b00e-78b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZmI5YjAwZS03OGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3PpW_mXXQz-1F0DPv2xhot1Uz7sogxJFTRoK_cnC-8Y=)

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to reintroduce myself, Peter. Peter, I wanted to take a moment to remind you why I first ran for office. Before Congress, I worked as a pediatrician in Issaquah for nearly 20 years. My days were filled with the laughter (and occasional tears) of kids, and the quiet courage of parents trying to do right by their families— even when the system made that harder than it should be. I saw personally what it meant for families to navigate the healthcare system. I saw parents delay appointments because they hadn’t yet met their deductible. I saw the relief when insurance covered a needed treatment, and the frustration when it didn't. Those moments are what drove me to run for Congress—because our previous representative voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act just days after I met with his office to discuss how critical it was to save the ACA. Healthcare isn't just another policy debate for me; it's personal. As a doctor, and as someone who lives with Type 1 diabetes, I know what it means to depend on affordable, reliable care. And I know how terrifying it can be when that stability is threatened. And right now, that's exactly what's happening. Open enrollment for Affordable Care Act coverage starts on November 1st, but because Congress hasn't extended the extra ACA subsidies that help keep premiums affordable, millions of families could see their costs skyrocket when they renew their plans. Some states are warning it's already too late to fix their rates before open enrollment. That means families could open their renewal letters and find out their premiums have gone way up— all because Congress didn't act in time. And when care costs too much, people drop coverage and try to get by without seeing a doctor. That’s a big risk to take. And that's why I'm fighting to protect the Affordable Care Act, to extend these subsidies, and to make sure every family in our community can afford to see a doctor when they need to. We've made so much progress over the last few years, like lowering prescription drug costs, capping insulin prices, and expanding coverage for people across Washington and beyond. But it only works if people can stay covered. This is what keeps me up at night, and it's what drives me every single day in Congress. I promised myself I'd do something about it; when you hear me talking about healthcare, know that it's not about politics, it's about people. Thank you for being part of this work and for your unwavering support. —Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: Zohran Mamdani isn’t hiding his ties to jihadists
body:
We must defeat Zohran before he takes over New York.

| | | | |
---
Friend, Zohran Mamdani is too radical to lead our nation’s largest city.
Not only does he spew hatred about our country and the values that made it great, but he has also proved to be a communist as well as a raging antisemite, and he also**publicly flaunts his direct ties to jihadi terrorists**.
Previously, Zohran has been given countless opportunities to call for**Hamas terrorists** to lay down their arms, and he has refused every single time. He has said he "loves" the Holy Land Five, who funneled $12,000,000 to Hamas terrorists.
Now, in a mask off moment, Mamdani is publicly meeting with a jihadi extremist and**trying to rehabilitate the image of a man with direct ties to organized terrorist networks** that have carried out attacks on American soil:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Zohran Mamdami posing with Siraj Wahhaj, an unindicted co-conspirator in the 1993 World Trade Center bombings._

[DEFEAT ZOHRAN MAMDANI](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The man Zohran Mamdani describes as a pillar of the community in Brooklyn is Siraj Wahhaj, an unindicted co-conspirator of the 1993 World Trade Center bombing.
The FBI has confirmed that the terrorists who committed**the 1993 World Trade****[**Center attack**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcy/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**[ regularly attended Wahhaj’s mosque and spent significant time with him in the leadup to the attack.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcy/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[DEFEND NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The same hate for our nation that motivated these terrorists is regularly spouted by Zohran’s new friend, Siraj Wahhaj.
His own son is currently serving a life sentence for terrorism related charges.
Siraj Wahhaj has called the Pledge of Allegiance "**_bullsh*t_** ", referred to the United States as "**a garbage can** ", and has said that "**_Islam is better than Democracy_** ".
He has said on video that "**You don’t get involved in politics because it’s the American thing to do.****_You get involved in politics because politics can be a weapon to use in the cause of Islam_** ".
What kind of politician does a radical like this want to run our country?
Siraj Wahhaj wants political leaders who will use their power to undermine our American values and destroy our country from within, and it is no surprise that he supports a radical like Zohran Mamdani.
**When reporters asked Zohran why he met with Siraj, he didn’t answer...****_he only smirked and walked away._**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[STAND WITH ELISE - SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Patriot, we cannot Make America Great Again if we have radical communists with ties to jihadi terrorists leading our nation’s cities.
New York is not only our largest city but it has always been the center of American innovation and opportunity as well as at the heart of American culture.
Zohran is a radical extremist who wants to implement his radical DSA agenda. Full stop. He MUST NOT become the next Mayor of New York City.
There is too much on the line for New York and for America for us to fail.
**_[That’s why I’m asking you, personally, to please chip in whatever you can today to help my team and I mobilize resources in New York to stop Zohran Mamdani and his allies from taking control of the Empire State](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
Election Day is** _November 4th_** and time is running out.
I am counting on all of my supporters to act now while there is still time.

_In Strength,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bpcx/?__vbtrk=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI5NTY3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
