name: Team Voter Action Project
subject: Gutting a critical department for voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
When Trump took office, the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints.
There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. This is just another step on the MAGA plan to dismantle our democracy and leave them in control.
The threat is clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation and Trump attacks the way we vote. RUSH $15 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote and more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=102725_3&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=102725_3&amount=25]
This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :
" Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "
This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting , coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month.
It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months.
Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=102725_3&amount=15]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=102725_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=102725_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=102725_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=102725_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=102725_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=102725_3&amount=35]
The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote.
But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.
You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever.
Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $15 or more right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=102725_3&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=102725_3&amount=20]

clean_body: When Trump took office, the voting section of the civil rights division had seven managers overseeing around 30 attorneys. Since then, one manager was detailed to a task force, one retired, and the other five were all reassigned to the "complaint adjudication office", a little-known part of the justice department that handles employee complaints. There are reportedly just three lawyers left in the whole department. This is just another step on the MAGA plan to dismantle our democracy and leave them in control. The threat is clear, folks, as states pass more suppressive legislation and Trump attacks the way we vote. RUSH $15 or more right now to help us defend our fundamental right to vote and more >> [] Voter Action Project [] The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [] This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian : " Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. " This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting , coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. Will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities. You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more with $15 or more right now >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? Up for a long, thoughtful conversation over whether a Democrat with a Nazi tattoo crossed any lines? Whether he should remind us of Fetterman? Whether the Democratic Party's tent is big enough? That's the conversation we had today on Philadelphia's WHYY, and it's worth listening.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d4e588e7-eb1d-4ac2-a6b1-3442bb0bda3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
My basic take was that character matters, whether left right or center, and the Nazi tattoo indicates a serious character issue, compounded by the candidate's reluctance to just straightforwardly say he was wrong. His explanations could be heard as excuses. Tyler Austin Harper, a Maine resident and excellent writer whose [piece](https://substack.com/redirect/93c5fd89-5430-4b48-8d0c-51d25132c2e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the world of extreme fishing is one of the best articles I've read in recent years, did the work of reading all of the offensive Reddit posts at issue in order to see whether the candidate has consistently been on the left. In Tyler's opinion he basically has; my point was that Fetterman is an example of someone who was credited for having all the correct "left" positions despite obvious character issues. Character, in my view, should be weighed by the voters irrespective of moderate vs progressive or young vs old.
Enjoy.

name: Powered by People
subject: Republicans could redraw 19 congressional districts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

When we told you last week that Louisiana Republicans were asking the
Supreme Court to ban the use of race in redistricting, we meant it —
because this case could change everything.

Louisiana Republicans are asking the Court to throw out the Voting Rights
Act’s protections for minority voters — the very protections that forced
them to finally draw fair maps in the first place. If they win, it could
open the door for Republicans to redraw up to 19 congressional districts
to lock in their power — including five right here in Texas.

It’s the same playbook we’ve seen before: silence voters, protect the
powerful, and rig the system to stay in charge.

But here’s what they still don’t get: people power can’t be silenced.

At Powered by People, we don’t sit around waiting for permission to fight
back. We organize. We register voters. We show up in communities where
politicians have written people off and remind them that their voice still
matters.

Because no matter how they try to rewrite the rules, they can’t stop
Texans — and folks all across this country — from showing up and taking
power into our own hands.

We’ve done it before — and we can do it again. But we need to be ready
now, before the Court hands down its decision.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251027.QYH6l0&refcode=ema20251027-240428&amount=3&t=1002&akid=240428%2E444211%2Ebt_4wB ]Can you chip in $3 to Powered by People today to keep
building people power in the face of these attacks?

Thank you,

Powered by People

### About Seth Moulton

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: $1… seriously!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We are reaching out to ask you to pitch in $1 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and John Fetterman's campaign today — and no, that’s not a typo!

Derek, we know $1 might not sound like much, especially when the Republican Party is preparing to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try to flip Jon’s seat red...

But when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in $1 at time, it all adds up!

In 2021, this team was able to defy the odds and win a historic runoff election alongside Rev. Warnock and secure the Senate majority — all because of $1, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you.

Now, we’re counting on your support once again to help Jon win what will likely be the most expensive and competitive race in the nation.

So please, make a $1 contribution — or more if you can afford it — to Jon Ossoff’s campaign and John Fetterman's campaign today. Chip in now, and we’ll put it directly to work building a campaign and a movement that will win an OVERWHELMING victory on Election Day.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51943?t=1001&akid=10383%2E434096%2E4vl9PC

Thanks,

Team Ossoff

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=10383%2E434096%2E4vl9PC

body:
I wanted to take a moment to tell you why I’m supporting Keith Ellison in his reelection campaign for Attorney General. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118110469/578690965/-1379763561?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDU0NmI1YS03YWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXEVqhUP6pwsFJVnLqIK2PBMaZXZ5G-Ex5-LcDCMgVY=)

Peter,
Senator Tina Smith here. I wanted to take a moment to tell you why I’m supporting Keith Ellison in his reelection campaign for Attorney General.
Keith is a proven leader who fights relentlessly for Minnesotans. He takes on tough fights — from holding corporations accountable to challenging Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda — and he gets results that make a real difference in people’s lives.
Keith knows that the cost of living is putting pressure on many Minnesotans, and he’s taking action. By standing up to corporate greed and cracking down on price gouging, Keith is helping families afford their lives.
**Peter, this race will be close — and that’s why it’s so important we stand with Keith right from the start. His principled leadership has moved Minnesota forward, and we can’t risk losing that progress. **

**[Will you join me in supporting Keith Ellison by becoming a Founding Donor to his campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118110470/578690966/-1379763561?refcode=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDU0NmI1YS03YWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rXEVqhUP6pwsFJVnLqIK2PBMaZXZ5G-Ex5-LcDCMgVY=)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: URGENT Call to Action: Urge GOP Congress to Stand Firm in Schumer Shutdown
body:
Tell Congressional Democrats to end the shutdown and thank Republicans for standing firm
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019a278cd061-4e4a48c6-91d1-41be-9420-cff1afbf9dc4-000000/plk1NXjMIRad4P62tx-f0v9VXHyh6WMl9djTsfiu8gQ=428)Patriot–Radical Democrats have shut down the federal government demanding **1.5 trillion dollars in new spending**.The Democrats’ unreasonable demands are packed full of a wish list of partisan policies designed to appeal to their leftist base including healthcare subsidies for illegal aliens.**Call the**[ _**United States Senate switchboard**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.senate.gov%2Fgeneral%2Fcontacting.htm/1/0100019a278cd061-4e4a48c6-91d1-41be-9420-cff1afbf9dc4-000000/eujUxoWuD0bbcfsAmSkT7Qwbr4tF1TP0lcGTPjwTW0s=428)**at 202-224-3121 and tell Senate Democrats they are not fooling anyone and to end the Schumer shutdown.** President Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans remain committed to reopening the government with a clean funding extension so that they can continue moving forward with the American First agenda that we voted for.Also, be sure to **call Senate Majority Leader John Thune** at **1-866-850-3855** and **House Speaker Mike Johnson** at **202-225-4000** and tell them to stand strong against leftist Democrat demands.Stand up and make your voice heard, today! Call Democrats now and tell them to **end the shutdown** and tell Republicans to stand strong.In liberty,Jenny Beth[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019a278cd061-4e4a48c6-91d1-41be-9420-cff1afbf9dc4-000000/xX_8BKjlOp2m98YoPTWGo1tOh1u6x-VNPxwWau-pEqw=428) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. name: Rear Admiral Michael Baker, U.S. Navy, Retired
subject: Donald Trump wants a war
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Colin Powell emphasized the importance of a nation exhausting all "political, economic, and diplomatic means", which, only if all were futile, would result in the condition that the nation should resort to military force. We have exhausted none of those means.
#
Peter, this is Dr. Michael Baker. Rear Admiral, U.S. Navy, retired. I’m writing to you on behalf of VoteVets today.
In my time, I had numerous deployments and assignments doing policy and strategic planning across three decades in uniform.
Two days ago, Donald Trump ordered the USS Gerald R. Ford into the Caribbean, alongside eight other warships and a nuclear submarine. Around the same time, Stephen Miller dodged a question about sending American troops to Venezuela. And yesterday, on CBS News, Senator Lindsey Graham spoke of Trump’s plan to brief members of Congress on an expansion of operations, “from the sea to the land.”
It’s clear that Donald Trump wants a war. Colin Powell had something to say about the use of force and bars that must be met. Let’s consider just 4 of his 8 points here:
**First, is a vital national security interest threatened?** The nation of Venezuela poses no threat to the USA. We use the Coast Guard and law enforcement to stop drug boats rather than million-dollar munitions to perform extrajudicial killings of unknown people. I participated in River and Coastal Patrol, and a board and search is the way to determine who is on the boat and what is on it.
**Second, do we have a clear, attainable objective?** The administration’s goal is to show the world how tough Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth are. The truth, of course, is that both are insecure and out of their depth. Both are trying to consolidate power further. And, perhaps, they hope to distract from the “Epstein Files” and Trump’s destruction of the White House. Like a crime family boss.
**Third, have the risks and costs been fully and frankly analyzed?** We risk exacerbating an 80-year tradition of making more enemies and further isolating our country. We will spend millions per day to deploy the Ford carrier battle group – while federal employees line up at food banks, kids lose school lunches, and poor families lose basic health care.
**And finally, have all other non-violent policy means been fully exhausted?** What about diplomacy? Foreign Aid? Voice of America? And how about USAID designed to help less fortunate people, rather than bombing them? We know those haven’t been exhausted because DOGE cut them all. Still, history shows that generosity and compassion, as we saw with the Marshall Plan's rebuilding of Europe – including assistance to former enemy combatants – turned those nations into staunch allies.
Powell emphasized the importance of a nation exhausting all "political, economic, and diplomatic means", which, only if all were futile, would result in the condition that the nation should resort to military force. We have exhausted none of those means.
"Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it." Trump and Hegseth didn’t learn a thing after two decades of needless war tore our country apart. Their childlike vindictiveness will ruin our country further, if we let it.
But that story is not written. Not yet. The American people don’t want another war — least of all the veterans who fought the last ones. We have time, still, to join our voices in opposition before it’s too late.
So, I am writing to you with a simple request. [**Add your voice to thousands of others who have signed on with VoteVets, and tell Donald Trump to stop this war before it starts. No more Forever Wars. No more Gold Star Families.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251027_vv_forever_war/?source=em251027-1-120&akid=34731%2E3013755%2EGYyCT-)
| [NO MORE FOREVER WAR](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251027_vv_forever_war/?source=em251027-1-120&akid=34731%2E3013755%2EGYyCT-)
---
That signature may seem like a small action compared to the power Trump holds. But the only thing that has ever changed our country for the better is millions of people joining together with a common goal.
That’s how this fight begins, but it doesn’t end here.
Please, add your name.
S/F
MB
Michael Baker, MD
Rear Admiral, USN (ret)

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34731%2E3013755%2EGYyCT-).

* * *
## **When Your Gift Comes Wrapped In** _**You Suck**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5d8b888-8d34-4429-8b32-9aaf559f4bd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
California Governor Gavin Newsom, one of _the most effective and prolific_ Democrats at hitting back--and forward--at MAGA denizens of Dumbpr*ckistan, has done it again.
Thankfully, Newsom gets it.
He gets [you don't fight abuse of power with conciliatory gestures](https://substack.com/redirect/afba2ea2-eefb-4319-a3a6-d372bd92c076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), don't respond to masked, unidentified, warrant-lacking goons breaking car windows with arguments over health care subsidies.
He continues to see subtlety _as the sin it is_ in these times.
Unlike Democratic congressional leadership, when Trump demands Dems do the Texas-two-step, Newsom's response is simple.
Like Harrison Ford's Jack Ryan in _Clear And Present Danger_ , a character himself who rejects the entreaties of a corrupt President busy embalming our Constitution to fight an illegal foreign war:
> I'm sorry Mr. President, I don't dance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ec6c442-dd52-41f3-a9da-8e3311aeab33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So Newsom had already set up a "merch store" as part of his non-stop operation to engage in psychological warfare vs Trump and his MAGA midges that hits them right where it hurts.
He doesn't go after their intelligence, as so many past Democrats have, because he knows they don't care about that. [But question their manhood? Independence](https://substack.com/redirect/11ccdcc9-1f0b-47ef-9b1b-cfb797be65c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? Point out how their support for Trump bankrupted their business?
Now we're talking!
There are a bunch of products in the store. This one _**was**_ my favorite, for its trolling MAGAs on multiple levels:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ErIEMt5GQNcU_fe2VLy2pjbme0Y7QOh3MsS6FIAAni8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177231812)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4ede34f1-0343-41f9-a799-1fde06436ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The reason I said "was," is... _they have a whole new product line just in!_
Newsom has released and promised to send a "very pragmatic gift" per HuffPost, to some very specific drawers-sniffing, morally-doddering Americans who still worship the dementia-soaked, deity of incapacity at 1600 PA Avenue.
In a not-so-sweet token of indignation for all those so often bending the knee to Trump they've torn miniscus, Newsom came up with a cheeky "f*k you," wrapped in merchandise packaging.
And ever so helpful for, say, Lindsey Graham or Ted Cruz.
**Knee Pads! 😆**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8485fa8f-eec6-404f-ae94-da847e1ac0d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ErIEMt5GQNcU_fe2VLy2pjbme0Y7QOh3MsS6FIAAni8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=177231812)
Newsom laid it out in his tweet to the tired and tender CEOs, university presidents and MAGA electeds.
You the, the real put-upons, like nine-figure banking CEOs who's grown so very weary of getting a write-off for their second--_but not third! --_corporate jet.
And those seven-figure presidential masters of academia.
They hold the nice cocktail parties with elite, self-important prigs whacking it to theories of _abundance_ while students have to sell a kidney to attend their illustrious university.
And those special, ever-ambitious cads from podunk towns and lazy strip malls who go to DC (or their state capital) once they've distinguished themselves as possessing the most potent Montezuma's-Revenge morality worthy of MAGA.
I.e. Republican elected officials. And appointed. [And their their little Nazi elves.](https://substack.com/redirect/0bfbaa85-7f75-462a-935c-3b1cc615acfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
More on the latter in a moment. Here's what Newsom had to say to all of them:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/24322dd3-13a9-4da2-8899-07a73e24b6b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Right. On.
Newsom's opened the pallet of political trolling and dipped in his brush. It's led him to become a much needed Picasso of this underutilized--at least among Democratic leadership--art form. Mockery, and it's slightly more aggressive cousin, trolling.
Not only a legitimate instrument of policy and public relations, _[but an absolute must](https://substack.com/redirect/001cda6f-103b-4929-87de-8119be40428e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ when dealing with the corrupt](https://substack.com/redirect/001cda6f-103b-4929-87de-8119be40428e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), clownish and cruel dingbats of MAGAtopia.
Mockery communicates to anyone listening that they're not to be taken seriously; a joke, weak, unworthy of serious debate.
If you grant these putrid, performative prats any honor, more of the American public will see them as worthy of it.
You do that, hell, you may as well do the same for blow up dolls, expanding rashes, crash test dummies, the movie _Gigli_ , Eric Trump's dentist, Christian Nationalism, ketamine and Kash Patel's eyes every time they actually work in tandem.
What Newsom is doing, is sending one message, and sending it loud and clear: **" If you're going to kneel for this malodorous sod, [we're gonna tell everyone you're on your knees.](https://substack.com/redirect/6df61971-bc3f-4da8-9510-3fc7a4577941?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)"**
A strategic jab in a larger rhetorical conflict with Trump-erect autocrats.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.ErIEMt5GQNcU_fe2VLy2pjbme0Y7QOh3MsS6FIAAni8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=177231812)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c5d8b888-8d34-4429-8b32-9aaf559f4bd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now, you may laugh. Good!
But the symbolism is serious. It's about power, sycophancy and spectacle. Newsom's laying down a marker: blind, pathetic loyalty to Trump _is not a badge of honor_ , _but a scarlet letter._
He's daring them to deny it. To have the stones to express any independence from Trump. [Because we all know how ](https://substack.com/redirect/4ede34f1-0343-41f9-a799-1fde06436ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_**[that](https://substack.com/redirect/4ede34f1-0343-41f9-a799-1fde06436ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_[ ends](https://substack.com/redirect/4ede34f1-0343-41f9-a799-1fde06436ba7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...a 2am Truth Social harangue rife with mis-spellings, mental vacations and old-man smell.
But worst of all--though only slightly worse than the old man smell--the threats emanating from a golden crapper deep within the bowels of BedBug-Alcatraz-a-Lago.
Look, we didn't invent this dumb political world. Right wing and corporate media did that. But we either fight back on the playing field as it exists _and win_ , or act like we're above it and get used to Trump's White House telling us what time it's ok to pee.
Those are the choices, my friends. And I'm with Gavin.
His team gets the trolling and mockery flow into a broader strategy. He's making the moments he messages against MAGA resonate, to make the "f*k you gift" more than a gag, but part of a narrative.
Rendering it a viral, cultural signifier of how _we should see --and mock--those he targets_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/afba2ea2-eefb-4319-a3a6-d372bd92c076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It leaves the MAGA mob looking like exactly who they are--the ones who were always told an empty seat next to anyone normal on the school bus was "taken."
In this age of spectacle politics, my friends, a permanent negative association can be a campaign killer.
And Newsom's making it clear, if you kneel, they will come...they, being a well-oiled mockery machine ready to expose and destroy you politically.
Not for the fun of it (though it is fun!), but for the know-nothing, Trumpers you've become.

clean_body: The Democrat who's set the standard by trolling Trump by using his own tactics against him, mocks & makes mincemeat of MAGA, yet again | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? The Democrat who's set the standard by trolling Trump by using his own tactics against him, mocks & makes mincemeat of MAGA, yet again | | | Oct 27 | | | | | | | | | | | | It 's the final hours of our 20% off #NoKings sale! Grab your Paid Subscription nowbefore it 's too late! | | ---|---|--- When Your Gift Comes Wrapped In You Suck | | ---|---|--- California Governor Gavin Newsom, one of the most effective and prolific Democrats at hitting back--and forward--at MAGA denizens of Dumbprckistan, has done it again. Thankfully, Newsom gets it. He gets , don't respond to masked, unidentified, warrant-lacking goons breaking car windows with arguments over health care subsidies. He continues to see subtlety as the sin it is in these times. Unlike Democratic congressional leadership, when Trump demands Dems do the Texas-two-step, Newsom's response is simple. Like Harrison Ford's Jack Ryan in Clear And Present Danger , a character himself who rejects the entreaties of a corrupt President busy embalming our Constitution to fight an illegal foreign war: I'm sorry Mr. President, I don't dance. | | ---|---|--- So Newsom had already set up a "merch store" as part of his non-stop operation to engage in psychological warfare vs Trump and his MAGA midges that hits them right where it hurts. He doesn't go after their intelligence, as so many past Democrats have, because he knows they don't care about that. ? Point out how their support for Trump bankrupted their business? Now we're talking! There are a bunch of products in the store. This one was my favorite, for its trolling MAGAs on multiple levels: | | ---|---|--- The reason I said "was," is... they have a whole new product line just in! Newsom has released and promised to send a "very pragmatic gift" per HuffPost, to some very specific drawers-sniffing, morally-doddering Americans who still worship the dementia-soaked, deity of incapacity at 1600 PA Avenue. In a not-so-sweet token of indignation for all those so often bending the knee to Trump they've torn miniscus, Newsom came up with a cheeky "fk you," wrapped in merchandise packaging. And ever so helpful for, say, Lindsey Graham or Ted Cruz. Knee Pads! 😆 | | ---|---|--- Newsom laid it out in his tweet to the tired and tender CEOs, university presidents and MAGA electeds. You the, the real put-upons, like nine-figure banking CEOs who's grown so very weary of getting a write-off for their second--but not third! --corporate jet. And those seven-figure presidential masters of academia. They hold the nice cocktail parties with elite, self-important prigs whacking it to theories of abundance while students have to sell a kidney to attend their illustrious university. And those special, ever-ambitious cads from podunk towns and lazy strip malls who go to DC (or their state capital) once they've distinguished themselves as possessing the most potent Montezuma's-Revenge morality worthy of MAGA. I.e. Republican elected officials. And appointed. More on the latter in a moment. Here's what Newsom had to say to all of them: | | ---|---|--- Right. On. Newsom's opened the pallet of political trolling and dipped in his brush. It's led him to become a much needed Picasso of this underutilized--at least among Democratic leadership--art form. Mockery, and it's slightly more aggressive cousin, trolling. Not only a legitimate instrument of policy and public relations, , clownish and cruel dingbats of MAGAtopia. Mockery communicates to anyone listening that they're not to be taken seriously; a joke, weak, unworthy of serious debate. If you grant these putrid, performative prats any honor, more of the American public will see them as worthy of it. You do that, hell, you may as well do the same for blow up dolls, expanding rashes, crash test dummies, the movie Gigli , Eric Trump's dentist, Christian Nationalism, ketamine and Kash Patel's eyes every time they actually work in tandem. What Newsom is doing, is sending one message, and sending it loud and clear: " If you're going to kneel for this malodorous sod, " A strategic jab in a larger rhetorical conflict with Trump-erect autocrats. | | ---|---|--- Now, you may laugh. Good! But the symbolism is serious. It's about power, sycophancy and spectacle. Newsom's laying down a marker: blind, pathetic loyalty to Trump is not a badge of honor , but a scarlet letter. He's daring them to deny it. To have the stones to express any independence from Trump. 2am Truth Social harangue rife with mis-spellings, mental vacations and old-man smell. But worst of all--though only slightly worse than the old man smell--the threats emanating from a golden crapper deep within the bowels of BedBug-Alcatraz-a-Lago. Look, we didn't invent this dumb political world. Right wing and corporate media did that. But we either fight back on the playing field as it exists and win , or act like we're above it and get used to Trump's White House telling us what time it's ok to pee. Those are the choices, my friends. And I'm with Gavin. His team gets the trolling and mockery flow into a broader strategy. He's making the moments he messages against MAGA resonate, to make the "fk you gift" more than a gag, but part of a narrative. Rendering it a viral, cultural signifier of how we should see --and mock--those he targets. | | ---|---|--- It leaves the MAGA mob looking like exactly who they are--the ones who were always told an empty seat next to anyone normal on the school bus was "taken." In this age of spectacle politics, my friends, a permanent negative association can be a campaign killer. And Newsom's making it clear, if you kneel, they will come...they, being a well-oiled mockery machine ready to expose and destroy you politically. Not for the fun of it (though it is fun!), but for the know-nothing, Trumpers you've become. It 's the final hours of our 20% off #NoKings sale! Grab your Paid Subscription nowbefore it 's too late! You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: They can’t stop you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
My campaign kickoff... |
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=431884c64a&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | Peter ,

I’m excited to tell you about my campaign kickoff this past Saturday.
It was amazing- Matt Gaetz, Congresswoman Lauren Boebert, Chairman Michael McDonald, and HUNDREDS OF YOU showed up to celebrate this campaign.
_**I say ‘this campaign’ for a reason:**_ _**You.**_
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ee14912986&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| As I looked out at all the activists, donors, voters, and even their children, I was reminded that this isn’t about me, it’s about you. It’s about the state and country you represented in that room.
_**We need to move the America First Agenda through Congress.**_
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=dc57617e39&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Trump knows it, too. It’s what drives him every day. I’m more emboldened than ever to carry out your will in Congress.

Please help me make it happen. [_Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $100, or any amount you can, right now? Your support will fuel this fight every step of the way._](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ec10ad2df4&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| **JOIN BOEBERT AND GAETZ - STAND WITH DAVID FLIPPO**
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=03b0edd56f&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| Our love for country and desire to build for tomorrow are our greatest strengths. This event was a show of that strength, and we’ll march with it- all the way to DC.
For God and Country,
Lt. Col. David Flippo (Ret.)

name: Wes Moore HQ
subject: We have to be ready
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=830%2E1086043%2E3zGsjO)
Peter, there’s no denying it: The people who want to undo everything Wes has accomplished are counting on Larry Hogan to challenge him.
They’re poring over polls that show Hogan only a few points behind Wes – and they see an opening. Hogan himself is already boasting about his approval numbers online, testing the waters, and signaling to big Republican donors that he’s ready to make a comeback.
**We have to be ready if Larry Hogan runs.** If he jumps into this race, he’ll have the national GOP _and_ MAGA super PACs behind him ready to pour millions of dark money into Maryland.
This grassroots team will have our work cut out for us — so we have to ask:
**[Will you chip in any amount — even just $5 — to help us fight back and reelect Wes Moore? Your contribution will power our campaign to leave no one behind.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251027-2.yTMhlS&refcode=em-20251027-2&t=4&akid=830%2E1086043%2E3zGsjO)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251027-2.yTMhlS&amount=5&refcode=em-20251027-2&t=23&akid=830%2E1086043%2E3zGsjO)**
Thank you for being part of this movement. Together, we’ll show them that Maryland doesn’t go backward.
— Wes Moore HQ

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251027-2&t=24&refcode2=830_1086043_3zGsjO&akid=830%2E1086043%2E3zGsjO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=830%2E1086043%2E3zGsjO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=830%2E1086043%2E3zGsjO)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Peter, When defending the Constitution is popular, every politician wants to claim the title of "conservative." But when defending your freedoms is hard, and when standing up for liberty means standing alone, you see who really means it.

I've __never__ wavered. Not when the media attacks, not when the D.C. elite demand compromise, and not when both parties push for more spending, more surveillance, or more government overreach.

I will **ALWAYS** defend the Constitution, even when it means being the lone voice for liberty in the Senate. Because I know what's at stake: our freedom, and the future we leave for the next generation.

If you believe in limited government, the Bill of Rights, and that America's future depends on bold leadership that never backs down, then I need you with me.

**_[Every donation—whether it’s $25, $50, or even $100—helps me fight the Washington machine and defend liberty for years to come.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/M8TDnmnmhtB2bQV1N_kBJGz80gP72I85vtnoe7GwYrtynSGzl1KpB6X9dmq-vaIbVTuGlrRRijz5wyKRf4foXr8Fhtk5scUXKQjIQ3cmvosC2YC21kbjv8BQcfRicRYCYx6ZsT4OoPUqL89L8H40gbrwm8VGA9Ya26nQG9m8QTS0NVjHMPIMxcKRVQGFbotjLxLet9ykd36ZlUDneLEVDU8GKrx9HvuGy4dRGh3oK4WN_Tfe2FpacSR-0KcxeOyxkUvTyOHw9IoBV2VrXJ_Mj24te7Vooq7y8hKHRU0vglADD2ADJVuAYxlYRn34Ua0CABlewwvXDExsiXySi58sVCZ5Dgg0Ozl2D8iYApEuZa7mVd1is6bCog3QCB4Hs7VgvPlI2PnUEZAYrz3OUUUhR0-RJgwvWhCdAnUZdmGt7Zi5NwSjKXJlQAevZP_HwqzCoOBSVgcSD3iT4lERv5EqysegwMcdoSitSuZOnDjpRTWSZQXpFLbCElVCFb-Cty1c54WMC0E68fKqO_YlGEhHadoylJaL_yEqLBpkWE1WYKL93XMKLEdDBctztBvdVUpmdPVT1I42QKvZ8eBjVNE35axOcPNIBCzdsb0YEh8VT4iQ-Bisik0JI9LxGc5DLULS7xiL6kY3r2JtH8sluKGT4uVva61Kz46fZqbrVNmfYeM6rP9o6DQ1lliTKgVwMIL0AW1IyjoY_CwSI-qfqIWjfuc/r3YVnxPF163WVKHE3cf1J3R3Zojo52xW/14)_**

# **[Trump's crypto czar leaked THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/ebfeb344-05e9-4d7c-ae06-8d9c102154c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
As you might have seen, Trump appointed the first-ever "Crypto Czar" to his cabinet. And his first move?
Creating a strategic Bitcoin reserve for America.
But here's what the media missed: The executive order specifically mentions "native digital asset markets" as critical infrastructure.
**Translation: The government knows about the hidden market where crypto trades 80% cheaper.**
And they're positioning NOW.
Three things are happening behind closed doors:
1. The treasury is exploring Native Market access for the strategic reserve
2. Wall Street was given "unofficial approval" to access these markets
3. Regulatory framework is coming that could lock out retail forever

The window for regular investors? Maybe 60 days. Maybe less.
Once the government and institutions control native market access, the 100x opportunities disappear. Forever.

Tan Gera, CFA

# **" The well has run dry": 42 million Americans won't receive food stamps in November due to shutdown**
The U.S. Department of Agriculture announced that Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program benefits **[will not be distributed Nov. 1,](https://substack.com/redirect/dce4dca3-82b4-40a2-b8e5-053091f9f836?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** leaving approximately 42 million Americans without food assistance as the government shutdown continues into its second month.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dce4dca3-82b4-40a2-b8e5-053091f9f836?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The Trump administration refused to authorize roughly $5 billion** in contingency funds to maintain SNAP payments, blaming Senate Democrats for blocking government funding negotiations until Republicans agree to discuss extending Affordable Care Act subsidies that Democrats claim are being held hostage over issues including healthcare for undocumented immigrants.
* **States are responding differently to the crisis,** with California deploying 30 National Guard troops to food banks and Virginia's Republican governor declaring a state of emergency to provide benefits, while Arkansas and other states advised residents to stockpile shelf-stable foods and warned they will not be reimbursed for covering federal benefits independently.
* **" Bottom line, the well has run dry."** **[The USDA](https://substack.com/redirect/a3cd40a8-5ee3-427a-9d88-c6b2866ffeb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** said in a statement. "At this time, there will be no benefits issued November 1. We are approaching an inflection point for Senate Democrats.
* **The average SNAP recipient receives $187 monthly in benefits** loaded onto debit cards for grocery purchases, with Democratic Sen. Chris Murphy arguing the parties could resolve the impasse within days if Republicans agreed to negotiate, stating "we could open up the government on Tuesday or Wednesday, and there wouldn't be any crisis in the food stamp program."

* * *
# **REPORT: NYC Mayoral Race Tightens as Cuomo Slashes Mamdani 's Lead in Half**
Former Gov. Andrew Cuomo **[cut socialist candidate Zohran Mamdani's advantage to just 10%](https://substack.com/redirect/c26d28fa-9c0d-4bf8-af9f-d5283c0c5894?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** ahead of next week's New York City mayoral election, according to a new Suffolk University poll.
* **Mamdani leads Cuomo just 44% to 34%** among likely voters, a dramatic narrowing from his 20-point advantage in September's survey, while Republican Curtis Sliwa trails with 11% support in a race transformed by Mayor Eric Adams' decision to abandon his reelection campaign and endorse Cuomo.
* **Cuomo has surged among key voting blocs since September,** drawing even with Mamdani among Hispanic voters after trailing by 30 points, and now leading independents by 10 points after previously losing that demographic by 18 points.
* **Political analysts identified Sliwa as the wildcard** who could determine the outcome, noting his 11% share represents a potential spoiler effect since 36% of his supporters name Cuomo as their second choice compared to just 2% backing Mamdani, meaning Sliwa's presence in the race may be preventing a Cuomo victory by splitting the anti-socialist vote.

# Trump's countdown on Hamas expires Monday night with another hostage body set to be returned
Hamas announced Monday it will hand over one more deceased Israeli hostage's body at 9 p.m. Gaza time, leaving 12 bodies still in the militant group's custody as President Donald Trump's 48-hour compliance deadline expires Monday night.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0b95a8a-53d2-46ad-a802-ba9b98c646f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0b95a8a-53d2-46ad-a802-ba9b98c646f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **[Trump warned Saturday](https://substack.com/redirect/b0b95a8a-53d2-46ad-a802-ba9b98c646f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Truth Social that while some hostage bodies are difficult to recover, others could be returned immediately but Hamas has chosen not to release them, stating his promise to treat "both sides fairly" only applies if the group fulfills its obligations under the Gaza peace agreement.
* Right before the post, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee met with families of American citizens Itay Chen and Omer Neutra, whose bodies remain held by Hamas following their deaths in the Oct. 7, 2023, attacks, with Rubio pledging **["we will not rest"](https://substack.com/redirect/d330b136-0a47-40e0-8832-4fe80d067ed8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** until all remains are returned home.

# Arnold Schwarzenegger destroys CNN Jake Tapper live during gerrymandering debate
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2e294a8f-c85e-4f27-bcb0-54850a31093a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Former California Governor and actor Arnold Schwarzenegger shot down current Gov. Gov. Gavin Newsom on CNN Monday.
* **Schwarzenegger rejected Newsom 's assertion** that the gerrymandering Proposition 50 redistricting is temporary, calling it "total fantasy" and arguing that government programs marketed as temporary invariably become permanent fixtures, whether tax programs or redistricting schemes.
* **California voters are deciding on legislation that would add up to five** Democrat-held congressional seats to counter President Trump's Republican redistricting efforts in Texas and other states ahead of the 2026 election, with former President Barack Obama endorsing the measure this week.
* **Schwarzenegger characterized the redistricting as cheating** and urged Democrats to compete by outperforming Trump politically rather than manipulating district boundaries, stating **["the American people get cheated"](https://substack.com/redirect/84cc8c36-e58b-491b-8d68-b66c2410825c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when officials draw lines to ensure reelection regardless of performance, while Newsom responded by telling critics to "spare me the moral high ground."

REPORT: NYC Mayoral Race Tightens as Cuomo Slashes Mamdani 's Lead in Half Former Gov. Andrew Cuomo ahead of next week's New York City mayoral election, according to a new Suffolk University poll. Mamdani leads Cuomo just 44% to 34% among likely voters, a dramatic narrowing from his 20-point advantage in September's survey, while Republican Curtis Sliwa trails with 11% support in a race transformed by Mayor Eric Adams' decision to abandon his reelection campaign and endorse Cuomo. Cuomo has surged among key voting blocs since September, drawing even with Mamdani among Hispanic voters after trailing by 30 points, and now leading independents by 10 points after previously losing that demographic by 18 points. Political analysts identified Sliwa as the wildcard who could determine the outcome, noting his 11% share represents a potential spoiler effect since 36% of his supporters name Cuomo as their second choice compared to just 2% backing Mamdani, meaning Sliwa's presence in the race may be preventing a Cuomo victory by splitting the anti-socialist vote. Politibrawl asks New Yorkers if socialism has ever worked, their response is disappointing... Trump's countdown on Hamas expires Monday night with another hostage body set to be returned Hamas announced Monday it will hand over one more deceased Israeli hostage's body at 9 p.m. Gaza time, leaving 12 bodies still in the militant group's custody as President Donald Trump's 48-hour compliance deadline expires Monday night. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- on Truth Social that while some hostage bodies are difficult to recover, others could be returned immediately but Hamas has chosen not to release them, stating his promise to treat "both sides fairly" only applies if the group fulfills its obligations under the Gaza peace agreement. Right before the post, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and U.S. Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee met with families of American citizens Itay Chen and Omer Neutra, whose bodies remain held by Hamas following their deaths in the Oct. 7, 2023, attacks, with Rubio pledging until all remains are returned home. Arnold Schwarzenegger destroys CNN Jake Tapper live during gerrymandering debate Former California Governor and actor Arnold Schwarzenegger shot down current Gov. Gov. Gavin Newsom on CNN Monday. Schwarzenegger rejected Newsom 's assertion that the gerrymandering Proposition 50 redistricting is temporary, calling it "total fantasy" and arguing that government programs marketed as temporary invariably become permanent fixtures, whether tax programs or redistricting schemes. California voters are deciding on legislation that would add up to five Democrat-held congressional seats to counter President Trump's Republican redistricting efforts in Texas and other states ahead of the 2026 election, with former President Barack Obama endorsing the measure this week. Schwarzenegger characterized the redistricting as cheating and urged Democrats to compete by outperforming Trump politically rather than manipulating district boundaries, stating when officials draw lines to ensure reelection regardless of performance, while Newsom responded by telling critics to "spare me the moral high ground." White House roasts Democrats for prolonging government shutdown with hilarious star-studded video on X The government shutdown reached day 27 today, and is making its feelings about Democrats' refusal to negotiate known. name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: If it comes with strings, James doesn’t want the money.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
When James says something, it’s because that’s what he really believes.
It’s not because mega-donors or corporate interests told him what to say.
It’s important to him that folks know that he makes decisions based on what is best for the people. You can’t buy his vote.
That’s why he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs. That money comes with expectations and strings.
Instead, this campaign is funded by the people. All of us, coming together to take back power for ourselves and our neighbors.
[**If you agree with this approach, please consider making a contribution to our campaign today. You shouldn’t have to wonder if your elected leaders are beholden to special interests. And with James, you never will.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251027-1-ak&t=1&akid=199%2E1347274%2EjNBZgf)
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251027-1-ak&t=2&akid=199%2E1347274%2EjNBZgf)
Let’s be clear: James will have a conversation with anyone willing to have a meaningful discussion about his ideas. Democrats have lost too many times because we failed to build a big enough tent.
We’re going everywhere and talking to everyone — whether it’s into communities that voted for Donald Trump or onto Joe Rogan’s podcast. If there are people willing to have meaningful conversations, James will show up.
But if someone is donating to James because they want special favors or to buy his vote, they should keep their money.
We won’t take it.
This is a campaign funded by the people. People who know the system is corrupt and rigged against us. People who want to disrupt the broken status quo in Washington.
[**If that’s you and you can spare a donation, then please consider giving whatever makes sense for you today. It would mean a lot to James.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251027-1-ak&t=3&akid=199%2E1347274%2EjNBZgf)

name: AOC
subject: We need so many people to do what Zohran Mamdani is doing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.
#
When I ran in 2018, I had no money. I was outspent 10 to 1. Millions of dollars were spent against me.
And it’s funny, because the political establishment likes to tell this story where they say, “Oh, no one saw her coming! They fell asleep at the wheel!”
That is not true. **They tell that story so they look like they didn’t lose**.
Ironically, the morning after I won, Andrew Cuomo of all people said that my existence was a ‘fluke.' That I was here by accident.
And that’s not surprising. I’m used to being underestimated.
But what people don’t often see and understand is that you can outwork that.
It’s not going to happen every single time, but that’s why **we need so many people to do what Zohran Mamdani is doing**.
A lot of times people think that being engaged is either _electoral_ or it’s all _activism_ — but it’s actually the combined power of _both_ of these things that have prevented autocracies from taking over in other circumstances.
**Because moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class.**
And to keep building our people's movement, we are rallying together to support progressives up and down the ballot who are facing off against opponents — from both parties — who are handing the keys to our country over to billionaires and special interests.
[Will you split a $5 contribution today between our movement and Courage to Change — our leadership PAC which supports grassroots candidates — so we can fight on behalf of progressive champions across the country who are running to make real change?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251027-ctc._ugcTS&refcode=em20251027-10079-P_FND_SPL_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10079%2E2526796%2EMun-iH)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20251027-ctc._ugcTS&refcode=em20251027-10079-P_FND_SPL_CTC&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10079%2E2526796%2EMun-iH)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
clean_body: Moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class. When I ran in 2018, I had no money. I was outspent 10 to 1. Millions of dollars were spent against me. And it’s funny, because the political establishment likes to tell this story where they say, “Oh, no one saw her coming! They fell asleep at the wheel!” That is not true. They tell that story so they look like they didn’t lose. Ironically, the morning after I won, Andrew Cuomo of all people said that my existence was a ‘fluke.' That I was here by accident. And that’s not surprising. I’m used to being underestimated. But what people don’t often see and understand is that you can outwork that. It’s not going to happen every single time, but that’s why we need so many people to do what Zohran Mamdani is doing. A lot of times people think that being engaged is either electoral or it’s all activism — but it’s actually the combined power of both of these things that have prevented autocracies from taking over in other circumstances. Because moving politics in the direction of the working class requires the working class. And to keep building our people's movement, we are rallying together to support progressives up and down the ballot who are facing off against opponents — from both parties — who are handing the keys to our country over to billionaires and special interests. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Humbly asking for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
**Please don’t click away from this important request.**
We know you’re busy, but please hear us out. **[We’re humbly asking you to chip in $5 — or whatever you can afford — to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251027-1-full-v1&t=1&akid=986%2E5691347%2ERn5ErM)**
Here’s why we’re asking:
Right now, Trump’s MAGA allies are spending _massive_ sums of money to defeat Jon because they know if they win this race in Georgia, they can lock in Senate control for the GOP and at the same time get rid of one of the strongest anti-corruption voices in the Senate.
_We can’t let that happen, Peter._
But we’re being outspent in a big way. The GOP and their Super PACs have already poured _more than $10 million_ into this race, and Jon needs our help to fight back.
We are running a grassroots campaign which means the vast majority of the donations we receive come from people giving $5 or whatever they can, when they can. And one of the largest sources of those donations is from emails like this one.
So we're humbly asking: **[Can you chip in $5 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today?](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251027-1-full-v1&t=2&akid=986%2E5691347%2ERn5ErM)**
$5 because Jon is MAGA’s #1 target in the midterms, and they are going to pull out every lie and dirty trick in the book to stop him.
$5 because if we lose this seat to MAGA, there is virtually no chance of Democrats taking back the Senate and using congressional power to hold Trump accountable.
$5 because we all have a part to play in fighting back against the rising tide of authoritarianism in our country.
Peter, we know that $5 may not feel like the kind of money that can win an election — especially when the GOP and their Super PACs are already spending millions.
But these early $5 donations are the most important of the campaign, and they add up FAST when we’re all chipping in.
So we are asking one more time:
**[Please, contribute $5, or whatever amount feels right directly to Jon Ossoff’s campaign for Senate. We wouldn't ask if it didn't make a real difference.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.ZBiurg&refcode=em251027-1-full-v1&t=3&akid=986%2E5691347%2ERn5ErM)**

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK) [ **Voting Rights are UNDER ATTACK, team! → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69649?t=3&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69649?t=4&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK) Now more than ever, it’s critical that we keep our campaign strong and support top Democrats like Senator Raphael Warnock in passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act._ [ **We urgently need to reach our daily $10,000 goal to fight back against the damage Trump’s Republicans are inflicting on voting rights across America! Can you rush $5 or any amount right now to help protect our democracy? →→ **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69683?t=5&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK) | [RUSH $5 TO HELP PASS THE _JOHN LEWIS VOTING RIGHTS ADVANCEMENT ACT_ NOW →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69683?t=6&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK)
---
* * *
This is serious, team:

Ever since Donald Trump took office, Republicans across the country have been doing everything in their power to suppress as many Democratic votes as possible:

**FIRST:** Republicans gerrymandered congressional maps in Texas and Missouri to try to steal seats for the GOP.

**THEN:** Louisiana began redrawing its maps — specifically to divide and silence voters from predominantly Black districts.

**AND NOW:** [**_Trump’s far-right Supreme Court is preparing to rule in Louisiana’s favor, threatening to gut the_ Voting Rights Act _and open the door to even more voter suppression nationwide._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69649?t=7&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK)

No American should be denied the right to vote because of their race. That’s why passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ has never been more critical than right now, team.

That’s why we set a daily fundraising goal of $10,000. We need to show the American people exactly what’s at stake, and we’re counting on strong Democrats like you to help make it happen.
[ **Please, your $5 donation (or any amount you can give) has never been more important. If you stand with us against Trump and his MAGA cronies’ NON-STOP ATTACKS on voting,** [ **please rush $5 right now so we can continue the fight to pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ →→**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69683?t=9&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK)](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69683?t=8&akid=23550%2E4449941%2Ei6dfAK)

name: Chip Roy
subject: Get Rich Scheme
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
The American people deserve to know where their Reps stand on a Congressional Stock Trading Ban. |
Peter - I did not run for Congress to get rich.

I did not run for Congress to become a creature of Wall Street.

**Then why are so many members of Congress getting rich off Wall Street?**

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ec55f61cbeca4432ad3cbba5bee5fa32&_e=nYNJe2QlkuiANjmYecdnD92GfJt26OPptiqaZ04H5EcyrScwmCiU0x_pi_S3GuX5lsnbZcNV8Lk2_EFYWQI6OpHRwext_tcfdev4KiSdswZFj2yE2Wqan_s0zSZVv3n944hwsYMZJ_9CIK-I-olBH_4BeavYCilMTqu2CxEsicPAGhWAhvNgy4HtkZUvo2EFaJqGlqc5sqlyuMiRdc1zkn4htVPKHsOiR5F28eUqXKwvS0kF2rHtvJ3HaLU3nNWlnIcgEHtW6dc4R53ZqamIU2ZenosdCdCYq2NgnU18dWc20eVY5JUgfMoavpwSXK_rdZBvm3haW7bcIvhPLtiX_F602wLmNMz0Qo9LPGQVt7V9coJTp1P6dI4ekjB40TONLXh8SPugaGkB7WlkKl2dq4SIxy49uOC769HyoRjAOsf1JeN3itlubsSuu8uwrwsWEnisS6Y6gkO2Kv-2AqXZJC05-jGXR_6SK7bmDNuiGpxAeqcQnwQICVHwqtM0Onf0LTtg_6nPsvsY-uKACrf78jrku72QFSGzTT_Tu9HY6ErYvCkD9TXlLmtk3mJYkyxeScwvgwY30rdVIX2CcodQgJd7Pp7THl7X74U_slqo6HvfI4t7Iuvi10SHXR4LyMVT7y-HgLFyzsh1fMdJnjyFY3LYs-xeQAB8P0gDS84a-lMKnRnhd5ihIP1DuWrG2sqUpvMwNG1rt5oxSxPXfweIcA%3D%3D)
It's time this ended, Peter.

If you want to day-trade, leave Congress. _It's that simple_.

Congress shouldn't be able to profit from what it learns during closed-door meetings and committee hearings. The American people should have faith that Congress is working for the good of the country, not for its own bank accounts.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Speaker Johnson is trying to stop us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
GOOD NEWS: House Speaker Mike Johnson has announced that he will allow a floor vote on the Epstein Files Transparency Act, Rep. Massie’s and my bill to release the full Epstein files to the public, once the House returns to session and our discharge petition reaches 218 signatures.
BAD NEWS: Speaker Johnson still won’t swear in Adelita Grijalva, the newly elected representative for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District, and our final signature needed to get our discharge petition over the finish line. Johnson refuses to swear her in until the government reopens, despite having sworn in two Republican House members.
Releasing the Epstein files should not be a partisan issue. Americans deserve to know who is in those files, regardless of wealth, status, or party affiliation. Epstein’s survivors deserve justice.
SIGN THE PETITION: Tell Congress to release the Epstein files. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-petition?contactdata=p4X+5wzMy1vEXCLQ6w0dmNJnqsm/JvIKnhNQCE5Z+sR4Kkv+z4JQ7Vz3vTJNX5ZOdtrgYqNAKS9+oqpuh2Xndaw+qValtIIY5WvXC7zWe2hFIS3VBT9zYVcgvFYzkq5IAExATNYY5ceizj0+q74eP5VUwjJaHQn8QfEXnY020u7Afddwt6OdivkTB0JyZnsz]
https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa/video/7564537257407958286 [https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa/video/7564537257407958286]
Make no mistake—the truth will come out. I will not be intimidated by Republicans attempting to bury it. Every member of Congress must go on record and decide whether they will support corruption by the rich and powerful or stand up for transparency.
Sign if you agree: The American people need answers. Congress must vote to release ALL of the Epstein files to the public. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-petition?contactdata=p4X+5wzMy1vEXCLQ6w0dmNJnqsm/JvIKnhNQCE5Z+sR4Kkv+z4JQ7Vz3vTJNX5ZOdtrgYqNAKS9+oqpuh2Xndaw+qValtIIY5WvXC7zWe2hFIS3VBT9zYVcgvFYzkq5IAExATNYY5ceizj0+q74eP5VUwjJaHQn8QfEXnY020u7Afddwt6OdivkTB0JyZnsz]
TAKE ACTION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-petition?contactdata=p4X+5wzMy1vEXCLQ6w0dmNJnqsm/JvIKnhNQCE5Z+sR4Kkv+z4JQ7Vz3vTJNX5ZOdtrgYqNAKS9+oqpuh2Xndaw+qValtIIY5WvXC7zWe2hFIS3VBT9zYVcgvFYzkq5IAExATNYY5ceizj0+q74eP5VUwjJaHQn8QfEXnY020u7Afddwt6OdivkTB0JyZnsz]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: A Republican took the lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Reaching voters across some of the most expensive media markets in the country takes serious investment.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)
Peter,
Did you see that a Republican just pulled into the lead of the California governor’s race?
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251027_1_ak.RblRWU&refcode=em20251027-40320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251027_1_ak.RblRWU&refcode=em20251027-40320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)
**[We just launched a $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to help pull ahead. Can you rush a donation to help Katie Porter take back the lead?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251027_1_ak.RblRWU&refcode=em20251027-40320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251027_1_ak.RblRWU&refcode=em20251027-40320&t=24&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)
Katie Porter is still the Democratic frontrunner, tripling the support of the next closest Democrat. But that doesn’t mean we can let up. _Republicans are surging in the polls_ , and the stakes couldn’t be higher.
Here’s what’s at risk: the top two vote-getters in June’s primary move to the general election. Right now, we’re dangerously close to that being _two Republicans_. We have to make sure our campaign has the resources to stay in front and keep California blue.
There are still lots of undecided voters, and we know they’ll support Katie once they hear how she’s going to lower costs, expand housing access, and protect our rights. But reaching them across some of the most expensive media markets in the country takes serious investment.
That’s why **we need to hit our $50,000 end-of-month fundraising goal by midnight Friday.** Your donation helps us scale up our campaign quickly to reach voters, run ads, and fight back against Republican momentum before it’s too late.
**[Peter, can you chip in $5 today to help us reach our goal and keep California out of Republican control?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251027_1_ak.RblRWU&refcode=em20251027-40320&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=25&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251027_1_ak.RblRWU&refcode=em20251027-40320&t=44&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251027-40320&amounts=&t=45&refcode2=40320_3422442_7JFlzU&akid=40320%2E3422442%2E7JFlzU)**

Friend,
The government is shut down, people are not getting their paychecks, grocery prices are going up, and health care is at risk for millions of Americans.
**Let’s be clear: This shutdown is fully Republican-made, and Trump could end it any time he wants. **
But the headlines clearly show that Republicans have other priorities on their minds. Trump is tearing down the East Wing of the White House and asking the Justice Department to pay him hundreds of millions of dollars. And Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem is asking taxpayers to pay for TWO Gulfstream jets. Instead of wasting tax dollars, she could fly Southwest with Jacky Rosen – and enjoy the fantastic pretzels on board (they’re made in Nevada!).
**As long as Trump and Republicans are in power, they will continue using the government and its resources for their own ends while the rest of us suffer.**
Meanwhile, people are coming to Jacky worried sick about their ability to afford to go to the doctor. That's why she and Democrats are fighting with everything they have to open the government and get people the health care they need.
**Unfortunately, it's clear Americans will never truly be safe from skyrocketing costs, ****wasteful government spending, and ****the threat of losing health care coverage as long as Trump and Republicans are in power. That’s why Democrats MUST take back the Senate. **
**[Will you please chip in $5 or more now to make that possible? Every dollar you give will help Democrats take back our Senate majority so that the government can go back to working for you and your family.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118113249/578700108/1710436543?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5630-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWRjYjU2NC04MmIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H6dFiV1xPwUWiWD_y95k5v8SxucRC8y3VCf4a0G4bfo=)**

clean_body: Republicans are focused on ballrooms and private jets during the government shutdown | | | = Friend, The government is shut down, people are not getting their paychecks, grocery prices are going up, and health care is at risk for millions of Americans. Let’s be clear: This shutdown is fully Republican-made, and Trump could end it any time he wants. But the headlines clearly show that Republicans have other priorities on their minds. Trump is tearing down the East Wing of the White House and asking the Justice Department to pay him hundreds of millions of dollars. And Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem is asking taxpayers to pay for TWO Gulfstream jets. Instead of wasting tax dollars, she could fly Southwest with Jacky Rosen – and enjoy the fantastic pretzels on board (they’re made in Nevada!). As long as Trump and Republicans are in power, they will continue using the government and its resources for their own ends while the rest of us suffer. Meanwhile, people are coming to Jacky worried sick about their ability to afford to go to the doctor. That's why she and Democrats are fighting with everything they have to open the government and get people the health care they need. Unfortunately, it's clear Americans will never truly be safe from skyrocketing costs, wasteful government spending, and the threat of losing health care coverage as long as Trump and Republicans are in power. That’s why Democrats MUST take back the Senate. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, friend. Team Rosen | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help._

North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. | | **_Meet Rob:_** Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth.
