| | **_A personal message from Rob:_** Friend, I don’t take the fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania’s freedom and prosperity lightly. Each and every day that I show up for work in Washington, you have my word that I’ll give 110% effort to advance the best interests of our district’s hard working families – especially our blue collar workers. Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. _Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital?_

clean_body: Portland Paige Cognetti is their new cash cow... | | | | == | | , | | She raised over$500,000in the first few weeks following her campaign launch. | | == | | | == | | A staunch ally of extreme liberals like Nancy Pelosi & Zohran Mamdani , Portland Paige Cognetti is the newest symbol of the Democrat Party’s radical shift to the left. And her campaign to flip PA-08 blue in 2026 is entirely dependent on outside help from the DC establishment. Paige won’t do anything for NEPA in Congress other than bend the knee to her handlers in Washington. But her fundraising numbers tell the whole story when it comes to the 2026 election in PA-08. , Republican Congressman == needs YOUR immediate support to catch up to Portland Paige and keep PA-08 RED next November. == | | | == | | Thank you for your generous support in the fight to keep PA-08 & the House majority RED! For the Commonwealth, Rob’s Freedom Frontiersmen | | | == | | | | | Meet Rob: Rob Bresnahan is a fifth generation Northeastern Pennsylvanian serving his first term in Congress as the Representative for Pennsylvania’s 8th Congressional District. A product of the American Dream, Rob learned the true meaning of hard work at an early age. He learned the ins and outs of the electrical industry by wiring junction boxes, running heavy equipment, driving trucks, and getting his hands dirty. In the process, he learned about the real-world challenges facing America’s blue-collar workers. At just 19 years old, Rob joined his family’s business as the CFO for Kuharchik Construction. He became the CEO of the company in 2013. The sole member of the National Electrical Contractors Association serving in the People’s House, Rob spent over a decade working and connecting with blue-collar Americans across the country before running for Congress in 2024. He’s learned exactly how far-left energy policies coming out of Washington have strangled the American energy sector. And sadly, he’s seen the destructive impacts these policies have had on Pennsylvania’s blue-collar workers first-hand. But the people of Northeastern Pennsylvania demanded change in November 2024 when they sent Rob to Congress. Through his work in Washington, Rob is 100% devoted to restoring America’s energy independence, deregulating the economy, and bringing well-paying jobs back to our great commonwealth. | | | | A personal message from Rob: Friend, I don’t take the fight for Northeastern Pennsylvania’s freedom and prosperity lightly. Each and every day that I show up for work in Washington, you have my word that I’ll give 110% effort to advance the best interests of our district’s hard working families – especially our blue collar workers. Our nation could not endure without the men and women who keep the lights on from coast to coast. So together, we’re going to revive America’s energy independence and return our great nation to its rightful place atop the world stage. Can I count on your grassroots support to usher in a new era of leadership in our nation’s capital? | | | | | | | | | = | | =

name: Rodriguez HQ
subject: This race will define Florida's future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
Don't sit this one out, Peter. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118114152/578703471/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_2026Outlook_102725&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjg2NWFjOTUtODZiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=oC47fHHHYEG9V5F46ziTG12SSJlkbKLSrOYWffwfuNs=&emci=9816f2c4-6fb3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=b865ac95-86b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=32374386)
---
This is important, Peter. **The 2026 midterms will be here before you know it, and Florida's Attorney General race is shaping up to be one of the most consequential fights we've ever had — so we can't afford to make the wrong choice.** Here's what we're up against: James Uthmeier, a corrupt politician who protects special interests instead of working families. While FPL plans a historic $10 billion rate hike and insurance companies crush Floridians with the highest rates in America, Uthmeier sits on his hands. And here's what we're fighting for: **Jose Javier Rodriguez, the People's Lawyer, who will actually stand up to corruption, hold powerful corporations accountable, and fight to lower costs for working families.** The contrast couldn't be clearer. But here's the reality: Uthmeier has Trump's endorsement, DeSantis backing him, and millions in corporate special interest money. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. Don't let Republicans fool you, Peter, **They own this shutdown.** Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House — but they’ve chosen to shut down the government because they would rather give tax breaks to billionaires than lower health costs for Americans. The government has been shut down for 23 days, and Democrats have been at the negotiating table the entire time, ready to work toward a bipartisan solution to reopen the government and protect Americans’ health care. Republicans have refused to even come to the table, Peter, because they don’t give a rip about people like you. They don’t care that federal workers are being forced to work without pay or, even worse, being fired by the Trump administration — and they don’t care that millions of Americans in red and blue states will see their health costs skyrocket at the end of the year. **[They only care about serving the top 1%. I’m not going to stop fighting until Republicans do their jobs and pass a bill that protects everyday Americans. clean_body: | Don't let Republicans fool you, Peter, They own this shutdown. Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House — but they’ve chosen to shut down the government because they would rather give tax breaks to billionaires than lower health costs for Americans. The government has been shut down for 23 days, and Democrats have been at the negotiating table the entire time, ready to work toward a bipartisan solution to reopen the government and protect Americans’ health care. Republicans have refused to even come to the table, Peter, because they don’t give a rip about people like you. They don’t care that federal workers are being forced to work without pay or, even worse, being fired by the Trump administration — and they don’t care that millions of Americans in red and blue states will see their health costs skyrocket at the end of the year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Republicans may not care about whether you can afford health care, but I do. We have to be ready to stop these anti-democracy attacks
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118114290/578703846/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlmZmQ1NDQ2LTg3YjMtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=M-SSigmQsjPsMYaXPk4l-hCt7al4Q-dQRZch4-Dv3ZI=&emci=f63b64b4-01b1-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9ffd5446-87b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=8431045)

Peter, Have you been following what’s happening in Missouri? First, the Trump White House targeted Missouri for a mid-decade map redraw that would give Republicans more seats. The Missouri GOP followed orders without batting an eye, passing an egregious gerrymander with _only_ Republican votes. Now, Missourians are mobilizing to overturn the gerrymandered map through the state’s referendum process. **But, to no one’s surprise, the GOP is already trying to block the will of the people by erecting hurdles to make it harder for a citizen-led referendum to succeed.** **After initially rejecting the referendum effort, the Republican Secretary of State, Denny Hoskins, is now allowing it to proceed — but refusing to count the 100,000 citizen signatures that had already been collected.** Why are Missouri Republicans going to all these lengths to hold on to power? It’s a part of a nationwide trend, Peter. Republicans know voters will reject their extreme agenda if given the opportunity. So now, they are doing everything in their power to silence people’s voices. **The grassroots movement to build a more representative democracy needs you now more than ever.** **[As Republicans fight us at every juncture to steal the 2026 midterm elections, we have to be ready to stop them at every juncture, too. clean_body: We have to be ready to stop these anti-democracy attacks | Peter, Have you been following what’s happening in Missouri? First, the Trump White House targeted Missouri for a mid-decade map redraw that would give Republicans more seats. The Missouri GOP followed orders without batting an eye, passing an egregious gerrymander with only Republican votes. Now, Missourians are mobilizing to overturn the gerrymandered map through the state’s referendum process. But, to no one’s surprise, the GOP is already trying to block the will of the people by erecting hurdles to make it harder for a citizen-led referendum to succeed. After initially rejecting the referendum effort, the Republican Secretary of State, Denny Hoskins, is now allowing it to proceed — but refusing to count the 100,000 citizen signatures that had already been collected. Why are Missouri Republicans going to all these lengths to hold on to power? It’s a part of a nationwide trend, Peter. Republicans know voters will reject their extreme agenda if given the opportunity. So now, they are doing everything in their power to silence people’s voices. The grassroots movement to build a more representative democracy needs you now more than ever. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Team Pramila
subject: This deadline is a big one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Chip in now to power Pramila’s leadership and prove this movement won’t be silenced.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251027-5569-footer&t=1&akid=5569%2E420207%2EhkW2uX)
Hi Peter,
Today we’re launching our end-of-month goal — **$33,000 before midnight on October 31** — and with everything on the line right now, falling short is _not_ an option.
Trump is gutting vital lifelines for working people, consolidating power for billionaires, and accelerating his dangerous authoritarian agenda. His allies are working in lockstep to dismantle democratic safeguards, silence opposition, and rewrite our future.
**This is how we fight back — together.**
We have to show that a grassroots movement powered by real people can go toe-to-toe with wannabe dictators and aristocrats — and win.
[**Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to help us reach our October goal by Friday?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251027.ZoyEm8&refcode=em20251027-5569&amount=3&t=2&akid=5569%2E420207%2EhkW2uX)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251027.ZoyEm8&amount=3&refcode=em20251027-5569&t=3&akid=5569%2E420207%2EhkW2uX)**
Your support keeps Pramila focused on what matters most right now — organizing, legislating, and taking on the far-right — _not_ making fundraising calls.
And it equips our movement with the resources to:
* Elect progressive champions in key seats to help flip the House
* Win big for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, reproductive freedom, and an economy that works for _everyone_
* Defend democracy from Trump and his enablers
* Train and mobilize communities to effectively resist authoritarianism

And above all, it’s sending a clear message — that **we won’t back down.**
Pramila has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. Her leadership is fueled 100% by grassroots donors like you — and with this deadline approaching fast, **every single dollar counts right now.**
**Trump and his billionaire backers are hoping we fall short, Peter. Let’s prove them wrong.**
[**Chip in $3 right now to help us hit our goal before Friday and keep Pramila fighting back — louder than ever.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251027.ZoyEm8&refcode=em20251027-5569&amount=3&t=4&akid=5569%2E420207%2EhkW2uX)

Thank you for standing with us.
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251027-5569-footer&t=24&refcode2=5569_420207_hkW2uX&akid=5569%2E420207%2EhkW2uX)**

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Republicans couldn’t care less.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
People are going to have to choose between paying their rent or health insurance.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118114795/578705563/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251027Less_SB_4_90DO_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWM4MTVhZS04OGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nQnD-CMyvcN5kGPCDA_oWa4XxAZG6BXyWDm6kySKfE=) Peter, we are 26 days into the government shutdown, and the House has not voted since September 19 because Republican Speaker Mike Johnson won’t do his job.

What’s holding them back from coming to the table to save healthcare? They’re waiting for their wannabe King, Trump, to give them permission.

Meanwhile, Trump is too busy designing his dream ballroom to be bothered to notice that healthcare premiums are about to skyrocket – in many cases double in price – for millions of Americans.

We are facing the largest jump in healthcare prices since the ACA was implemented in 2014, which means some people are going to have to choose between paying their rent or mortgage, putting food on the table, and paying for healthcare – and **Republicans couldn't care less.**

[**Democrats are fighting to reopen the government, lower costs, and save healthcare. But the GOP is MIA in all negotiations. It’s unacceptable. As we near the end of the month, please chip in $5 to help us hold Republicans accountable for their ongoing contempt towards the American people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118114797/578705565/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251027Less_SB_4_90DO_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWM4MTVhZS04OGIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2nQnD-CMyvcN5kGPCDA_oWa4XxAZG6BXyWDm6kySKfE=)

Together,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

body:
Sign on now to demand action and accountability.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. Peter, I’m reaching out today as we approach a full month of the Republican shutdown. As millions of Americans are paying the price, and facing devastating cuts to their healthcare, Donald Trump and Mike Johnson are more focused on playing the blame game than finding real solutions. I ran for Congress to get results for New Yorkers, not engage in partisan rhetoric. **[If you’re with me, add your name today and tell Republicans to join Democrats at the negotiating table and find _a common sense solution_ to re-open the government.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118115068/578706565/-589999189?source=SBD_GL_EM_PET_102725_Shutdown_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUzYzcyZTctODhiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Eq2fxf6q5wti7rj5hki_HX6648YyhzjhyOTkZ1EoC0o=&emci=a8d1a9de-88b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8e3c72e7-88b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21388742)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118115069/578706566/-589999189?source=SBD_GL_EM_PET_102725_Shutdown_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUzYzcyZTctODhiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Eq2fxf6q5wti7rj5hki_HX6648YyhzjhyOTkZ1EoC0o=&emci=a8d1a9de-88b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8e3c72e7-88b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21388742)

Instead of sitting down with Democrats to negotiate and extend the ACA tax credits that keep health insurance affordable for millions, Trump and Congressional Republicans are holding the government hostage. Their “Big Ugly Bill” has already gutted health care and sent costs soaring — now this shutdown is making things even worse.
I’ve spent decades as a public servant trying to improve the lives of _everyone_ I represent. I rarely got everything I wanted — but our government is based on compromise, not the will of one man or one political party.
**[Can you add your name today and call on Republicans to end this shutdown immediately, extend ACA tax credits, and put the needs of the American people first?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118115070/578706567/-589999189?source=SBD_GL_EM_PET_102725_Shutdown_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGUzYzcyZTctODhiMy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Eq2fxf6q5wti7rj5hki_HX6648YyhzjhyOTkZ1EoC0o=&emci=a8d1a9de-88b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=8e3c72e7-88b3-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=21388742)**

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: Sign on now to demand action and accountability. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, I’m reaching out today as we approach a full month of the Republican shutdown. As millions of Americans are paying the price, and facing devastating cuts to their healthcare, Donald Trump and Mike Johnson are more focused on playing the blame game than finding real solutions. I ran for Congress to get results for New Yorkers, not engage in partisan rhetoric. | Instead of sitting down with Democrats to negotiate and extend the ACA tax credits that keep health insurance affordable for millions, Trump and Congressional Republicans are holding the government hostage. Their “Big Ugly Bill” has already gutted health care and sent costs soaring — now this shutdown is making things even worse. I’ve spent decades as a public servant trying to improve the lives of everyone I represent. I rarely got everything I wanted — but our government is based on compromise, not the will of one man or one political party. — George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

subject: Trump: “Georgia deserves better.”

body:
President Trump just called Georgia’s Senate race “very important” — and said it’s time for a real senator. The NRSC is launching the Georgia Red Alert Fund to flip this seat and FIRE Jon Ossoff. | Fellow American,

President Trump just lit the fuse.

When asked about the Georgia Senate race, he didn't hold back -- saying Georgia _“deserves a real senator”_ because _“the man they have now is a weak, ineffective person.”_

That wasn't just an offhand comment. That was a warning.

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ee082cb3cb7b4775a4a147d29cc89d9b&_e=NVc3VBjNICIkYMer-c5leL0kSY8jMRAsgwjvc93g_ZiJZis5XuYyFHllgAmwIDZly4lbZcAOJDrOyWb7ZMUzc6rryzBURbAPGlECA-SEcMZ-8t6H_7d2tNhAnDtQWpOrKWlrRZflCVlSaFm1D8OiXkf-aIJFTBUvLw01yT2UbG9hQGqO27Xp6SUJkLliZp3CyCm9ZbVRa860xWRW55Ypg7CtMcEMQfnKrX33zTb8IvE3QEklQM2rYfKhjYAkMn8alUncMm6K29i9ff10fWrdth4BXvLdehGDhQ7rUFyrBDWrpBQ4ziUVU3xfBFvAOapElZinrgyAxIhKvTDfb89j9LiFD8CEwA1GU422PW5HK5lYBrU6eIuZYnZ0_hCLoMsrE6RS_ZAMu1YHXEZaMCReLLpVNQ1CHQmU1lrCw3zJspjJxpTcB3QS6ebQzsovscry-8K4S2yYFA0oB1kDGSF7ochM72pbolI7JC5LVMKKiKGhbE4ByKDkTc48EAS_W3asRMXONMRfx4lPt0PjnKRuML_hmYbuDoFsNBniRiBZYKSlIWGjv4RzvecT7aeqjjmCPGbAK3aAPeT3jADBSDy_6PZPw5O8Vt-uFT6X3zeYz0jNKHld8jwa4GqGTkQMNjfwIgCvqjwHLiZ6UqFGcm2d-iGVMDXgKyqtqIqIBvE3hG9dHe5ExHrp0rKJtqW1FwY22iP2DmFYWO9hYXx26FLP9uRvbb6GPA1Tbzh5iHXm15fjAXDS9RgtQfMeFjlPC0GQDt030NjDpPy3pir7Psgp_C54Qr-c_IktOGiV3h4D5ZA1ayWp66vWqmXTr9lIkwIFkpBgivVn80eyIMNEvEeriyTkYqdz6IYKKc-0vNEBHhQ%3D)
**Georgia is once again the epicenter of America's political earthquake. And the Left knows it -- they're already pouring MILLIONS into Jon Ossoff's defense.**

The last time Georgia wavered, we got two years of Bidenflation, open borders, and chaos. We can't make that mistake again.

This time, the Senate Republicans are moving first.

We're deploying early voter outreach programs, digital strike teams, and rapid-response units to flip Georgia before the Democrats even know what hit them.

name: Valerie Foushee

Peter, Republicans bending the rules to hold onto power is nothing new. But now, across the country, we’re seeing something even more alarming: **a full-scale effort to rig elections, silence voters, and lock in Republicans’ power.** **Last week, Republicans in North Carolina passed a new Congressional map to try to improve their chances of hanging on to the House majority.** They’re waging a war on voting rights because they know that they won’t win at the ballot box. Their policies are unpopular, Donald Trump is unpopular, so they’re rigging the rules to keep themselves in power. But here’s what they didn’t count on, people like you refusing to back down. We’ve been here before, and when our democracy is threatened, we do whatever we can to defend it. **[If you’re able, can you chip in $10 today to put us in the best possible position to take back the House in 2026 and put a stop to the chaos? We can’t afford another two years of this mess.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118115345/578707428/1096806550?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_102725_EOM1_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmU2OWQzMi04OWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXNQ-xqhJ439F9oXkEd3lgIdLxBb-y3SHg1mLWD6KQM=)** | | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118115346/578707429/1096806550?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_102725_EOM1_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmU2OWQzMi04OWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXNQ-xqhJ439F9oXkEd3lgIdLxBb-y3SHg1mLWD6KQM=)

These last few months have made one thing painfully clear: Donald Trump and his allies in Congress are focused on protecting their own power, not serving the American people.
Their government shutdown is approaching the one-month mark, and instead of working to get Congress back to work for the American people, Republicans are doubling down on political games while Americans bear the cost. I’ve had enough.
The Republican trifecta should be working to solve real problems, but instead, they’re gerrymandering our maps to stay in power and protect their seats.
**[And they think they can get away with it. Will you help prove them wrong and help us flip the House by chipping in $10 before our upcoming end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/118115347/578707430/1096806550?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_102725_EOM1_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmU2OWQzMi04OWIzLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gXNQ-xqhJ439F9oXkEd3lgIdLxBb-y3SHg1mLWD6KQM=)**

_We’re standing up in Congress to defend the right to vote but we need grassroots Democrats like you to join us._

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Kidnapping ring discovered operating in Albuquerque 🚨
body:
$18K ransoms - and it gets worse | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=154c0458ed&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
A 911 call this week led Albuquerque Police to a stash house holding kidnapped victims for ransom. This isn't happening in some foreign country - [it's happening right here in Albuquerque](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=3d7e6a16e0&e=567664f14c). And Tim Keller's sanctuary city policies are making it possible.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=7408a35f15&e=567664f14c)
| |
🚨 **KIDNAPPING RING BUSTED IN ALBUQUERQUE**
APD responded to a 911 call from a woman who said she was kidnapped and didn't know where she was. Police pinged her location to the 700 block of Old Coors Boulevard and discovered something horrifying.
**Here's what they found:**
✅ Multiple victims trafficked from Mexico and held hostage in an Albuquerque house
✅ A ledger on suspect Francisco Galvez (59, from Mexico City) listing victim names with "Libre" and cash amounts owed
✅ Ransom demands UP TO $18,000 per victim
✅ A $300 PER DAY penalty charged if victims couldn't pay immediately
Galvez has been charged with kidnapping and will likely face federal charges. According to our sources, he's in the country illegally. This is essentially an international kidnapping operation - the kind you see in movies - happening in the middle of Albuquerque.
**And here's the kicker:** Just days ago, Tim Keller BRAGGED in a debate about his "immigrant friendly policy" where APD refuses to work with ICE. He said "by law and by executive order, we do not work with ICE."
This is the result. When law enforcement agencies can't coordinate, criminals KNOW they can operate here. Albuquerque has become a safe haven for human traffickers because of these policies. This isn't just bad politics - it's putting both citizens AND immigrants in grave danger.

---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=35cae78b71&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🇨🇦 **TRUMP DROPS ANOTHER 10% TARIFF ON CANADA**
Canada thought it was clever to release an ad featuring Ronald Reagan to push back against Trump's tariffs. Bad move. The ad was completely disingenuous about Reagan's actual positions, and Trump responded by slapping Canada with an ADDITIONAL 10% tariff.
Lesson learned: Don't try to weaponize American history against an American president. It won't end well for you.

🌍 **THE CLIMATE DEBATE IS OVER**
Mark breaks down why the whole "net zero" conversation has collapsed. It's not even a consideration anymore - people are realizing you simply cannot run the world without actual energy. But is there a lane where honest environmentalists and energy realists can find common ground? We explore what that might look like and what it means for New Mexico.

🦁 **MOST TERRIFYING TRAIL CAM FOOTAGE YET**
We captured the most incredible (and frightening) mountain lion footage in BROAD DAYLIGHT. This massive cat walked right past our camera on a trail we hike regularly. His tail alone is stunning. We also got footage of a coyote pack and "Jimmy" the massive bobcat making his rounds.
Spoiler alert: Mark and Krysty debate whether they can get the mountain lion "relocated" to Wyoming. The answer is... not great for their hiking plans.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ae727d4abc&e=567664f14c)
---
|
---

](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2ec0d552e7&e=567664f14c)

✅ **RATE & REVIEW** us on [your favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c983efbd21&e=567664f14c)

Bad move. The ad was completely disingenuous about Reagan's actual positions, and Trump responded by slapping Canada with an ADDITIONAL 10% tariff. Lesson learned: Don't try to weaponize American history against an American president. It won't end well for you. 🌍 THE CLIMATE DEBATE IS OVER Mark breaks down why the whole "net zero" conversation has collapsed. It's not even a consideration anymore - people are realizing you simply cannot run the world without actual energy. But is there a lane where honest environmentalists and energy realists can find common ground? We explore what that might look like and what it means for New Mexico. 🦁 MOST TERRIFYING TRAIL CAM FOOTAGE YET We captured the most incredible (and frightening) mountain lion footage in BROAD DAYLIGHT. This massive cat walked right past our camera on a trail we hike regularly. His tail alone is stunning. We also got footage of a coyote pack and "Jimmy" the massive bobcat making his rounds. Spoiler alert: Mark and Krysty debate whether they can get the mountain lion "relocated" to Wyoming. The answer is... not great for their hiking plans. | | | | ✅ LIKE the episode on ✅ SUBSCRIBE to and hit the 🔔 for updates ✅ RATE & REVIEW us on ✅ DONATE to support independent, fearless commentary at: 🌐 Thank you for being part of this community — real talk, real issues, and no spin. Mark & Krysty Ronchetti No Doubt About It Podcast 🎙️ | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2025 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Absolutely pummeled
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter,
As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than _$10 million_ on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous.
Why so much money, this far from Election Day?
Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. _That_ is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign.
_And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._
If Jon is going to defend this seat, we _really_ need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens.
[**Can Jon Ossoff count on you to contribute $5, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his reelection campaign and Ruben Gallego.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251027-1-90&t=1&akid=4025%2E734936%2Exrfpm8)
[DONATE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251027-1-90&t=2&akid=4025%2E734936%2Exrfpm8)
We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but _Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._
Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.
So here’s the truth:
**Jon needs our help today, Peter.**
He is literally MAGA’s #1 target.
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.
So yes, this election will be tough.
But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
[**Please, use this link to support Jon’s reelection campaign and Ruben Gallego. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.vUHoTq&refcode=em251027-1-90&t=3&akid=4025%2E734936%2Exrfpm8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.w3SM3J&amount=5&refcode=em251027-1-90&t=4&akid=4025%2E734936%2Exrfpm8)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-ossoff-em-split.w3SM3J&refcode=em251027-1-90&t=5&akid=4025%2E734936%2Exrfpm8)**
---
****
Thank you!
\- Team Ossoff

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
Donald Trump’s allies kicked off this redistricting battle, pushing states like Texas and North Carolina to redraw maps early to protect their slim grip on Congress.
And now, like in California, Virginia Democrats are stepping up to fight back.
Lawmakers are meeting this week to begin the process of redrawing Virginia’s congressional districts – a move that could shift up to three seats from Republicans to Democrats before the 2026 midterms.
That’s how close control of the House is. Three seats.
Republicans are already howling, calling it a “power grab,” but they’re the ones who rigged the rules in the first place. Democrats are finally refusing to play by Trump’s terms.
This is our moment to go on offense, and GOTV PAC is supporting Democratic House of Delegates candidates this November to make sure they hold their majority.
If Virginia redraws those seats, we take back the House. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email10272025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Every dollar helps power the grassroots organizing, data work, and field programs needed to win the districts this fight could decide.
Let’s finish what Trump started by beating him and his allies at their own game.
– Team GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: Let me introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher]

Hello,

My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.

I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.

I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council.

But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again.

I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.

Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. With the right Democrat, we can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it.

My campaign has set a goal to raise $50,000 to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still very short. If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:

Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Rep. Jason Crow to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not accepting money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so no amount you can give is too small. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jason Crow and Eileen Laubacher will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher?amount=10&express_lane=true]
DONATE $25 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher?amount=25&express_lane=true]

DONATE $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher?amount=50&express_lane=true]
DONATE $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher?amount=100&express_lane=true]

DONATE $250 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher?amount=250&express_lane=true]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-laubacher]

Our republic is being tested in ways that it has never been before. We must protect it and keep it.

I am so grateful to have your support.

Eileen

Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

REAR ADMIRAL EILEEN LAUBACHER (RET) IS A FORMER MEMBER OF THE U.S. NAVY. USE OF HER MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES, AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE.
Jason Crow for Congress

Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

President Trump Offers Condolences, Urges Darren Bailey to Stay in the Fight (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/president-trump-offers-condolences-urges-darren-bailey-to-stay-in-the-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=72c3c4e121-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/10/president-trump-offers-condolences-urges-darren-bailey-to-stay-in-the-fight.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=72c3c4e121-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Darren Bailey, Illinois State Senator and gubernatorial candidate, speaks alongside former President Donald Trump on Saturday, June 25, 2022, during a “Save America!” Rally at the Adams County Fairgrounds in Mendon, Ill. (Photo: Brian Munoz/St. Louis Public Radio)
By Illinois Review

Republican gubernatorial candidate Darren Bailey has temporarily suspended his campaign following the tragic helicopter crash that claimed the lives of his son, daughter-in-law, and two grandchildren. But even in this period of unimaginable grief, Bailey received a call of compassion – and encouragement – from President Donald J. Trump.

According to Bailey’s running mate, Aaron Del Mar, President Trump personally called Bailey on his cell phone Saturday. The two “had a very long talk,” Del Mar said. “He gave Darren, obviously, his condolences and support,” Del Mar added, “but more surprisingly, he encouraged Darren to continue the race and to continue to fight.”

The campaign told Illinois Review that President Trump described Bailey as “a great warrior,” assuring him that he was going to win — and urging him to keep fighting for the people of Illinois.

President Trump has long been a strong supporter of Bailey. In 2022, Trump officially endorsed Bailey’s campaign for governor, calling him a “farmers’ son who will stand tall for Illinois families and never back down to the woke left.”

That endorsement helped propel Bailey to a landslide victory in the Republican primary, cementing his status as the conservative standard-bearer in the state.

Bailey announced earlier this week that he was suspending campaign activities to grieve with his family after the devastating crash in Montana that took the lives of his son Zachary, daughter-in-law Kelsey, and their two young children, Vada Rose and Samuel.

Since the tragedy, prayers have poured in from across the nation, uniting both supporters and opponents in sympathy.

Bailey is expected to remain focused on family and faith in the coming days as funeral services are held in downstate Illinois. His campaign remains on hold, but Trump’s message serves as a powerful reminder that even in tragedy, the mission to restore moral leadership and conservative values in Illinois continues.
“Darren and Cindy are heartbroken by this unimaginable loss,” the statement read. “They are finding comfort in their faith, their family, and the prayers of so many who love and care for them.”

Bailey, the 2022 Republican nominee for governor and current GOP candidate for 2026, is known for his strong Christian faith and commitment to family values. The campaign has asked the public to keep the Bailey family in their prayers as they grieve this devastating loss.

Ted Dabrowski discusses his candidacy for governor during a joint meeting between the Illinois Republican Party State Central Committee and the Republican County Chairmen’s Association on Aug. 14, 2025, at the Bank of Springfield Center in Springfield. (Dominic Di Palermo/Chicago Tribune)
By Illinois Review

Republican gubernatorial candidate Ted Dabrowski is under fire after turning a solemn memorial for conservative leader Charlie Kirk into a campaign rally – complete with profanity shouted in front of children and families.

The incident, combined with new revelations about his advisors’ involvement in a political smear campaign against fellow Republican Darren Bailey, has sparked outrage among grassroots conservatives who say Dabrowski’s campaign has lost all sense of moral direction.

The memorial, held in Yorkville – a longtime conservative community – was meant to honor Kirk’s legacy of faith, family, and conservative leadership. Attendees included community leaders, families, and supporters who had gathered to celebrate the life of a man who inspired thousands of young Americans through Turning Point USA and his unapologetic Christian witness.

But instead of a message of unity, attendees were stunned when Dabrowski – invited to offer brief remarks – turned his appearance into a political speech for his gubernatorial campaign.

clean_body: view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this breaking news alert. Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () President Trump Offers Condolences, Urges Darren Bailey to Stay in the Fight () Darren Bailey, Illinois State Senator and gubernatorial candidate, speaks alongside former President Donald Trump on Saturday, June 25, 2022, during a “Save America!” Rally at the Adams County Fairgrounds in Mendon, Ill. (Photo: Brian Munoz/St. Louis Public Radio) By Illinois Review Republican gubernatorial candidate Darren Bailey has temporarily suspended his campaign following the tragic helicopter crash that claimed the lives of his son, daughter-in-law, and two grandchildren. But even in this period of unimaginable grief, Bailey received a call of compassion – and encouragement – from President Donald J. Trump. According to Bailey’s running mate, Aaron Del Mar, President Trump personally called Bailey on his cell phone Saturday. The two “had a very long talk,” Del Mar said. “He gave Darren, obviously, his condolences and support,” Del Mar added, “but more surprisingly, he encouraged Darren to continue the race and to continue to fight.” The campaign told Illinois Review that President Trump described Bailey as “a great warrior,” assuring him that he was going to win — and urging him to keep fighting for the people of Illinois. President Trump has long been a strong supporter of Bailey. In 2022, Trump officially endorsed Bailey’s campaign for governor, calling him a “farmers’ son who will stand tall for Illinois families and never back down to the woke left.” That endorsement helped propel Bailey to a landslide victory in the Republican primary, cementing his status as the conservative standard-bearer in the state. Bailey announced earlier this week that he was suspending campaign activities to grieve with his family after the devastating crash in Montana that took the lives of his son Zachary, daughter-in-law Kelsey, and their two young children, Vada Rose and Samuel. Since the tragedy, prayers have poured in from across the nation, uniting both supporters and opponents in sympathy. Bailey is expected to remain focused on family and faith in the coming days as funeral services are held in downstate Illinois. His campaign remains on hold, but Trump’s message serves as a powerful reminder that even in tragedy, the mission to restore moral leadership and conservative values in Illinois continues. “Darren and Cindy are heartbroken by this unimaginable loss,” the statement read. “They are finding comfort in their faith, their family, and the prayers of so many who love and care for them.” Bailey, the 2022 Republican nominee for governor and current GOP candidate for 2026, is known for his strong Christian faith and commitment to family values. The campaign has asked the public to keep the Bailey family in their prayers as they grieve this devastating loss. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Ted Dabrowski Turns Charlie Kirk Memorial Into Campaign Rally, Shouts ‘Gdammit’ in Front of Children () Ted Dabrowski discusses his candidacy for governor during a joint meeting between the Illinois Republican Party State Central Committee and the Republican County Chairmen’s Association on Aug. 14, 2025, at the Bank of Springfield Center in Springfield. (Dominic Di Palermo/Chicago Tribune) By Illinois Review Republican gubernatorial candidate Ted Dabrowski is under fire after turning a solemn memorial for conservative leader Charlie Kirk into a campaign rally – complete with profanity shouted in front of children and families. The incident, combined with new revelations about his advisors’ involvement in a political smear campaign against fellow Republican Darren Bailey, has sparked outrage among grassroots conservatives who say Dabrowski’s campaign has lost all sense of moral direction. The memorial, held in Yorkville – a longtime conservative community – was meant to honor Kirk’s legacy of faith, family, and conservative leadership. Attendees included community leaders, families, and supporters who had gathered to celebrate the life of a man who inspired thousands of young Americans through Turning Point USA and his unapologetic Christian witness. But instead of a message of unity, attendees were stunned when Dabrowski – invited to offer brief remarks – turned his appearance into a political speech for his gubernatorial campaign. Paid subscribers make it all possible--just $8/month if you're down to support 👇](https://substack.com/redirect/ec0d8a97-7899-47ad-9838-56f7e75cfa54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_

Hey folks,
I sat down with Cenk Uygur from _The Young Turks_ for a deep dive into the latest on Graham Platner--and to debate Democratic leadership, the progressive movement, and what it's really going to take to win elections.
No matter where you fall within the Democratic Party, I think this conversation is worth your time. We got into some real talk: strategy, risk-taking, messaging, where the party's headed, and the tough calls we'll need to make if we're serious about winning.
Hope you'll give it a listen when you've got a few minutes. Would love to hear what you think.
With urgency,
--Mike

body:
The deadline strikes at midnight on Halloween!

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. Things are looking **really** scary out there right now. But don’t worry, my human, Gabe, is out there every day fighting to turn the lights back on and make things a little less frightful for families across New Mexico! He’s been working like a dog (trust me, I’d know!) — shaking paws, pushing for real solutions, and trying to get America back on track. But here’s the pup-date: my dad’s got a big goal — $8,000 by the end of the month — and he needs your help to hit it before the clock strikes midnight on Halloween! name: Deb Haaland
subject: October 31st
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Thank you in advance for stepping up.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=5329%2E400544%2Evgttsp)

October 31st marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline — and I’m personally setting a very ambitious goal to reach 10,000 grassroots contributions by Friday.
This is our first major deadline since a Republican insider jumped into the race, and in response, it’s absolutely critical we show the strength of our grassroots movement right now.
As you know, I don’t come from wealth, and I can’t write our campaign a big check to help us compete against the onslaught of right-wing attacks headed our way. **Grassroots supporters like you are the reason we’re building a strong campaign to change the game for New Mexico, and I hope I can count on your support today.**
**[So I’m asking: will you make a contribution of $5 or any amount toward our goal of 10,000 donations before the end of the month?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251027_2_eom.019xoh&amount=5&refcode=em20251027-5329&t=3&akid=5329%2E400544%2Evgttsp)**

Be fierce,
Deb

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Tell Kristi Noem: No troops in our cities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The authoritarian threats of troops and ICE in our cities are out of control. | |
---
Peter, Earlier this year, the Supreme Court gave ICE permission to racially profile people, including American citizens. They can legally stop people, and even grab people off the street, based on their accents, their jobs, and even whether they ride the bus. **Of course, this means they can also target people who attend Spanish language concerts, like Bad Bunny.** Bad Bunny has chosen not to tour in the United States because he knows ICE could invade his shows and go after his fans. So when Bad Bunny was announced as the Super Bowl halftime performer, extremists and racists across the country — including the ones that work in our government — were furious. **Now, Corey Lewandowski, Trump loyalist and chief advisor to Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem, says ICE may show up to the Super Bowl to racially target Bad Bunny fans.** [**Only an authoritarian government looking to silence dissent and instill fear would target people the way the Trump administration has, and the fact they feel emboldened to harass fans at an event like the Super Bowl proves they think they’re untouchable. We the People have had enough of ICE harassing our communities and federal troops descending on our cities. Tell Kristi Noem: Stop the invasions now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38HMt1zREAxxugYQTMeL-6tAXdynaLoOc-D6L58v4-TsoeYZrWVPbOPgE8r3vyqUXOHHgL0uFqx5jdOmedJC-_Onnk5Aro7Gx6DHdr2NLnQ61_14NOS-MKNPutyA2GHaSOnRbfJpczli94Qj-Xxf6IrRv9I05RVHkXNsZri4_Gd3n_Fh7vYXfewXVg68IjDPhox5Viu40wLM1zERZa7-dNmR-NYa6nzSkSdJqKARDwFRKIzx4j9O_RJDcjV2XnKUwAUbXiF1NUbw2qhlj_3bfAC5c6LCQQe76zqnxpa8SpdeTV0uCDEqyV5CtCxRdbKRyiAizEJhw64Zu55PgF6LXnTfs71PMPYX6D5ST7Ekaxgq0lhtTsOPNumemNOEI7Ygr34lVk79cznpjRQTapn9C20c6B-EUQongpCurFURRU5Ca4kUOpcdbPoKdvlk6g1i7RdMT2FLIu5xshPSzuAEG9g2SbViUNOUweJ5XH-XaKWANVgLEzXFJ_19SE5-DFc2lCHuHP520PMsZ5Dm7E9ARsapd8uUT19w-UexeDLCM2c4Q/4l3/9dYDztsLSdqSAE7G-T8DrA/h0/h001.fghGdAEk97zG59ciC3RYXBOPLN4sc9OwFHdBlpXkh6g) [SIGN & SEND](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38HMt1zREAxxugYQTMeL-6tAXdynaLoOc-D6L58v4-TsoeYZrWVPbOPgE8r3vyqUXOHHgL0uFqx5jdOmedJC-_Onnk5Aro7Gx6DHdr2NLnQ61_14NOS-MKNPutyA2GHaSOnRbfJpczli94Qj-Xxf6IrRv9I05RVHkXNsZri4_Gd3n_Fh7vYXfewXVg68IjDPhox5Viu40wLM1zERZa7-dNmR-NYa6nzSkSdJqKARDwFRKIzx4j9O_RJDcjV2XnKUwAUbXiF1NUbw2qhlj_3bfAC5c6LCQQe76zqnxpa8SpdeZ8v_T_FzuuibS_-Vblkca2ryqi6_rtH2K-kF8vMRQE8rR2Hcp6B5TuNET0tvW4vENg7Z8Bl7v-gFqmcUD-zbpSEj6tQaS592xBWocMl5qHbKVMG03ccWOaDxhMaWq6AE3OKMromFiTf2JRWw3QYPO0mAnor7KcYQjIT6yi8qcAL98BrEfQeHTayz5Cy2Jiwm2lqscl86nVd0fbRENxzVgFb02O4urqMQlHtxqkRjt-7KALdx9lNyIc14-NhSs0iPQ/4l3/9dYDztsLSdqSAE7G-T8DrA/h1/h001.sU8k45gxTN7_Gt_0SkdYBdo7KJfx85kXTLmsQRpnQPQ) Kristi Noem has helped Trump deploy ICE and the military to over a dozen cities already this year. In Chicago, ICE descended on an apartment building in Black Hawk helicopters in the middle of the night and yanked adults and children—many unclothed—from their beds an zip tied them. **This is not what a democracy looks like. And the Trump administration knows it can get away with it because it has the MAGA Supreme Court justices on speed dial to give him cover.** But there’s one thing the authoritarians don’t have, and that’s the will of the people. They won’t stop attacking our communities unless we stand up, speak out, and demand action. [**Send a letter to the Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem today. Tell her to stop using military troops and ICE to invade and disrupt American cities immediately.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38HMt1zREAxxugYQTMeL-6tAXdynaLoOc-D6L58v4-TsoeYZrWVPbOPgE8r3vyqUXOHHgL0uFqx5jdOmedJC-_Onnk5Aro7Gx6DHdr2NLnQ61_14NOS-MKNPutyA2GHaSOnRbfJpczli94Qj-Xxf6IrRv9I05RVHkXNsZri4_Gd3n_Fh7vYXfewXVg68IjDPhox5Viu40wLM1zERZa7-dNmR-NYa6nzSkSdJqKARDwFRKIzx4j9O_RJDcjV2XnKUwAUbXiF1NUbw2qhlj_3bfAC5c6LCQQe76zqnxpa8SpdeaPQnTSaxwariURZsNiG1JaPMuxgMABRkrj1tNMgMWN1_JPTPvFtSW0UlMr4MjJrZVVJncspaFjge0sQEp7nTYlGvaJKi29NuGdiBkYABasrtK5q9WjISPPOqg3NvWJErO9IArETwXwKGLhf73oN03y7GEfzGwKrYZnbcsBOR8rW5Oc-q4L0mVxImcMYLiizkL_RuGTzmDRMzUMcbhakwHWD6ui25r4lXdfqbUcv_nqYcujM_gTqoD7BQbPlYz7Cyw/4l3/9dYDztsLSdqSAE7G-T8DrA/h2/h001.B8_080WJKTy2rNKnotk6l0Efd4RGjir1PXcenz1bZi8) Thank you for fighting for our democracy, Morgan Stahr

body:
I hope you'll have my back again today.

Today, Christopher Newport University released their final poll of our race for Governor.
In September, they claimed we were ahead by 12 points. Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points.
Peter, I'll put it plainly: **This election will be close.**
We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025.
_But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support._

clean_body: I hope you'll have my back again today. = Today, Christopher Newport University released their final poll of our race for Governor. In September, they claimed we were ahead by 12 points. Now, they found that Winsome Earle-Sears has closed the gap and trails by just seven points. Peter, I'll put it plainly: This election will be close. We are doing absolutely everything in our power to reach undecided voters here in Virginia, to share my agenda for Virginia families, stand up to Trump's attacks, and win the biggest election of 2025. But this work is hard, it's expensive — and it can only continue with your support. = = = = = = = It's a point of pride that so many of you have invested in my campaign. I hope you'll have my back again today. Thank you so much, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Team DNC
subject: On the urgency of this moment...
body:
---
Derek, In just a second, we’ll be asking you to donate directly to the DNC. But first, let us explain the urgency and importance of your support today: **Election Day is in just over one week, and it’s all hands on deck to reach every voter we can.** [**This work is only possible with the support of our grassroots supporters, and we’re counting on you to join us in this fight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251027_5046_fr&refcode2=5046_22930333_n3VqKt&akid=5046%2E22930333%2En3VqKt) The stakes could not be higher. In the last few weeks alone, Trump and his allies have continued their attempts to dismantle our democracy:
* In North Carolina, Republican lawmakers passed new congressional maps and stole _another_ seat.
* Republicans are refusing to swear in Democratic Rep.-elect Adelita Grijalva — blatantly disregarding the 800,000 Arizonans she was elected to represent in Congress.
* Trump has demolished the East Wing of the White House to build his tacky $350 million ballroom. Does that sound like someone who’s planning to leave the White House anytime soon?

The _only_ way we will be able to protect our democracy is if we elect as many Democrats as we can — in one week, in next year’s midterms, and beyond. As the organization best positioned to strategically distribute funds where they’re needed most, we’ve made major investments in states like Virginia, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania — and we’re already laying the groundwork for next year’s midterms, investing in every single state party. **When you give $7 to the DNC, this is exactly where it goes — toward on-the-ground organizing and reaching voters nationwide. So we have to ask:** [**Derek, will you join the thousands of other Democrats just like you and chip in $7 to the DNC today? We need your help to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this year, flip the House and the Senate next year, and take back the White House in 2028.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251027_5046_fr&refcode2=5046_22930333_n3VqKt&akid=5046%2E22930333%2En3VqKt) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251027_5046_fr&refcode2=5046_22930333_n3VqKt&akid=5046%2E22930333%2En3VqKt)**
